pericopes.title: Mi kiletsah te chunga Pakai thutanna
Judah leh Jerusalem chunga Pakai thutanna
Isaiah mu nei chule ama kikou
Ahaz henga Isaiah thupoh thangkou amasa
Nagin dingu chu Pakai hijo hen.
Jesse bah a kon vaihom dih
Amoh cheng loupi tah a ahung kilekit
Ethiopia chung chang thua themgao thusei
Assyrian Egypt le Ethiopia ajo ding
Twikhanglen pang gamthip noi thudola thuchih
Themgao thilmu na phaicham thudola thuchih
Shebna chu Eli’akim kikhel ding ahi
Tyre le Sidon chung chang thudola thuchih
Pakai lunglhai jeh a vabchoina la
Egypt mite mihembou ahi, Pathen ahipouve
Pakaiyin Huhhingna ahln lhut ding ahi.
Namtin vaipi le Edom douna Pakai lungsat
Hezeki’ah chun Babylon mi palaiho alamdot (2
Zion dinga Pakaiyin lhamonna thu asei
Pakaiyin thahat tah a mi ahuhdoh vahchoina
Babylon mite milim semthu ho chule Pakai.
Pathenin sohchanna kona Zion ahuhdoh ding
Pathena kitepna nit jeh a kipaman

chapters.text: Judah lengte Uzziah le Jotham, Ahaz le Hezekiah lal laiya Judah gam le Jerusalem chung chang thudola Amoz chapa Isaiah kitipan mu aneiya athilmu chu.
@@O vanin ngaiyin, chule leiset’in nakol hinsung temin; Ajeh chu Pakaiyin thu aseitai. Chapa pasal tampi kavah khangin kahin seiletsah tan, Ahinla amahon keima dounan thil aboltauve.
Bongchal chun apupa akihet’in, Sangan’in jong apun an apehna ankong ahei; Israel’in vang ahephapon, Kamite hin ahekhen thei him him pouve,” ati.
Ohe, chonse nam mite, Themmona dimset mite, Agilou bolte chilhah ho, Giloutah-a thilbol chapate! Hiche miho hin Pakai adalha tauvin, Israel Mithengpa chu adonda tauve; ajam mangsoh-ah ahitauve.
Ipi dinga doumah mah nabol’uva, Tugeiya nakijeplo lo diu hi tam? Aluchang apumpin anatan, Alungthim apumpin achol’e
Kengtoa pat luchang geiyin abit kom aum tapoi. Akitat dup jengleh apat lai jeng, chule athilong maha jeng ahin; Anaila akimehdoh pon, tomjong akitompon, thaola akinu jolpon,
Nagamsungu jong akidalha thipdel tan, Nakhopi jouseu jong meiyin akatai; Na-angsung tah-uva gamdang miten nagamu alosoh tan, Akidalha thip soh hel’in, gamdang miten alehkhup hel tauve.
Zion chanu chu lengpileiya buh kisong tobang leh Changmai leiya buh kisong bangin akidalhan, khopi kichom kangsa abange.
Hatchungnung Pakaiyin, Ahingdoh themkhat beh eikhen louvu hileh, Eiho Sodom toh ibang jenguva, Gomorrah toh ibah jeng dingu ahi.
Sodom khoa vaihomten Pakai thusei hi ngaiyuvin lang, Gomorrah kho miten ka-Pathenu mihilna a hin nakol sung temuvin!

“Nakilhainau gantha hijatpi hi Ken ipi ding kati ding ham?” tin Pakaiyin aseiye. “Keiman kelngoichal pumgo thilto tampi kaneiyin, Gancha kivah thao tah tah jeng jong kaneiye; Keiman bongchal tampi thisan hihen, kelngoite thisan hileh Kelchate thisan hijongleh kakipa pipoi.
“Kahenga nahung tenguleh, Koiham keima inpi chonthang dinga kouvuvah?

Thilto pannabei ho chu hintoh kit hih hel’uvin, Gimnamtui jong kei dia thet umtah ahibouve. Lhathah nikho jong cholngah nikho jong, abol diu khoppi kikoukhom nikho hijongleh, Themmona leh khoppi theng ahivanga kadouthei lou ahiye.
Nalha thah kut bolu ahin, phat tepsa kut nabol jouseu hi, Kahinkhoa kadeilou kahot ahi. Hiche ho chu keidingin pohgih bep ahin, Abonchan kapo chimtai.
Nakhut phanga neihin san tenguleh Kamit kasin khum ding nahiuve; Ijeh-inem itile tao tao jong leu chun Kangaipeh lou ding nahiuve; nakhut’u thisan adime.
Kisil ngimuvin lang kisuthenguvin, Kamit mun thil gilou nabol jouseu tol manguvin lang, Thilse bolkit datauvin. Thilpha bolje kithem chuh-uvin lang,
Thu adih a tan din gouvin, Bol gentheina thohho chu sudih-uvin lang, Pabei chagate thu adih-in tanpeh uvin; Meithaite ding thil dih seipeh-uvin,
Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Hunguvin kihou toh uhite; Nachonset’u thisan bang jongleh Buhbang banga bang ding nahiuve; Sandup je ju jongleh, Kelngoimul jolsel tobang hiding ahi.
Nanghon nadeiyuva thu nangaiyuleh Gamsunga apha chu naneh dingu ahi.
Amavang nadauva doumah mah nabol vanguleh Chemjama nalousoh kei dingu ahi; Ajeh chu Pakai kamsungin thu aseitai.” ati.
I-atileh khopi kitah tah chu noti a panga hitam? Akhopia chun thu adih jengin akitan me! Khosunga jong adih jeng alengin ahi; Tunla tolthat jengin apang tai.
Nadangka chu thih-eh asoh tan, Nalengpitwi jong twi toh akihal tam tai.

Milen milal’a naneiho jong doumah mah bol’in apanguvin. Guchate jol le gol’in apang tauve. Amitakip’in nehguh adeiyin. Aguh a thilpeh ding adel le leuve. Pa beiya umte chaga thula atankhoh peh pouvin, Meithaite thu atanpeh diuvin ahengu alhung joutapoi.
Hijeh chun Pakai, Hatchungnung Yahweh, Israel dia mihatpa chun hitin aseiye. “A! Keiman kamelmate chu kalungsat khuma, Eidoute chunga keima mong mongin phu kahin lah ding ahi.
Keiman nang douna kakhut kalap’a, Nathih-eh chu sumtwiya kahin lhah khena, Nasum kilhajol chengse Kaloikhen soh keiding ahi.

Chutengleh amasa banga nangma dia thutan vaihomho kapansah kit’a, Nathu mop’a pang jouse jong chu akipat til’a bang hi ding ahi. Hichejou teng chuleh nangma hi dihna khopi, Khopi kitah tah, nakiti ding ahi.” ati.
Thu adih-a akitan teng Zion lhatdam changin tin, Asunga cheng adih a lungkhelte chu kilhatdoh diu ahi.
Doumah bolte leh chonse ho vang kisuh mang than tin, Chule Pakai jamsante chu kibahgam ding ahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itile nathanop piu gangpi phung ho Chu nakijumso nau hi ding, Nakilhensau honlei jouse jong chu Maisan hel’a nathohpi dingu ahi.
Ajeh chu nangho ana gopsa gangpi phung nabah-uva, Twi lutna lou honlei toh nabah dingu ahi.
Chule mihat chu saikhao nemtah bang ding, Anatoh jong chu meisi pahbep hi ding ahi. Amajong anatoh jong kavam lhon ding, Aphel mit ding koima cha umlou ding ahi.
Hiche thil hi Amoz chapa Isaiah chun Judah le Jerusalem chung chang thudola anamu, amunei chu ahi.

Ni nu nung phatle hung hiti ding ahi, Pakai inmun molsang chu Molsang jouse sanga asang pena hung kitungdoh ding, Thinglhang jouse vuma hung kikhang doh ding ahin; Hiche laiya chu Namtin vaipi hung lhai khom cheh ding ahiuve.

Hichele chun chitin namtin hunguva hita asei dingu, Hunguvin Pakai molsanga kijot touvu hite, Jacob Pathen inmun lama chun; Aman alampi aboncha eihil’uva, Chutengle eiho jong ama lamlhah dunga ivale theina dinguvin,” atidiu ahi, Ajeh chu Ziona kona danthu hung potdoh ding, Jerusalema kona Pakai thusei hung potdoh ding ahi.

Chutia chu aman namtin vaipi kah a thu ahintan ding, Chule chitin namtin dinga thugei ahin lhe ding, Mihon achemjamu tucha akikhenuva, Atengchau jong kangkuiya akikhen diu, Nam khat’in nam khat douna dinga Chemjam alap louhel ding ahi; Koijoh ahiya galbol kihiljo sang Hung um kit lou ding ahitai.
Vo Jacob insung hunguvin, Pakai vah a kijot uhite.

Ijeh-nem itile nangman namite Jacob insung chu napaitai, Ajeh chu amaho niso lama hung kon akigaote adimset’uvin, Philistine ho bangin mitphel doiththem adim’uvin, Gamdang mite chate toh akhut abeng khomuvin ahi.
Jacob gamsung hi dangka le sana adim tan, Ahivangin amapa goukhol la angahna aumdeh pon; Agamsung hi sakolte adimpaiya ahitan, Ama dingin sakol kangtalai ho hi la akingahna aumdeh poi.
Agamsung hi milim kisemthu ho adimpaiya ahitan, Miho thilsem koma akun’uvin chibai aboh tauve; Amahon hitobang thil ho hi Akhut mong monga asemdoh-u ahi.
Hiti hin mihem chu sot lhah-in umin tin, Mihem chu suhnema umding ahi; amaho chu ngaidam lou jen nin!
Songko sunga lut’in, leivui lah a chun kisel mangin, Tijat umtah Pakai masangleh alal loupi masanga chun.
Mihemin mi avetneo na chu kisu neova, Mihemte kiletsahna chu kisunem ding, Hiche nikho chuleh Pakai ama changseh bou choisanga um ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai hatchungnung chun Mi kiletsahte le mi kithang atte, Mi kichoi sangte leh Mi kidom sangte dounan nikho khat aneiye,
Lebanona cedar thing huikai ho leh akidoh sang ho douna, Bashan phaiya gangpi thing ho douna,
Molsang jouse douna leh Thinglhang sang jouse douna,
Intingvum sang lai jouse douna leh Galpal kikaiden kulpi jouse douna,
Tarshish a kong innei ho douna leh Khut thema kisem thil hoitah tah ho douna nikho khat aneiye.
Mihem mi noisena chu kisu nema, Mihemte kiletsahna chu sot lhah a kikoi ding ahi; Hiche nikho chuleh Pakai ama changseh bou choisanga um ding ahi.
Chutengleh milim kisemthu jouse Kitol mang ding ahi.
Chule mihemte songko sung dunga lut’uva, Leiko dunga hung lut ding ahiuve. Tijat umtah Pakai masang leh Ama lal loupi masanga chu, Ama leiset tijatsah dinga Ahung kipatdoh teng chuleh.
Hiche nikho le chun mihemin Adangka milim ho le asana milim ho, Chibai boh dinga anasem chengseu chu Bui ho leh bah ho koma ahinse manguva,

Songpi ko sung dunga hung lut’a Songpi ko sung dung le songpi khi kah dunga Hung lut le ding ahi, Tijat umtah Pakai masangleh Ama lal loupi masanga chu, Ama leiset tijatsah dinga Ahung kipatdoh teng chuleh.
Nangho dingin vang mihema konin jamdoh-uvin, Anahhom sunga haithei mai maipa a konchun; Ajeh chu ama ija kingaitoa ham?
Ijeh-inem itile vetan, Pakai hatchungnung Yahweh chun Jerusalem leh Judah gama konin Akihenna le aki ngap na chu. Ahakamna chang lhah jouse leh Adang nouna twi jouse jong; atol mangtai,
Mihatpa leh sepai pang mi ahin, Thutan vaihomle themgao ahin Agaotheipa leh upa pu ahin,
Mi som nga lamkaipa leh Lamkai masa pa ahin, Thu mop’a pang leh mitphel doithempa ahin, Chule ailhim thempa geiyin jong atolmang thai,
Chuteng keiman miho dinga chapang cha cha milen milal’a kapansah-a Naosen cha chan achunguva vai ahom diu ahi.

Hichele chun mipi chu khat’in khat abolgentheiya, Mihem khat chun amihem chanpi abolset ding, Ami tinin aheng akom abolgenthei ding ahi, Khangdong jong chun Upa ahin vet tom ding, Pannabei min jong ja umtah mi chu anoise ding ahi.

Mi khat chun apa insunga asopi pasal khat chu atuhdet dena “Nangman ponsil naneiye, Keiho lamkaiyin hung pangin lang, Alhu lhamsa mi hicheng hi nangma vaihomna noiya umding ahiuve,” tia aseiyu jongleh,
Hiche nikho chuleh aman aseiya, “Keima koima hoithei kahipoi, Ka-insunga jong neh ding chah ding jong aumpon, ponsil jong aumpoi, Japi lamkai din neipansah dauvin,” tia asei ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Jerusalem kipal lhua Judah gam jong alhua ahitai; Ijeh ham itile athilbol anatoh jouse lhon Pakai douna jeng ahijin, Pakai loupi tah a aumpet’in amaichang chang-ah ataitom lhone.

Alang neina lhon chu amani hehsen apangin, Achonsetna lhon jong Sodom chonsetna bangin min aphonjal peh tan, Aselmang peh pouve. Ohe! ada ahi lhon tai. Ijeh-inem itile nachung lhona min agilou nalhut khum lhontai.
Midih vang chu seipeh-in amaho dingin apha nai, Ajeh chu amahon atohgau akineh tei dingu ahiye.
Ohe! migilou chu ada ahi, ama din vang thilpha aumpoi; Ajeh chu akhut te nia athilbol tobang bang chu achunga kibol khum ding ahi.
Kamite kiti hi amaho bolgentheiya pangte chate jeng ahitauvin, Achunguva numei vaihomin apangtai Vo kamite, nalamkai teuvin lam hilouva napui tauvin, Nalampiu asunoh gamtauvin ahi.
Pakai chu thutan dingin alaltouna a atoutan, Amite thutan dingin ading tai.
Pakai chu amite upate leh milen milal ho toh thutan din alut’in, “Lengpilei bahgam a nangho nahiuvin, Mivaichate thil kichomdoh chengse chu Nangho insunga aumtai.
Ipi dinga kamite nachilgoiyuva, Mivaichate maichang sumheiya nagoiyu ham?” tin Pakai, Hatchungnung Yahweh chun aseiye.
Pakai chun aseiyin, “Zion chanute ahoithouvin, Ngong vaiput’a avaleuva, Pannabeiya mittol leu louva mi a vet’uva, Keng dildot dot’a lam ajot vanguvin,
Pakaiyin Zion chanute chu alujangu dulchet chut’a ahinjep’a, Atahsa aselguh lai jouse jong ahinho doh pehdiu ahiye.
Hiche nikho chuleh Pakaiyin ngalvei hoitah tah le lukop jouse jong ngong-o jouse jong abansut lhah a,
bilba jouse leh chaojang jouse jong ngongveiho jouse jong asut lhah ding,
pon lukhuh jouse le bantom ho jong, konga kivei pon ho jong asut lhah ding, gimnamtui thingkong jouse le, chule damtheina ponsil ho jong asuhmang ding,
khutjem ho hihen lang nahhoma kibat chaokol ho hileh asutlhah a,
golvahna kimang ponsil jouse le ponsil adang jong sangkhol chol ho hihen khut’a kikhai sakhao ho hijongleh alah manga,
bangkot’a kidal pon ho hijongleh tupat ponnem jouse jong delkop ho gei geiya pon lukhuh ho jeng jong khen louva aboncha alah mangsoh kei ding ahi.

Gimnamtui khel’a auile amonsa joh hung um ding, Konggah khel’a kikanna khaojang hi ding, Sam hoitah a kipotjol khel’a luchang tol hel’a mi umding, Ponsil chol hoitah khel’a khaodip pon kisil ding, Mel-hoi sanga chu Jachatna hung hijo ding,
Napasalteu chemjama lou diu, Nami hat lailai jouseu jong galmuna kijamchap diu ahi.
Chutengleh akulpi kelkot jousen apul adouva kap diu, Zion chu numei banga aponsil teldeh dub a tolchanga kikhelpha dending ahi

Hiche nikho chuleh numei sagi pasal khat kichu uva hitia asei diu, “Keihon ka-an kineh uvin ting kaponsil ding kanihchen ding ki-ngaito nauvinge, nangman jin neisemin, na-insunga neichensah poupouvun, minset pua ka umnau hi subei pou pou tan,” ati dingu ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh Pakaiya kona abah jamdoh chu vetnom hung uma loupi ding chule Israel ahingdoh chengse dinga agam leiset ga chu athupi nau le aloupi nau hi ding ahi.
Chutengleh Zion a kidalhapa Jerusalema umden pa chu atheng kiti ding, Jerusalema hinkhoa dinga kijih lut chengse jong theng ding,

Pakaiyin Zion chanute nen jouse asopthenga, Jerusalem lailunga kona lhagao meikong ahinlha a, thutanna lhagao ahinlha ding, Jerusalem chunga thisan beh jouse chu asoptheng soh tengleh Jerusalem chu atheng kiti ding ahi.

Hiche le chun Pakaiyin Zion chung vumle akhopia kikhom miho chunga sun teng meilhang ahinbol sah-a jan teng meikhu akhutdoh sah-a meikong akondoh sah ding ahi; hichengse loupina chung vum peh a jong chu golnop vetna insang kisa a toumun lim kisong ding ahiye.
Hiche chu sun tengle nisa lima pang ding, gojuh gel lhah tengleh kiselna a kimang ding ahi.
Keiman kadeipa dingin alengpilei lachoi la sange, Kadeipan thing lhang gamleipha tah a lengpilei khat ananeiye.

Aman alei alhouvin song jouse akaldoh soh tai, Chuin lengpithei phapen tah aphut’in ahi; Hichun alailung tah-a thing chung buh khat asan, Aman lengpitwi lhoh na khat asemin, Hichea chun lengpithei ga ding ho angah-in ahile Amala gamlah lengpithei jeng ahung gajo tai.
Hijeh chun tun Vo Jerusalema chengte leh Judah gam mite, Keile kalengpilei kah-a thu neihin tanpeh tem’uvin.
Kalengpilei dinga kabol lou ipi bat kanei nah lai ham? Lengpithei hung ga ding kingah-a, ipi dia gamlah lengpithei hung gaham?
Hijeh chun tun keiman kalengpilei chu Ipi kabolpeh be ding ham seitem minge. Keiman atho phe lha leng Min negam tante, Apal vo-lhu soh keileng Min keng chotpha anei jeng ding ahi.

Keiman gamchang noi kasosah a akeova kakoi ding, Mal jong kimalngim lou ding ahamkeh kilhou lou ding, Lingle khao jouse hung kehdoh ding ahi; Meilhang jousen jong Go ahin juhsah louhel na dinguva Keiman thu kapeh ding ahiye.

Hiche Hatchungnung Pakai lengpilei kiti hi, Israel insung ahin. Judah gam mite alungdeiya akiphu thingphung chu ahi; Hijeh a chu aman thu adih a tan ding agel ding ahin; Ahinla vetan thisan kiso na jeng ahi; Adih ahol ahin Ahin vetemin ka o-gin akithonge!
Ohe, ada nahiuve, in kichoh be be ho Lou kehbe be jeng ho, mun beihel’a koiho. Gam lailunga nang ho hi Nachangseh-a nakichensah-u ahitai.
Kanabeng tah a Hatchungnung Pakai chu akihahsel’in, “In atama tam ahomkeova uma, In len tah tah le in hoitah tah jouse jong Acheng ding beiya hung umsoh ding ahi.
Leiset masom lhingset lengpileiyin jong Alousoh bath khat bep bou apensah ding, Chule muchi homer khat chun aga ephah khatbou asosah ding ahi” ati.
Ohe ada ahiuve khamna thei don dinga Jingpi tah a thouji mi ho, Jutwijin achup hel kahseuva Jankhang khang geiya jantoute!

Amahon golvah abol tenguva din semjang le selangdah jong aneiyun, Tumging le theile, chule lengpitwi jong aneiyui; Pakai natoh athilbol jouse Khohsah na anei pouvin, Akhutsoh thilsem ho jong amupha pouve.
Hetna lhahsam jeh-in Kamite sohchangin acheuvin, Jabol tah tah a aneiyu miho jong Gilkel’in athigam tauve; Amiteu jong abonchauvin Dangchah-in akihulgo gamtauve.

Hijeh chun noimigam jengin jong Aduchan alol-hom thamhel hol’in a don Chule akam jong vetngam louvin akadah hei huiye, Jerusalem milen milalte leh mipi ho abonchan, Amaho le amaho kichoisang khosung mipi ho gei geiyin, Akijotsuh-uvin akitol lhatauve.
Mihem akison kunin, miho akisu nemsoh tai, Chule mi kiletsah te jeng jong amit hau anguitai;
Ahin thaneipen Pakai chu thudih-in akichoi sangin, Chule Pathen theng chu ama le ama adih-in akiphongtai.
Chuteng kelngoite hamhing lah a lha leuvin tin, Khogem lah a bong thaotah tah ho le kelngoi noute lha le ding ahiuve.
Ohe ada ahiuve, themmona bola jouthua kikan ho, Kangtalaiyin khaojang tampi akai banga chonset kaikhomte;
Hita seiya, “Keiho muthei dingin kino loi hen lang Atoh ding chu tong loi hen, Israel dinga Mithengpa ngaito chu hung nailoi hen lang, Keihon kahet theina dinguvin hung lhung hen,” ti ho.
Ohe ada ahiuve, thilpha lou thilpha hisah-a Thilpha thilse hisah ho; Muthim khovah hisah-a, Khovah muthim hisah ho; Akha alhum hisah a, Alhum joh akha hisah ho!
Ohe ada ahiuve, amitvet’a achangseh a kichihsah a, Amaiput danuva aching athema kigelte!
Ohe ada ahiuve, judon hat’a, Khamna thei don ding kihalpon tho ho;
Themmona jong nehguh kilah-a phil mang jia, Themmona beite themna suh mang peh te!

Hichejeh a chu louchul lah-a changkung meiyin akahvam tobang leh, Hamgo meilhum sunga akileogep jeng banga khu Amaho chu abul abalin hung mon intin, Apah hoiyu jong leivuiya hung leng mang ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile amahon thaneipen Pakai danthu apai mangun, Israel dinga Mithengpa thusei donlouvin aumtauve.

Hijeh chun amite chunga Pakai lunghan ahung deujah jengin, Chule amite dounan akhut alamin amaho chu adengtai; Hichun molsang jouse akiling soh hel’in, Mithi long jong kholai dunga sel-eh lhuh-in akilhui; Hichengse jeh hin Pakai lunghan la Akinung tol mang deh pon, Akhut chu tuchan geiyin jong Lapsan adom jing jengin ahi.
Aman gamla tah a cheng mite kouna a khut ajah a, Leiset kolkim vel’ a kithong dia khutkoi amut ding ahi; Hijeh chun vetan, Kinloi tah leh mangang tah-in ahung lhunge!
Koimacha athachol pon akipal lhu jong koima aumpoi; Koima cha alhua aihmua jong aumpon, Taiya kigah a pon khatbeh jong akilhamkang aum hih-in. Kengchot khao khatcha jong akibot tan aumpoi;
Athalpi jouse la ahem theiyin, Athalpi abonchan kamsa ahitai; Asakolte tin ho jong meituh songtoh abangin, Akangtalai ginu jong chimpei gintoh abange.
Apen gin jong sakei bahkai kisen gin abangin, Sakei bahkai pi noute bangin akisen jin ahi; Angih del dul’in aneh ding sa hing akimat jin, Akilhoh tengleh koimachan achudoh jou ji poi.

Hiche nikho chuleh ama gamsunga hung ngih del dul’in tin, Twikhanglen kidil gin bang hiding ahi; Chutengleh khattouvin gamsung gah ve-leh, Vetan mu thimin tin lung hesoh um ding, Khovah jeng jong chu Meilhang ho chun ale thim jeng ding ahi.
Uzzi’ah lengpa thi kum chun keiman Pakai laltouna chunga sang tah a atouva, akikhansang kanamun, alalpon chu houin sung anadim set’e.
Ama chunga chun seraphimte ana dinguvin, khat khat’in lhaving gup cheh aneiyuvin, alhaving nin amai akhun, alhaving ni man akengphang te ni akhun, alhaving nin apansan alenguve.
@@Chuin seraphim khat chun seraphim khat ma chu akouvin ajah a, “Atheng, Atheng, Atheng kiti chu thaneipen Pakai ahin, Leiset pumpi hi ama loupina adimsoh e,” ati.
Hichun ahinkoupa ogina konin Houin kot bulpi jouse akiling soh tan, houin chu meikhu adimset tai.

Chuphat’in keiman, “Ohe ada kahitai! Ijeh-inem itile keima amangthah kahitai; ajeh chu keima mi kamtheng lou kahin, mi kamthengloute jalah a cheng kha kahiye; ajeh chu kamit te nin lengpa thaneipen Pakai chu amutai !” kati.
Hichun seraphim ho lah a konin khat chu kahenga ahung lengin akhut’a chun maicham phunga kona chaiche a ahinche doh mei-al ahinchoiye.
Chuin kakam ahinde khan aseiye, “Ven, hiche hin nanephu teni a tong kha tan, nathemmona akila mangtai, chule nachonset aki ngaidam tai,” ati.
Hichun Pakai oginin hita asei keiman kajai, “Koiham keiman kasol ding mi chu, chule koipen ham keiho dinga che ding mi chu?” ati. Chuin ken jong, “Keima kaum nai, neisolin!” kati.
@@Chuphat’in aman, Chen lang hiche mite jah a hin gaseiyin, ‘Ngai ngaiyuvin lang hekhen theilou hel’in um’un Mu jong mu uvin lang, Pho chenthei louhel’in umun’, gatin.

Hiche mite lungthim hi thaovin tomsahin lang, Anau ngonsah soh tan; Amit’u kisin mangsah-in; Achutilouva ahile amit’a amu’uva, Anakhanga ajah diu, Alungthima ahetkhen’uva Chutengleh hung kite kit’uva Adamsah ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun ken jong “Vo Pakai itih chan geiyin em?” katileh, Aman jong, “Khopi jouse acheng beiya ahomkeo ahitoh kah, In jouse mihem beiya auma agam hi akida lhah thip hel kah;
Pakaiyin mite gamlatah a atolmang a, Gam lailung mun tamtah akeova aumdoh kahsen.

Gam sunga mi som lah a khat umden jongleh kavam kit ding, Hiche jeng jong chu dol thing ham, gangpi thing ham banga Akiphuh lhuh teng jongleh Akungbul kitungden tobang ahikahsea ding ahi,” ati. Akungbul chu muchi theng chu ahi.
Judah lengpa Uzzi’ah chapa Jotham chapa Ahaz lal laiyin Syria lengpa Rezin le Israel lengpa Remali’ah chapa Pekah chu Jerusalem douna galbol din ahung kontou lhonin, ahivangin anadeh jou lhonpoi.
David insung jah a akiseipeh a, “Syria chu E’phraim toh apangkhom tai,” akiti phat’in ama jong amite jong alung thimu khohui masanga thing kihot lingsoh bangin, aling laosoh tauve.
Hichun Pakaiyin Isaiah jah a, “Nangleh nachapa She’ar-jashub chu ponsoppa loulama twikul sahnungjo twilam monga khun Ahaz toh kimuto din potdoh lhon temin.
chuteng Ahazjah a, “Kigingphan, umthim beh-in, kicha hih-in Remali’ah chapa le Rezin toh chule mite khubanga Syria alungsatnau hol kilhut al-leng lung tobang khu nalungthimin tijatnan neihih hel’in.
Ajeh chu Syria mite leh E’phraim apang khomin, chule Remali’ah chapa geiyin nangma dounan thil gilou angai-touvin hitin aseiyui,
“Judah gam dounan kitoltouvu hite, chujongleh gakisatpiu tin gajouvu hite chutengleh agamsunga khun Ta’be-el chapa hi lengin gatungu tin pansah u hite,” tia aseivanguvin,
@@Pakai Pathen chun hitin aseiye, ‘Dingjou deh lou ding, Chule guilhung lou ding ahi.
Ajeh chu Syria khopi lenpen aluchang Damascus ahin, Chule Damascus khopia alamkai aluchang chu Rezin ahi. Kum somgup le kum nga sunga E’phraim mite kivocheh soh diu nam khat’a umthei lou diu ahitai.
Chule E’phraim mi khopi lenpen aluchang chu Samar’ia ahin, Samar’ia khopi lamkai aluchang chu Remali’ah chapa ahi. Nangman natahsan louva ahileh Nakichen detsah louhel ding ahi,’ ati gatin,” ati.
Chujouvin Pakai chun Ahaz henga thu ahinsei kit’in hitin aseiye,
“Noimigam chana thuh hihen lang vanchung sana sang hijongle Pakai na-Pathen koma melchihna khat kithumin.” ati.
Ahinla Ahaz chun, “Keiman melchihna kathuma Pakai chu kapatep lou ding ahi.” atitai.
Hijeh chun aman jong, “Ngai temuvin Vo David insung mite! Mihem suhchol jong hi mai maiya nageluva nanghon ka-Pathen jeng jong thacholsah dinga nagot’u hitam?
Hichejeh a chu Pakai ama mong mongin melchihna khat nahin peh dingu ahi. Vetan, nu-ngah khat agaiyin chapa khat ahin ding ahi, ama chu amin Immanuel kiti ding ahi.
Ama chun thilse ahot bola thilpha kilhenje ahet tengle bongnoi ha leh khoiyu bou aneh ding ahi.
Naosen chun thilse hot bola thilpha kilhenje ahetdoh kah-a hibanga naginuva amasang lhona tikihot hot’a naumu hiche leng teni hin agam hi adalhah thipdel lhon ding ahitai.
Pakaiyin nangma le namite chung chule napa insung mite chunga phat khat alhunsah ding hitobang nikho hi E’phraim miten Judah adalhah niuva pat hung lhung khalou lai hel ahi-Assyria lengpa” ati.
Hiche nikhole chun Pakaiyin Egypt vadung twikun dunga cheng thousi mutkhomin tin, Assyria gamsunga cheng khoipi jouse jong agama cheng dia akoukhom ding ahi.
Hiche ho chu aboncha komtong thuh lai laiya, songpi pohkhi kah dunga jong, saichou ling lah lah a chule hamhing lah lah a hung cheng ding ahiuve.
Hiche nikho le chun Pakaiyin luipi gala min akithalah pa leh Assyria lengte chu samchem a ajangsam avochaipeh a akeng phang mul geiya bahchea achejol ding, akhamul geiya ahinvotol jeng ding ahi.
Hiche nikho le chun mi pasal khat’in bong lagol khat le kelngoi ni bou avul jou ding,
ahivanga hiche teni hi anoitwi thalhing lheh ding ahin, hijeh a chu amapan bongnoi ha jeng aneh ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh agamsunga kidalha chan chun bongnoi ha le khoiju jeng aneh dingu ahi.
Hiche nikho le chun dangka shekel sang khat cheng man lengpigui kena mun jousea ling le khao jeng keh ding ahi.
Hikom dunga chu mihon thalpi le thalchang akichoiyuva gam lenna anei diu ahi, ajeh chu agamsung pumpi chu ling le khao dimset ding ahitai;
thinglhang gamsung ngalbu nem lah jeng jong chu ling le khao ginna navalut ngam lou dingu ahi; hiche mun chu gancha lhatna gam hungsoh doh a, kelngoite kinopsaina mun hiding ahi.
Pakai chun kajah a, “Songpheng lentah khat kilah-in lang achunga chun mipi hetthei lekhajem in, ‘Ma’hershal’al-hash’-baz’ atin jihdoh temin,” eiti.
Hichun keiman thulah theidol tah hettohsah mi thempu Uri’ah le Zechari’ah kei dinga pang dingin kaneiye.
Hichun keima themgaonu henga kaga lut’in ahileh amanu ahung gaiyin chapa khat ahin hingtai. Chuphat’in Pakai chun kajah a, “Ama min hi “Ma’her-shal’alhash’baz sah-in;
ijeh-inem itile naosen chun ‘Hepa, Henu’ tije ahet masanga Damascus haona le Samari’a thilchom dohsa chengse chu Assyria masanga kipo mang ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin kajah a thu ahinsei kit’in hitin aseiye.
“Ipijeh-inem itileh hiche mite hin Shilo’ah a twi long del del ho adeimo jeh-u leh Rezin le Ramali’ah chapa koma akiho lhul jeng nauva hin,

hichejeh tah hin vetan, Pakaiyin amaho douna hat tah le tamtah luipi dung twi jouse le Assyria lengpa leh aloupina aboncha ahin lonvuhsah ding ahin, chutengle atwilam jouse hung dimtul tula atwikul jouse achup soh hel ding,
chule Judah gamsunga jong long lut’a kitol tola achup tel tul ding, ngong geiya long ding alhaving kijaldoh teni chun nagamsung availam akho khongsoh ding ahiye, O Immanuel!” ati.
Mitin mi tang kivogoi goiyuvin lang lung thoisah-uvin, Gamla tah a uim hon jong nanakhang hinsung temuvin; Natai kigah cheh-uvin lang lung thoiyuvin; Natai kigah cheh-uvin lang lung thoiyuvin.
Lung gelkhom khom jong leu chun pannabei hintin, Kihou hou jong leu chun sohdoh lou ding ahi, ajeh chu Pathen keiho toh apangkhome.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai chun aban thahat chun eituh-in kajah a hi tin aseiyin chule hiche mite lamlhah kajui louna dingin nasatah-in eigih-in hitin aseiye,
“Hiche miten kidemna ahi, tia asei jouse chu kidem nan seidauvin lang, akichat chan kichat dauvin chule tijat nan neidauvin.
Thaneipen Pakai ama chubou athenga naboluva, natijatpi dingu chu amabou hi ding ahi.
Chuteng ama chu munthenga hung panga, kipalna song hi ding, chule Israel insung teni dinga jong kipalna songpia hung panga, Jerusalema chengte dinga thang le pela hung pang ding ahi.
Hiche chunga chu mi tamtah hung kipal lhu-uva, akiselhuh tengule kitat bong gamuva, thanga oh soh keiyuva kimandoh soh ding ahiuve,” ati.
Hettohsahna hi geldoh-in lang kasei juite lah a hiche danthu hi mohor namden tan.
Kenvang Jacob insunga amai selmangpa Pakai chu ngah jinging ting, ama jenga kinem inge.
Vetan, kei le Pakaiyin eipeh kachate hi Israel sunga dinga Zion molsanga chengpa thaneipen Pakaiya hung kon melchihna le mukhah lou thil kidang kahiuve.

Ijeh-inem itileh amahon najah-uva, “Doithem ho le mitphel doi themho, phuisam sama doi thu sei sei ho chu gadonguvin,” atiu chu, mipin a-Pathen adohjoh lou ding ham? Kon mihing ho khela mi thi ho adohjoh ding ham?
Danthu le hettohsahna joh doh ding ahibove! Amahon hiche thu hi sei jongu leh hichea chun khovah aumpoi.
Aman lung hesoh tah le gilkel tah a asung ahin jotpa a chule hita chu agil ahung kel tengle acham chama hung kiphina alengpa le a-Pathen ahin gaosap ding, chule hung vandah ding ahi;
leiset lang ahinvet jongle vetan, lung hesoh le muthim jeng, lung gima lung ngui chet’a um ding; muthim lhangkhal lah-a ama chu kileh lut ding ahiye.

Amavang masang laiya aman ana gaosapsa Zeb’ulun gam le Naph’tali gam lung gima anaum tasa chu lung nguiya hung umlou ding, khonung tengle aman ahin loupi sah diug ahi; Jordan gala twikhanglen lampi namtin vaipi Galilee.
Muthim lah a vah le miten Khovah loupi amutauve; Muthim lhang khal jing lah a cheng te chu Achunguva loupi tah-in kho ahungvah tai.
Nangman namtin vaipi napunsah-in, Agolnop’u jong napunsah tai. Nangma angsunga chang at laiya kipana bang le Mihon thil kichomdoh akihop’uva akipa banguvin akipah tauve.
Ijeh inem itile Mid’ian nikhoa bang chun Nangman apohgih namkol le aput tollaijol jong naheh bongin, Abol gentheipa tenggol jong Naheboh peh tan ahi.
Ajeh chu galmun japi lah a kijot gal hang ho kengkoh jouse ahin. Thisan bena ponsil jouse ahin meiya kigouvam ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile eiho dingin naosen khat apengin, Chapa khat eikipeuve; Alengkouva vaipohna apun, Chule amin jong “Thumop them kidang tah, thanei tah Pathen, Tonsot mipa, chamna leng chapa,” akiti.

Avaipohna le chamna angahna beiya khangtou ding, David lenggam le laltouna chunga touva, Aphutdet ding le adih a thu tana tuhdet jing dinga, Tua pat atonsot geiya tou jing ding ahi. Thaneipen Pakai tompan nan hiche hi aboldoh ding ahi.
Pakaiyin Jacob dounan thu ahin thot’in, Hichu Israel chunga hung chu ding ahi.
Chutengle mipin aboncha ahet dingu ahi, E’phraim le Samar’ia chengte ahiuvin, Lungthima kiletsah tah le hoitho tah a Hitobanga seiya,
“Cheh in chim lha jongle Keihon song kikhengjol ho hin in kisah-uving ting, Theipi phung ho kiphuh lhu jongle Hiche ho khela chu cedar thing ho kakiphu dingu ahi,” ti ho.
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Rezin kidoupite ama dou dingin ahin tildoh-in, Amapa melmah te chu ahin phin lunghange.
Niso lama Syria mite apangin nilhum lama Philistine te apangin, Kamhom hel holin Israel chu avallhum tauve. Hicheng sea hin alunghan adam thei deh pon, Chule akhut alam jing jeng nalaiye.
Chule mipi jong abolgim-pau henga ache pouvin. Chujongle Thaneipen Pakaijong ahol pouve.
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Israela konin alu le ameikung asat lhan, Lusu bah le pumpeng jong nikhat sungin asat lhan;
Upa le ja um mi chu aluchang ahin, Thujousei themgao chu ameikung ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile hiche mite lamkaiho hin amaho apui manguvin, Hijeh chun alamkaipeh chengseu jong hi abahgamu ahitai.

Chuti ahijeh-in akhangdongteu chunga jong Pakai akipah thanom pon; Achagateu leh ameithaite chunga jong avoujang ana poi; Ijeh-inem itile amichang cheh hin Pathen hepha loute thil gilou bol jeng ahiuvin, Apaodoh jousen ngol thu aseiye. Hichengsea hin ama lunghan adamthei deh pon, Chule akhut alam jing jeng nalaiye.
Ajeh chu gitlouna hi meika bangin ahung ka jin, Ling le khao ho jeng jong akavam jie; Gamlah a gamtah lai laiya ahung kongdoh jin, Chung lama meikhu alom lomin ahung kijeldoh jin ahi.
Thaneipen Pakai lungsatnaa konin Gam leiset hi akavam tan, Mipi jong hi meithing tidinga kikoi bang bang ahiuvin; Pasal khat chan jong asopipa adip dampi poi.
Akhut jetlam in amai tho jeng nan, ahivangin agilkel nalaiye; A veilangin jong anen, ahivangin aoiya deh sam pouve; Pasala pasal jousen, Asopipa tahsa anetauve.
Manas’seh chun E’phraim, E’phraim chun Manas’seh; Apang khom lhonin Judah adou lhone. Hichengse hin ama lunghan adam thei deh pon. Chule akhut alam jing jeng nalaiye.
Ohe ada ahiuve, kigahna phalouva kigah te; Chule bolgentheina dinga lekha kisut sut jengte;
Tahlel te thu adih a tanpeh louva, Kamite chan ding lom lah peh ho, Meithaiho thil choma kichom goa, Paloute nehgam dinga go ho!
Talen mat nikhoa chu ipipen nabol dingu hiya, Gamla tah a kona hung kitol huise lah a chu ipi nabol dingu ham? Napanpi dinguva koipen koma najamlut’uva, Nagou jouse chu hoilama nadalhah dingu hitam?
Imacha aumden aum tapoi, songkul lut ho lah a sot lut dingle Tolthi ho lah a lhulham ding bep aume. Hichengsea hin ama lunghan adamthei deh pon, Chule akhut alam jing jeng nalaiye.
Vo Assyria, keima lunghan tollai jol, Kalungsatna tenggol!

Pathen hephalou nam mite dou nan keiman Assyria kasolin, Kalungsatna mite dou dingin thu kapei; Thilkeo kichom dingle thahat sana thil kilah ding, Hiche ho chu kholai dunga bonlhoh lah a chonlut dingin.
Ahivangin aman hitia boldin ago pon, Alung thimin jong hitin angaito poi; Ijeh-inem itile alungsunga chun, Namtin vaipi tamtah suhmang dingin agotai;
Ijeh ham itile aman aseiye, “Ka gallamkai ho abonchauva leng jeng hilou hiuvam?
Calno kho chu Car’chemish kho tobang hilou hiya, Hamath kho jong Arpad kho tobang hilou ham? Samar’ia kho jong chu Damascus kho tobang hilou ham?
Kakhut hin Jerusalem le Samar’ia sanga lenjo jo Milim kilhajol jeng lenggam ho jong chu asophah ahin,
Keiman Samar’ia kho le amilimdoi ho kabol banga chu Jerusalem le amilimdoi ho kabol lou ding ham?” ati.
Pakaiyin Zion molsang chungle Jerusalem chunga atoh ding chan atuh jousoh tengle Assyria lengpa kithang at’ a ahoitho na leh akiletsah hamhoithona jeh-a talen amatsah ding ahi.

@@Ijeh-inem itile aman aseiye. “Kahan thahat’in hiche hi kabol tan, Kachihna hin hetkhenna kaneiye, Keiman mitin vaipi gamgi jouse kaphe lhan, Athil kholna jouseu jong kachom ngimsoh tai; Laltouna a tou te jong Bongchal bangin kakai lhu jin ahi.

Mitin vaipi haona chengse chu Kakhut hin vabu maiyin amaidoh tai; Vapin adalhahsa vatui kiloh khom bangin Keiman leiset pumpi kachom khom soh keitai; Hijeh chun alhaving kithingsa jong aumpon, Apaopoh a le ahusa jong aumpoi,” ati.

Heicha chu athing chenpa chunga kiletsah ngaiya, Ahiloule thing atna chu athing atpa chunga kichoian ngaiyam? Molin adomkang pa akalkang bangle Tenggolin thing hiloubeh adom sangpa aphoh kang banga chu!
Hijeh a chu Pakai thaneipen Yahweh chun Agal hang mihatte lah a gamna natset ahin lansah ding, Aloupina noiya meikong banga Akong khat hung kitungdoh jeng ding ahi.
Israel meivah chu meikong hungsoh doh-in tin, Amithengpa chu meikouje jua hung pang ding ahi; Chuteng nikhat sunga Atingle akhao jouse avallhuma akahvam ding ahi.
Agamsung gammang loupi tah le agam gapha lai jeng jong Pakaiyin lhagao le tahsa agoma asuh manga, Miveise manthah banga Mangthah jeng ding ahi.
Agammang thing hingdoh chu chapangin lekha ajih khop beh lhomcha hiding ahi.

Hiche nikhole chun hung hiti ding ahi: Israel mi amoh chengse le Jacob insung mi ahingdoh chengse chu asugampau chunga hung ki-ngai louhel ding, Pakai Israel Mithengpa chung joh a dettah a hung ki-ngaijo ding ahiuve.
Amoh cheng, Jacob mi amoh cheng chu Hat chungnung Pathen henga hung kile kit ding ahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itile namite Israel chu twikhanglen neldi jat aphah vanguvin alah a amoh cheng chubou hung kilekit ding ahi. Manthahna chu akitepsa ahitan, adih chun achupsoh ahitai.
Ajeh chu akitepna bang banga Pakai thaneipen Yahweh chun leiset pumpi jalah tah-a akikhonna hel ahinbol ding ahiye.
Hichejeh chun Pakai thaneipen Yahweh-in hitin aseiye, “Vo Ziona cheng kamite, Egypt miten nabol banguva Assyria miten mollhon le tenggola naden tengule kicha hih heluvin.
Ijeh-inem itile kalunghanna hi hung beivah ding ahitan, hitengle chun kalung sat na hi amaho chunga hungle chuh ding ahi.

Ajeh chu thaneipen Pakaiyin Oreb songpi phunga Midi’an mite aden banga chu, amaho douna mol ahin lap ding, chutta chu amoljol twikhanglen chunga hung ki jama, Egypt gama abol banga ahindop sang ding ahi.
Hiche nikhole chun hiti ding ahi, ama pohgih chu nangma lengkouva kona kidom lha a, chule anamkol jengjong na-ngong changa kona kihehbal ding ahiye.” ati.
Ai’ath a ahungin, Rimmon ahung galkaitai; Migron ahin jotpan, Michmash a chun athilkeo akoiye;
Gal langa agalkaiyuvin, Geba khoa chun ajan-geh khovah tauve; Ramah kho chu akitihot tan, Saul kho Gib’e-ah mite chu ajamtai.
Vo Gallim khosung chanu, othongin kap’in! Ngaitemin Vo La’ishah kho! Hiche nu hi donbut temin Vo An’athoth!
Madme’nah kho mi la ajam mang ahitan, Gebim khoa chengte jong kihinso thei thei nan ajamtauve.
Tuni gei hin Nob khoa nichong nalai jintin, Aman, Zion molsang chanu, Jerusalema Gib’e-ah kho chu Akhut tum ajel khum ding ahi.
Vetan, Pakai thaneipen Yahweh chun Abah jouse tijat umtah thahat neiya ahinsat lhah ding ahin, Adung sang jong chu kisat muiya, Asang sang chu kiloi kun ding ahi.
Gammang thim cheh chuh jong aman heicha atuh chaiya, Lebanon jong aminthanpi thing puma hung lhulham ding ahi.
Jesse phung bula konin atoi khat hung dondoh intin, Abulbal dunga kona abah khat hung jamdoh ding ahi.
Ama chunga Pakai Lhagao hung pansantin, Chihna le hetkhenna Lhagao, Thumop them le thahatna Lhagao, Hetna le Pakai ginna Lhagao ahi.
Chule ama chu Pakai ginna jenga bou kipah ding ahi. Aman mit vet mai maiya thu atan lou ding, Ana ajah phah mai mai jeh a Thu chaina anei louhel ding ahi.

Mivaichate thu chu adih jenga atanpeh ding, Leiset’a alungnemte chu kitoh tah a thu atanpeh ding ahi; Ajeh chu akamsung soh moljola chu leiset aden ding, Chule mi gilou chu akamsungsoh ahusa a atha ding ahi.
Adih chu ama dingin akonggah khao vin hung pangin tin, Chule kitahna chu ataigahna hungpang ding ahi.
Kamkei le kelngoinou hung geh khomin tin, Kei-ahsi le kelnoute hung kol khom ding ahiuve; Bongnou le sakei jeng jong kol khoma, Chapang neo khat’in aboncha akaihoile dingu ahi.
Bongpi le savom hung lha khomin tin, Anoute lhon jong hung kol khom ding; Chule Sakei jengin jong bongchal banga Changpol ahin neh jeng ding ahi.
Naosen noichep pet jong gul kohom geiya hung kichema, Noichep lai naosen chun gulse kosung asolut ding ahi.
Keima molsang theng chunga chu Kisukha lou diu, kisumang lou ding ahiuve; Ijeh-inem itile twikhanglen twipin achupsoh banga Leiset hi Pakai hetna hung dimset ding ahiye.
Hiche nikho le chun Jesse bulbal chu mitin dinga ponlap’a hung kitung ding, amabou chu namtin vaipin ahin holsoh keiyuva, chule ama ngahmun chu hung loupi lheh jeng ding ahi.

Hiche nikhole chun Pakaiyin dalhah a um amite amoh chengse Assyria gama kon, Egypt gama kon, Pathros gama kon, Ethiopia gama kon, Elam gama kon, Shinar gama kon, Hamath gama kon chule twikhanglen pang dunga kona lokhomna dinga akhut anivei channa ahin lhan ding ahi.
Aman namtin vaipi dinga ponlap khat ahin tundoh a, Israel lah a paidoh a umsa jouse jong ahin khop khom ding; Leiset ning lia kona Judah mi kithecheh ho chu Ahin lokhom soh kei ding ahi.
E’phraim thangsetna chu kitolmanga, Judah hutot mite chu sat lhah-a um ding ahiuve; E’phraim in jong Judah athangset peh lou ding, Judah jong chun E’phraim ahutot tho lou ding ahi.
Nilhum langa Philistine te lengkou adelnem uva, Chule pangkhom uva niso lam mite achom dingu ahi. Amahon Edom le Moab douna akhut ahin lhah diu, Amon mite jeng jong athuva hung nung ding ahi.

Chutengle Pakaiyin Egypt twikhanglen ningkoi chu asuh mang hel ding; Luipi chung vuma akhut ahinjap’a Huipi savevu a chu vadung sagi chu ahin den ding; Chuteng aman kengchot kot louva ajotdoh sah jeng ding ahi.
Chujongle amite akidalha amoh chengse dinga chu Assyria gama kona lamlen hung kilhung ding ahi! Egypt gama kona ahung kitoldoh nikhouva Israel dia aum banga umding ahi.
Hiche nikho le chun nangman nasei ding ahi, “O Pakai, keiman nangma vahchoi yinge, Ajeh chu nangman neina lunghan jongle chun Nalunghan akitol mang tan, Chujongle nangman nei lhamon tai.

“Vetan, Pathen chu kei dia huhhingna ahin, Keiman katahsana, gin kanei lou ding ahi! Ajeh chu kahatna le ka la-ngei chu Pakai kiti Pathen amabou ahiye. Ama chu kei dingin Huhhingna asohdoh tai,” nati ding ahi.
@@Nanghon kipah pum puma huhhingna twikhuh a kona twi nakithal uva,
chule hiche nikho le chun nasei dingu ahi, “Pakai chu thangvah-uvin lang Aminin taovun! Namtin vaipi lah-a athilbol ho hi hetsah-uvin lang, Ama min hi choiat’in aumtai, tin phongjal uvin.
“Tumging to thon Pakai ya la sauvin, Ajeh chu aman loupi tah-in thil aboltai! Leiset pumpi chunga hin Hiche hi hetdoh-in um hen!
Vo Zion a chengnu, samin kipah-in la san! Ajeh chu nalailunga aloupi chu Israel Mithengpa ahi,” tiuvin.
Amoz chapa Isaiah-in Babylon chung chang thudola mu aneiya themgao thusei chu:
Lhang chaivet vut chungvuma ponlap khat ahung kitungdoh-in, Hiche ho jah a khun O sangtah-in seipeh-uvin! Milen milalte kelkot phung dunga ahung lutna dinguvin Amaho chengse khu khut’in jap’uvin.
Keitah tah-in jong kathenso cheng chu thu kapen, Kalunghanna phongdoh dingin kamihatte kakou khomtai! Kamite kiletsah tah a Kichoisang te chu!
Japi nasatah husa banga molsang chung dunga ogin ki thong pi khu! Namtin vaipi kikhoma lenggam jouse ogin kithongpi khu! Thaneipen Pakai chun Galmuna pang dingin sepai hon khat agoltoh-e.
Hiche ho chu gamla tah a kon Van mong kimvela hung kon, Pakai le alung satna a amanchahte Leiset pumpi sumang ding ahiuve.
Kap’uvin, ijeh-inem itile Pakai nikho anaiye! Hat chungnunga kona manthahna hung lhung banga hung lhung ding ahi.
Hichejeh a chu khut jouse hung ngoiya, Mitin lung sung hung nguisoh ding!

Abonchauva hung lung thoi soh ding ahiuve. Natna le lung gimnan lhun denuvin tin, Numei naoso nat thoh banga athoh gim dingu ahi. Atinaje kimah hela Khat le khat kiveto jeng dingu, Lung donga amaiyu amlet lut jeng ding ahi.
Vetan, Pakai nikho chu ahung lhungin, Anat’a nasa, lung satna le lung dammona dim set; Leiset hi phet ngim hel ding leh Asunga chonsete sumang soh ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile vana ahsi ho leh a ahsi lungthu ho jong Avah-u thim ding ahitan, Nisa jong ahung sodoh doh le thim jeng ding ahin, Chule lha jeng jong avah hung thim ding ahi.
Keiman vannoi hi agitlou jeh-a talen kapeh ding, Chule mi giloute athemmona jala talen kapeh ding ahi! Mi kiletsah te kiletsahna kasuh beiya, Khohsahna neiloute hoitho na kasuh nem ding ahi.
Sana manlu tah sang, Ophir sana sanga jong Keiman mihem manlujoa ka-umsah ding ahi.
Hichejeh a chu thaneipen Pakai lungsatna Alunghanna nasatah nikho chuleh Keiman van jouse kaho-lingsoh ding, Leiset jong aki-ngapna mun kilongsoh ding ahi.
Chuteng sakhi kivaidoh bang leh Ahoikhom ding beihel kelngoi banga, Mitin amite henga kihei soh ding; Mitin agamsung cheh a jamlut ding ahi.
Koi hile akimudoh chan chu kidot kam hel hel ding, Akimandoh chan chu chemjama kisat lum lum ding ahi.
Chule amitmu tah-uva achasen jouseu kichil ngema, Ain jouseu jong kichom ngima, ajiu numei ho nopsahna min abol thang ding ahi.
Neihin vetemin, dangka deiloute, sana jong kipapi loute Mede mite chu amaho dou dingin kahin tildoh-e.
Ama ho thalpi chang chun gollhang ho hinkap lih-intin, Naobu sung pengdoh ho chunga hepina ahin neilou dingu, Amit muva jong Chapangsen lainatpina aneilou hel dingu ahi.
Ahinla Babylon kiti lenggam jouse kiloupi sah na, Chalde’a mite thupina le kiletsahna Pathenin abungbua alekhup tengleh Sodom le Gomor’rah tobang hung hiding ahiye.

Aitih chan geiya jong kinunglo kit louhel ding, Akhang khanga jong chenna a kinei louhel ding ahi! Arab mi khat chan jong hikoma chu ponbuh ahinson lou ding, Kelngoi chingho khat chan jong hikoma chu kelngoi akolsah lou ding ahi.
Hikom chu gamsa hon kolna aneidiu, Chule inho jong ganhing aojen jun ho hung dimset’a; Hikoma chu va-ngongsang ho hung chenguva, Lhomite hung lam ding ahiuve.
Intingvum dunga chun lutnu ho hung hamin tin, Mun nom lai jousea ngei ho hung ham ding ahin; Hiche phat ding hi ahung nai lheh jeng tan, Anikho ding jong kinomsot louhel ding ahiye.
Pakaiyin Jacob chu avoujang natpeh ding, Israel hi ahinlhen kit’a chutengle agamsung uva achensah ding, gamchom miten jong hinjop’uvin tin Jacob insung mia hung beh chah ding ahiuve.

Mitinin Israelte ahin puiyuva agamsung ma ma ahinlhut dingu, chutengle Israel insung min midang ho chu Pakai gamsunga soh pasal le soh numeiya avul dingu, soh a anakaiho chu, soh a alekaiyuva, abol gentheiyuva pangho chunga vai ahom dingu ahi.
Natna le lelna chule hahsa a nakitohsah mitea kona Pakaiyin choldona napeh nikho le chun,
@@nangman Babylon lengpa douna hiche thuchih hi napoh doh a nasei ding ahi. “I-atileh mi hutotpa umthima hita a, Mibol gentheinu kho ngaiya hitam!
Pakaiyin mi giloute moljol aheh bong tan, Vaihompa tenggol aheh bong tai.
Lungsat teng mitin denna kineiya, lunghan teng namtin vaipi chunga vaihomna kimang chu,
Leiset pumpi akicholdon athip dele, Kipah-in aojah-uvin la asatauve.
Nachunga chah thing ho jong akipah uvin, Lebanon a cedar thing hon jong, ‘Nangma nakisuh lhah kalse Keiho phuh lhu ding koimacha ahung tapoi,’ atiuve.

Nangma nahung tengle nalamto dingin Noilama noimigam jong akitildoh jin ahi, Nangma salam dingin nisalim jouse jong achoh thou jin! Leiset pumpi lamkaite jong achoh thou soh tai! Namtin vaipi lengho jouse jong chu Ataltou nauva konin achoh thouve.
Abonchauva ahin donbut’uva najah a asei dingu, ‘Nang jong keiho bangin nalhasam lheh tan, Keiho bang bang nahitai!’ Ati dingu ahi.
Nalukhuh sangle naselangdah ho gin jong noimigama akileh lhan, Najalkhun noiya thanjangte aumuvin, Lungtol ho chu Ponkhu bangin nakikhu khume.
“Vo sunlai ahsi, khovah chapa! Idinga vana kona hung pullha nahiya, Namtin vaipi sunema pang nangma Itidola leiset’a hung kisat lha nahi hitam!
Nangman nalungthim in naseiyin, ‘Keima Pathen ahsite chunglam Vana kaltou ving ting, Kalaltouna chung sanga kidong kate! Nisolam gamla tah a Houbung kikhopna molsanga touvinge!
Meilhangho chung vuma kaldoh ingting, Hat chungnung penpa bangin kisem inge,’ nati.
Ahinla noimigam geiyin nakison lhan, Khuh sunga kotong thuh lai nakigeitan ahi.
Namupha chanin namit tal intin, Nachung chang thu agel khoh a, ‘Hiche mihempa hi ham, leiset hot linga, Lenggam jouse toh lingsoh hel pa,
Vannoi hi nelgam hisah jenga, Akhopi ho jong leh khup jengpa; Asoh chang ho inlama kitesah kit louhel pa chu,’ Ati dingu ahi.
Namtin vaipia lengho chu toupi tah-in Alhankhuh cheh a akijamuvin!

Ahinla nangma lhan phunga konin paidoh-in naumin, Kidah umtah aphat louva peng bangin Chemjama kithat ho bangin nakitomjol tan ahi! Khuh sunga song lah a kumlha ho banga, Mithisa keng chotpha kineiji, Song lhana kivui ho bang khun naumtai.
Hiche ho toh nakivui tha louding ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nangman nagam nasu mangin, Namite jeng jong chemjamin nathat tai. “Ohe, thil gilou bol miho chilhah mite kimin phah kit hih hel hen!
Apateu themmona jalin achapate hi tha dingin gon, Achutiloule hung ding doh-uvin tin leiset chunga khopi asah dimsoh diu ahi,” nati ding ahi.
Thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Amaho dou dinga kakipat ding, Babylon a kona aminu jong athimoh chengse jong, ason achilhah te acha anao kasat lhah ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin;
keiman amun jeng jong saphu ho chenna muna kasem ding, twikul jeng kahisah a, manthahna muntheh a katheh ngim ding ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
Thaneipen Pakai chu akihahselin, aseiye; “Keiman kagonsa bang banga hung gui lhunga, Kangaito bang banga hung dingdoh ding ahi!

Hita chu keiman kagamsunga Assyria mi kasuh manga, Keima molsang chunga keng chotpha kanei ding ahi; Assyria namkol chu Israeltea konin kitol mang intin, Alengkou uva kona pohgih kitolmang ding ahi,” ati.
Hiche thilgon hi leiset pumpi dinga kigong chu ahin, Hiche khut hi namtin vaipi chunga kilhangdoh chu ahiye.
Ajeh chu thaneipen Pakaiyin agonsa chu Koiham asumo jou ding? Ama khut chu ahung kilhang doh-e. Koiham akinung tumsah theiya chu?
Ahaz lengpa athi kum chun hiche thuchih hi ahung lhunge;
W“Vo Philistia, kipah hih hel’in nabonchauvin, Nangma kidenna mol chu abongtai, tin! Ijeh-inem itile gul guiya kona gulse hung pengdoh a, Chule acha anao hung peng chu gulsum lhanei hiding ahi.
Chule vaicha cha apeng masan neh ding kimun tin, Angaicha ho jong lung monga lum ding ahiuve; Ahin nangma chilhah vang keiman gilkela kathisah ding, Namite amoh cheng chu katha ding ahi.
Vo kelkot kap temin, Vo khopi khu samtan! Vo Philistia, kitihot lhulsoh-in nabonchauvin! Ajeh chu sah lama konin meikhu ahung kitung doh-in, Amato kibanga akhandoh sah ding aumpoi,” ati.
Nampi sottolle ho donbut ding chu koi ham? “Pakaiyin Zion aphutdoh tan, Asunga khun amite bolgentheiya um ho chun Kiselna akimu tauve,” ati.
Moab chung changa thuchih. Jan khat kah a Ar khopi chu akiphet ngimhel jeh-in Moab chu chat theilouvin aumin; Jan khat kah a Kir khopi chu akiphet ngimhel jeh-in Moab chu chat thei louvin aume.

Ainsung mi ahin Dibon ahin munsang lai laiya Akap dingin akaldoh tai! Nebo molvum dung le Med’eba vum dunga Moab chu akap kap’in; Lujang jouse la akivoutol soh tan, Nemul jouse jong akivou ngimsoh tai!
Kholai dunga jong khaodip ponin atai akigah-uvin, Inchung jouse le vadung ningkoi lai jousea Amitin akap kap’uvin, Nem lheh lhuh-in alhi long longuve.
Heshbon kho le Elea’leh kho jong apeng pengin, A-oginu chu Jahaz kho geiyin akijai! Hiti chun Moab galsat mite othong jejun apenguvin, Alungthim akithing thinge.

Kalungthim hi Moab din akap kap’in, Akhopem ho jong Zo’ar kho lang Eg’lath-shelish’iyah langa ajam tauve. Ajeh chu Luhith langa kaltouna a chun akap kap’un akaltouvui. Horona’im kho jotna lampi langa Manthahna dingin kho asamui.
Nimrim muna twi jouse donlouvin aumin, Hamhing agoptan, athah la akehpoi, louhing jong aumtapoi.
Hichejeh chun amahon thalhing set’in akimu’uvin, Ahin kimudoh chengseu chu Hohlam lonna vadung lama akipoh mang tauve.
Ijeh-inem itile Moab gam kimvela kho akisam samin, Egla’im geiyin ka ogin ahung lhungin, Ka ogin chu Beer-e’lim ahung lhung peh-e.
Ajeh chu Dibon dung twi jouse la thisan asoh gamin, Hijongle Dibon chunga ahahsa cheh kahin lhut khuma, Moab’a kona jamdoh ho leh Gamsunga ahing nalai amoh chengse dinga chu sakei kahin lha ding ahi.
Amahon Sela khoa kon, nelgam jotna lampi, Zion chanu molsang lama chun Gamsung vaihomho dingin Kelngoi ho ahin lhapeh-uvin ahi.
Vacha lha-thing thing ho bang leh Vanou kithecheh ho bangin, Moab chanute chu Amon vadung palmun dunga Akithe cheh-uvin ahi.
“Lungthim mop’in lang, Thutan dih bolpeh-in, Nalim chu lhavah laitah a Janlai tobang hisah-in, Donlou dailouva kikoiho chu selmang hih-in, Khopem chu lhem chavai lou jenin;

Moab’in donlou dailouva akoiho Nalah a khopem sah-uvin; Hiche ho ding chun mi sumangpa koma amasanga Kiselna din pang tan. Mi bolgentheipa abeiya Manthahna akichai phat Mi keng chotpha neipa chu Gamsunga kona akitol mang tengleh,

Lungsetna long louvin laltouna khat hung kitung doh intin, Achunga chun David ponbuh sunga kitahna hung touva, Ama chu thutan vaihoma thutan dihna holpa Adih bol dinga ngongkai louhel pa chu hi ding ahi,” ati.
Keihon Moab kiletsah thu kajauvin, Itobang tah a anakiletsah hitam; Akithang atna, akiletsahna chule alouchalna Akithupi sahna abonchan jou jeng ahibouve.
Hichejeh hin Moab hi lunghemin kap hen, Mitinin Moab chu ka cheh uhen. Kir-har’-eseth a lengpi theiboh ho lha ngaiyin. Lunghem tah-in maovun.

Heshbon kho loumun jouse leh Sibmah a lengpithei alung hesoh-e; Namtin vaipi pipu hon Abah jouse alham lhauvin, Jazer kho alhunguvin; Chuin nelgam jotna lampi akimansah uvin, Amit hung dondoh ho chu gamla lah a ajamin, Twikhanglen gala ajam galkaitai.

Hichejeh chun keima Jazer kho aka nau bangin, Sibmah a lengpithei din kakap’e; Kalhi longin nalonvuh-e, Vo Heshbon leh Elea’leh; Ijeh-inem itile nangma lholhun jeh le nalengpi theiga lhun jeh-in Galmuna kon dinga kikouna atang tai.

Aga thalhing tah louma a konin jong Kipana le thanopna akila mange; Lengpilei lai dunga jong La akisa ging tapon, husa jong akisam tapoi; Lengpithei chilngem pan la lengpitwi achilna dunga achildoh pon, Lengpithei lhun phat a kho kisam jong akihoh thip tai.
Hijeh chun kalhagao gosem kisai ging bangin Moab dingin amao maovin; Kalungthim jong Kir-’he’res khohsah nan Amao mao jengin ahi.
Moab chu amatah ahung kilah a, munsang chung changa ama mong mong alungtha achol teng, amuntheng dunga tao dinga ahung tengleh athan ajo louhel ding ahi.
Hiche thu hi masang laiya Pakaiyin Moab chung chang thua anasei chu ahi.

Chule tun jong Pakaiyin thu aseiyin hitin ati. “Kithalah kum ho banga kum thum sunga hi Moab gam hi amihonpi tam lheh jeng jongle aloupina noise tah a hung kison nem ding, chule ahingdoh chengse jong chu alhoma lhom hiuvin tin meisan gam ding ahiuve.” ati.
Damascus chung chang thudola thuchih. “Vetan, Damascus hi khopi khat’a hung ding jou lou ding, In gem kisong khom hung hiding ahibouve.
Akhopi jouse jong atonsot’a dingin dalhah thip’a um ding, Kelngoi honte lhatna hi ding, Hiche ho chu hung koluvin tin, Koima chan ahoh kichat louhel ding ahiuve.
E’phraim dingin kulpi hung beiyin tin, Damascus dinga lenggam hung mang ding ahi; Syria mi ahing nalai amoh chengse chu Israel chate loupina tobang hi ding ahi,” tin. Thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Hiche nikho chuleh Jacob loupina kison kun ding,
Hiche chu chang atpan chang kong ahuikhoma, Abanjanga changpal ho achom khom tobang, Chule min changpal akhaiho chu Reph’aim phaichama achomkhomle tobang hi ding ahi.

Olive thing akivoh ling teng leh apul banga Asunga chu changkhai kichom moh kidalha den ding; Alehvum sang pentah a chu aga ni le thum umdena, Thingbah chung dunga Aga li le nga umden bep ding ahi.” Tin Pakai Israel Pathenin aseiye.
Hiche nikho chuleh mihemin Asempa ahinvet ding, amit tenin jong Israel Mithengpa chu ahinmu ding ahi;
ama khutsoh maicham chu ahinvet khoh lou ding, Ashe’rim chu hihen lang ahiloule gimnamtui halna maicham chu hijongle akhut jung hoa asemdohsa chu vet nahsah a anei lou ding ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh akhopi dettah tah ho jong chu Israel chate jeh a ana dalhah sau Hivi mite leh Amor mite dalhahna mun dung chutoh hung bang ding, dalhah thip dela hung um ding ahi.
ijeh-inem itile nangman Nahuhhinga Pathen chu nasumil tan, Nakiselna Songpi nageldoh tapoi; Hijeh hin nangman thingkeh hoi hoi kiphun lang, Gamchom la ngei ngei boldoh jongle chun,
Nathing phu anikho ma man khandoh sah theiyin lang, Natu nikho le len jingkah chun pahsah thei jongle chun, Aga kilo ding nikho chu boldam thei louhel Genthei nikhon alhoh mang ding ahibouve.
He kate! mitin vaipi husa pi khu, Twikhanglen husa bangin ahusauve! He kate! namtin vaipi okithongpi khu, Twi hattah a kithong gin toh abange!

Namtin vaipi chu twi tamtah kithong ging bangin a-aovuvin, Ahinla aman ahinpho tengle gamla tah a jammang intin, Molvuma khohuiyin changsi amut mang banga amut mang ding, Khopihui masanga chimpeiyin leivui apeimang tobang hi ding ahi.
Vetan, nilhah tengle tijatna ahin, Jingkah masangin ana umji tapouve! Keiho chomgam ho chan ding chu hiche hi ahin, Eibah gamteu chan ding chu hiche hi ahiye.
He kate, alhaving kithin kithongje ju gam Ethiopia vadung ho gala um;

Twi chunga pumpeng pum kisema Vadunga gam thalheng miho hinsol-ah; Sottolle kaljang ho cheuvin, Nam sangtah leh nam onem mite hengah; Nai le gamla a um, gin umtah nam mite, Nam thahat le galjou nam mite, Agam jong Vadunghon akhotan peh mite hengah.
Vo nangho vannoiya chengte, Leiset chunga chengte; Molsangho vuma ponlap ahung kitundoh tengleh veuvin. Sumkon ahung kimut teng leh ngaiyuvin!
Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin kajah a hitin aseiye, “Keiman kachenna muna konin, Nisa noiya van thengsel bang leh Phalbi nisa daitwiya meilhang thengsel banga Thip beh cha Kahinvet ding ahi,” ati.
Ajeh chu thingga lo phat masang, apah kichaisoh a, Apah jong lengpitheiga minsa ahung hi tengleh; Aman abah ho chu hamchem hoa achetana, A bah jamdoh chengse jong chu alham lhah ding ahi.

Aboncha chu molsang dunga neh ding kiholle vachate leh Leiset’a gamsa ho kidalhah peh ding ahiye; Chutengle neh ding kiholle vachaten hiche ho chu Nipi lai phat manna aneiyuva, Chule leiset’a gamsa hon hiche ho chu Phalbi lai phat manna anei dingu ahi.

Hiche phat chuleh nam sangtah le nemheo tea kon, Gin umtah nai le gamla a um mitea kon, Thahat tah le galjo hat nam mite, Agam jong vadung hon akhotan peh nam mitea kona Zion molsang, thaneipen Pakai min umna muna Thaneipen Pakai ding thilto hung kichoilut ding ahi.

Egypt chung changa thuchih. “Vetan, Pakai chu meilhang lengjen jun chunga atouvin, Egypt gam a ahunge; Ama angsunga chu Egypt gama milim kisemthu ho Kithing thing ding ahiuve; Chuteng Egypt mite chu Atungthim lhadah gam ding ahiuve.

Keiman Egypt mite dou dingin Egypt mite ma ma tildoh ing ting, Hita chu amaho hung kisat’uva, Amitinin asopi tah ahindou ding; Chule amitakip’in aheng akom ahin douva, Khopi le khopi hung kidou ding; Lenggam le lenggam Hung kidou ding ahi;

Chutengle Egypt mite lhagao Asunga konin hung kibung lhan tin; Keiman athilgon jouse kasuh noh peh ding, Amahon milim kisemthu ho leh ailhim them ho adoh-uva, Doi themho leh phunsan them ho Adoh dingu ahi;
Ahinla keiman Egypt mite chu mipu hunei tah khat khut’a kapehdoh’a, Leng gilou tah khat achunguva Hung vaihom ding ahi,” Tin Pakai thaneipen Yahweh-in aseiye.
Chutengle luipi dung twi jouse hung kangin tin, Vadung chu hung kisang goa gobet ding;
Atwilam chengse chu hung namsen tin, Egypt vadung vabah chengse kangtan gama Hung kang gosoh ding ahin, Peng phung ho leh twiham jouse hung mon mang ding ahiuve.
Luipi dung muntin chu akeova hung kijam ding, Luipi dung pang dung jouse ahin; Luipi dung jala hing theile akehdoh chengse chu Go lhasoh a kibotdoh soh a beihel ding ahiye.
Nga man mi, luipi dunga ngakoi leh lut jouse Hung lunghema hung kap ding; Twi chunga len sep jouse Abonchauva hung lung himo ding ahiuve.
Tupat pon nem khong ho jong hung lung thoi soh intin, Ponkang khong ho jong lungthoi soh ding ahiuve.
Gamsung dinga abul khoma pang ho chu kisugep’uvin tin, Thalah dinga kigoi chengse lung hesoh ding ahiuve.

Zo’an khoa milen ho angola ngol ahiuvin, Pharaoh dinga thumop’a pang miching hon, ngol lungthim ahiltauve. Iatileh Pharaoh jah a chu “Keima miching tah chapa kahin, Leng lui lui ho chapa kahi,” Tia nasei ngam ham?
Namiching ho chu hoilama ba um hitauvam? Egypt douna thaneipen Pakaiyin ipi agon ham? Amaho chu najah a seisah-in lang Hetdoh thei dingin umsah uhen.
Zo’an khoa milen jouse angol gamin, Chule Noph khoa milen jouse akilhem lhai; Aphung sung cheh a inning songpi tobang ho chun Egypt chu apuimang tauve.
Alailunga chun Pakaiyin lung nohphahna lhagao alha lut’in, Hijeh chun Egypt chu athilbolna tina alonle le sah-uvin, Jukham mi alonle lea Aloh loh tobang ahi.
Egypt dinga imacha hung um lou ding ahi, Alubuh hihen amei hileh, Lusu bah hihen lang peng phung hijongleh Abolpeh thei ding aumpoi.
Hiche nikho chuleh Egypt mite achunguva thaneipen Pakaiyin khut ajapkhum masanga kicha kitihot hot ding, numei bep hi ding ahiuve.
Chule Egypt mite dinga Judah gam chu tijat umtah hung hiya, koi hijongle akiseipohna chan chu thaneipen Pakaiyin amaho douna athil ngaito jala kicha cheh ding ahiuve.
Hiche nikho chuleh Egypt gamsunga khopi ngajenin Cannan pao athouva, thaneipen Pakaiya pang ding hung kihahsel ding ahiuve; hiche ho lah a khopi khat chu Nisa khopi kiti ding ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh Egypt gam kimlai tah a Pakai dinga maicham khat hung umdoh a, agamgia jong Pakai dinga gamgi song kiphut ding ahi.

Hiche chu Egypt gamsunga thaneipen Pakai dia melchihna le hettohsah a hung pang ding; mi bolgenthei ho jeh a Pakai henga ahung tao tenguleh aman huhhinga khat ahinsol peh a, amaho ahuh a, ahuhdoh ding ahi.

Chutengle Pakai amatah Egypt mite henga hung kiphonga, Egypt miten hiche nikho chuleh Pakai hin heuvin tin kilhaina gantha le pumgo thilto aboluva chibai ahinboh-uva, chule Pakaiya kitepna tampi ahin neiyuva hiche ho chu atoh bulhing diu ahi.
Pakaiyin Egypt mite ahin den ding, adena chuteng aboldam ding, amaho Pakai henga hung kile kit’uvin tin aman jong atao nau angaiya aboldam ding ahi.

Hiche nikho chuleh Egypt’a konin Assyria geiyin lamlen hung kilhung lut’in tin, Assyria mite Egypt gamsunga hunguva, Egypt mite jong Assyria gamsunga hung diu, chuteng Egypt mite leh Assyria miten Pathen ahoukhom diu ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh Israel hi Egypt le Assyria bana thum channa hung panga, leiset lailunga phatthei boh a hung pang ding,
thaneipen Pakaiyin phatthei aboh mite dinga chu hita aseiya, “Phattheiboh chang hen, kamite Egypt mi, kakhutsoh Assyria mi, chule kagoulo Israel mi,” ati ding ahi.
Assyria lengpa Sargonin ahinsolpa sepai lamkai pipu pen tah ahunga Ashdoh kho asat’a alah kum:

Pakaiyin Amoz chapa Isaiah kama thu ahinsei pet chun hitin aseiye, “Chen lang nataiya khaodip pon kivei chu sut lhan, nakengphang tenia konin nakeng chot teni sut lhan,” atileh; aman jong chuti chun abolin, asagoh keovin aumin chule akeng keovin lam ajot’e.
Chuin Pakaiyin aseiye, “Egypt le Ethiopia douna kum thum sunga kasohpa Isaiah asagoh keova auma akeng keova lam ajot banga,

Assyria lengpan Egypt mite leh Ethiopia mite, khangdong lai le tahse cheng abonchauva gal-hinga amat’a sohchanga akai ding, sagoh keo le kengchot beiya um diu, Egypt mite dinga jachat umtah a akongbuh teni kihohdoh ding ahiuve.
Chuphat le akinep nau Ethiopia jeh le akithang atnau Egypt jala lungthoiyuva kisu lungdong diu ahi.

Chutengle hiche twikhanglen pang dunga chengten hiche nikhoa hi hita aseiyuva, ‘Vetemin, ikineppi teu leh Assyria lengpa a kona eihuhdoh-uva eikithopi diuva eibolteu chunga ipi soh a hitam! Chule eiho ihiuvin iti ijamdoh diu hitam?’ tia asei dingu ahi,” ati.
Twikhanglen pang gamthip noi thudola thuchih. Negeb gama chimpei hung kipei pei bangin, Nel gama kon, tijat umtah gama konin ahung kitol tole,

Themgao thilmu khoh tah khat kajah a eikiseipeh-in, Mi chomgam pan mi achomin, mi sugam pan mi asumange. Vo Elam, kaltouvin, Vo Media, kho gaum temin, Hahsatna asosah chengse keiman kasuhbei ding ahi.
Hichejeh hin kataibuh anan, Numei naoso nat bang khun kanatai. Keima eikison kunin hijeh chun kho kaja tapon, Eikisu lung thoitan hijeh chun kho kamutapoi.
Kalunggil hi atijan, tijatnan eiphatai; Jingpi phalvah ka-lha ngai chu kei dingin tijatna ahijo tai.
Dokhang adon dokhang pon aphan, an anen twi adontai, Vo leng chapa ho hung thouvun lang ompho chu thao nuvin!
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai chun kajah a hitin aseiye, “Chen lang mi khat kho-ngah-in gapan sah-in, Ama chun ipi hijongleh Amuphah chan chu hinphondoh sah jin.
Ama chun kangtalaiya tou ho akop kop’a sakol chunga tou ho, Sangan chunga tou ho leh sangong sang chunga tou ho amu teng Lung lut tah leh Lunggil tenin ngai lhi hen,” ati.
Thil mudoh pa chu ahung penjah a, “Vo Pakai, keima kho ngahna inting vuma Nilhum helin kading jing jengin; Kapansatna muna jan khovah helin eikipansah-e.

Chule hiche hi vetemin, kangtalaiya tou ho leh Akop kop’a sakol chunga tou ho hikoma ahunguve!” ati ding ahi. Hichun aman adonbut’in, “Babylon khopi achimtai, achimtai; Asunga pathen lim kisem thu jouse jong Pakaiyin tol lhanga athe thangsoh tai,” ati.
Vo changmola kaden chilsa le chang japna kajap chilsa ho, Keiman thaneipen Pakai, Israel Pathena kona kajah chu Nangho henga kahin phondoh ahiye.
Dumah chung chang thuchih. Se’ir mola konin mi khat’in eihin kouvin, “Kho-ngah-pa, jana chu ipi soh am? Kho-ngah-pa jana chu ipi soh am?” atileh;
Kho-ngah pan jong aseiyin, “Jingkah kho ahungvah-in, jan jong ana ume; Nangman kholtoh ding nati leh kholtoh-in lang hung kilekit’in,” ati.
Arabia chung chang thudola thuchih. Vo De’dan mi kholjin ho, Arabia gammang thim noiya najan ge dingu ahi.
Vo Tema gama chengte, Adangchah a chu twi pen lang, khopema chu changlhah-in ton.
Ijeh-inem itile amaho hi Chemjam masang le chemjam kidoh dohsa masang, Thalpi kamsa masang, Gal delkhum masanga hung jam ahiuve.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin kajah a hitin aseiye, “Mi kithalahna kum kisim dung juiya kum khat sung hileh Kedar mite loupina chengse hung beisoh ding ahi;
chule Kedar chapate thalpi kapthem athimoh chengse jong chu lhomcha bou hiding ahiuve; ijeh-inem itile Pakai Israel Pathenin aseitai,” ati.
Themgao thilmu na phaicham thudola thuchih. Nabonchauva inchunga chu Ipi bola nakaltouvu ham?
Peng ging det dut’a um, Khopi poh chei choi, kithang at kho! Na mithi la chemjama kithat jong ahipon, Gal kisatna muna thiden jong ahipon ahi.
Navaihomte abonchan ajahchauvin. Thalpi beiyin min akimat tauve; Gamla tah a ajam nah vanguvin Nangho nabon chauvin matsan nakimudoh tauvin ahi.
Hichejeh hin keiman kaseiye, “Kakoma konin kihei manguvin lang, Lhase tah a lhi long pum pumin kap inge; Kamite chanu manthah jalin lhep lung mong din neigot dan,” kati.

Ijeh-inem itile Pakai, thaneipen Pakaiyin Themgao thilmuna phaichama kinohna le Kengtoa kichil thang thangna chule lung nohphah na dimset Pal jouse kivoh lhuhna leh molsang jouse Kho kisap khum jengna Nikho khat aneiye.
Elamin livathei akikon, kangtalaiya sakol touthemho toh akilhone; Kir-in ompho ahohdoh tai.
Naphaicham dei chung nung chu kangtalai jeng adimsoh tai, Chule sakol touthem ho kelkot phung dunga apang soh tauve.
Aman Judah kikhu khumna chu ahohdoh tai. Hiche nikho chun nangman gammang noiya insunga gal manchah ho chu naven,
chule David khopi kikhentel telna tampi ahi chu amudoh tauve; hijeh chun twikul noinunga twi jouse chu nathal khom khomuvin,
Jerusalem injat nasimuvin galkul kaikhum dingin in ho chu navochim tauve.
Chuin pal teni kah a chun twikul luiya twi kholna ding khat nasemuvin ahi. Ahinla hiche bolpa chu vejong nave pouvin masang laiya pat’a gontohsa anakoipa jong chu khoh sah-in nanei pouve.
Hiche nikho chun Pakai thaneipen Pakaiyin Akap dingle alunghem ding Asam kivotol ding le khaodip pon taiya kigah dingin Mi anakouve.
Chujongle vetan, kipana le thanopna jeng, Bongchal ho le kelngoi ho kitha thajenga, Sa jeng kine nea lengpitwi kidon dona, “Jing teng kithi ta ding neu hitin donu hite,” akitiuve.
Thaneipen Pakai amatah-in kanabeng tenia aphongdoh tai; “Nathi kahseuva hiche themmona hi Naki-ngaidam louhel dingu ahi,” tin Pakai thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.
Pakai thaneipen Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye, “Chen lang insunga vaipo neichingpa Shebna henga galut’in lang chule ajah a,
’Nangman hikoma hi ipi holding naneiya chule koipen naneiya nang dinga lhan khat nakisema, chung sang lama khu lhan khat nakisema, songpi sunga khu nachenna ding nakivu ham?
Vetan, Vo mi thahatpa, Pakaiyin thahat chang sana nahinse mang ding, natom toma nahinjel doh ding;

chimpei peiya avel vela napei kimvel ding, tol lhang ong lah a kangtalum kisep banga naselhah ding ahi; hikoma chu nangma nathiden ding, naloupina kangtalai jouse jong umden ding, napupa insung chu najachatpi ding ahiye.
Keiman natohna muna konin nakaidoh ing ting, napan muna kona nakipaidoh ding ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh keiman kasoh pa Eli’akim, Hilki’ah chapa chu kakouva
nangma leng ponchol kasilpeh ding, nakonggah chu kagah peh a, nangma thaneina chu ama khut’a kapeh ding ahi; chutengle ama chu Jerusalema chengte leh Judah insung dinga mipa a hung pang ding ahi.
Chule David insung kanglong hehna chu ama lengkouva kakhaipeh a, aman ahondoh tengle koimachan akha thei louhel ding ahi, aman akha tengle koimachan ahondoh thei louhel ding ahi.
Chujongle keiman ama chu mundet lai khat’ a thil khaina kikhenbeh banga kahendet ding, apa insung dinga ama chu jabolna laltouna hiding ahiye.
Ama chunga chu apa insung thilgih jouse, ason achilhah te leh ainsung kon chengse ahiuvin, manchah jouse khon hoa pat twi hai geiya akhai khum diu ahi.

Thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye, “Hiche nikho chuleh mundet laitah a kikhenlut thil khaina jong chu hung lhong lha ding; hung kisat lha a hung lha mang ding, achunga kikhai thilgih jong chu hung kisat lhah tha ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseitai.” ati.

Tyre chung chang thudola thuchih. Vo Tarshish a kong innei ho kap’in penguvin, Ajeh chu Tyre kho chu in neilou le Pansatna ding mun beihelin akiphet ngimhel tai; Cyprus gama konin amaho henga ahung kiphongdoh tai.
Vo twikhanglen pang dunga cheng ho leh Sidon khoa kivei miho, thip beh chan umuvin; Nasottol le ho chu twikhanglen agalkai uvin,
Twipi chung agei tauve; Nang dinga kai kidong chu Shihor gama chang leh Luipi dunga chang ki-atji ho ahiye; Nangma jong Namtin vaipi dinga kiveimi nahi.
Vo Sidon, jah chan; Ijeh-inem itile twikhanglen in thu aseitan hitin ati, Keiman naoso nat la kahekha pon, cha kahing khapoi; Gol lhang jong kaseilet sah khah pon nu-ngah jong kavahdoh poi,” ati.
Athu kithang hi Egypt gam ahung lhuna akijah teng, Tyre thudol kithang chu ajah doh tengule amaho lung hesoh ding ahiuve.
Vo twikanglen pang dunga cheng ho, Tarshish langa galkaiyuvin lang kap’uvin!
Nakhopi kichoi sang chu hiche hi haimo? Nimasa laipeh a pat’a abul hung kiphutsa, Gamla tah a cheng dinga Akengphang tenin alhoh mang chu?
Koiham Tyre douna dinga hiche ngaitoa Lallukhuh ho homdoh khopi Tyre? Amite akivei ho jong leng chapate jeng hiya, Athil joh lea thil cho le ho jong leiset’a jabol mi jeng hiya chu?
Loupi tah a akiletsah suboh dingleh Leiset’a akijabolte jumso dinga Hiche thilgon hin gonga chu Thaneipen Pakai chu ahiye.
Vo Tarshish chanu, nagam luipi dung bangin adimsoh tan; Atuh tang ding koima aum tapoi.
Aman twikhanglen chunga akhut ajah in, Lenggam jouse jong ahot ling soh tai; Pakaiyin akulpi jouse suhmang nading in Canaan chung changa thu apetai.

Chule aman aseiye, “Vo Sidon chanu, bolgentheiya um nu-ngah nu; Nangma choisanga naum kit louhel ding ahi; Kipatdoh-in lang Cyprus lama galkaiyin, Ahinla hikoma jong chun Choldo mun nakimu louhel ding ahi,” ati.

Ven Chalde’a mite gam pi hi! Hiche hi mipi ahin, Assyria ahipoi, Tyre hi gamsa ho dingin akoiyuvin; khopi adelkhum nau intingvum sang ho chu anatung doh-uvin, aleng inpi mun jouse jong aphet chamuvin, kho gem asoh gamtauve.
Kap’uvin, Vo Tarshish a kong innei ho; Ajeh chu nakulpi akiphet theng hel tai.
Hiche nikho chuleh Tyre hi leng khatseh hin nikho sung banga kum som sagi jen suhmila hung um ding; kum som sagi kichai tengle chun Tyre dinga noti lasah banga hita hung um ding ahi;
“Selangdah kichoiyin lang, Khopi kimvela vah len vo suhmilsa noti! Tumging ngei ngei saiyin lang, la tampi san Hita chu nangma nakigeldoh kitna dingin,” kiti ding ahi.
Kum som sagi kichai tengle chun Pakaiyin Tyre ahung vil ding, amajong athalah nu henga hung kilekit’a, chule leiset chunga vannoi lenggam jouse toh noti chona chon ding ahi.

Ama kiveina thil jouse leh athalah nu jong chu Pakaiya hung kithenso ding, koijong kitup’a kikoi khom lou ding, ama kiveina thil ho chun Pakai angsunga chengte anneh neng jeng junga atopeh a. ponsil hoitah tah a atojoh ding ahibouve.
Vetan, Pakaiyin leiset hi ahin phet ngim hela akeova ahinjam ding; Leiset mai aloichi toa asunga chengte athecheh ding ahi.

Hita chu hung uma thempuho jong mipi bep bep hi ding, Soh pa bang banga chu apupa jong hung um ding; Soh nu bang banga apinu jong hung uma, Thiljoh pa bang banga thil chopa jong hung um ding; Sumpa hompa bang banga sumpa lapa jong hung uma; Sum batsah pa bang banga sumba pa jong hung um ding ahi.
Leiset hi keohela hung kilha a, kichom ngim hel jeng ding ahi; Ajeh chu Pakaiyin hiche thu hi aseitai.
Leiset alunghemin ago lha game; Vannoi alung hesoh-in ago lha gam tai; Van le leiset agomin Alung hesoh khom lhon tai.
Leiset hi asunga chengte noiya suhboh san akijam thang tai; Ijeh-inem itile amahon danthu jouse asukeh-uvin, Chondan thu ho asuse soh-uvin, Tonsot geiya kitepna chu asukeh tauve.
Hichejeh chun leiset hi gaosap nan achuptan, Asunga chengte jong athemmonau jeh-in agenthei tauve; Hichejeh hin leiset’a chengte akihulgo gamuvin, Mihem lhomcha bou akidalhauve.
Lengpitwi alung hemin, Lengpigui alung hesoh-e; Lungthim kipah jouse alung gime.
Khutbeh gin ngei jouse athip soh tan, Kipana ogin la atang tan, selangdah gin ngei ahaitai.
Amahon lasah le judon atho kit louhel dingu ahitan, Khamna thei judon ho jong chu ajudonu akhabouve.
Boina khopi chu aki suchimtan, Inkot jouse akikhah soh keiyin koimacha alut thei tapoi.
Lengpitwi lhahsam jeh-in kholai dunga kho akisam same, Kipana jouse abei ding koncha ahitai; Leiset kipana jong WAbeisoh ahitai.
Khopi sunga chun ahomkeo jeng akidalhan, Kelkot jouse alom lomin akivochip soh tai.
Ijeh-inem itile leiset lailung mitin lah a Hita hi hung um ding ahi, Lengpiga lo phat’a alokhom bangle Olive thing kivolhu bang ding ahi.
Amahon O sangtah-in kipa la asauvin, Nilhum lama konin lal loupina kho asamuve.
Hichejeh hin niso lama konin Pakai chu loupina peuvin lang, Twikhanglen pang dunga Pakai Israel Pathen loupi sah-uvin.

Leiset kol kimvela konin keihon Midihpa Vahchoina le loupina la kisa kajauve. Ahinla keiman, “Kagim behseh jenge, kagim behseh jenge, Ohe amangthah pai kahitai! Ajeh chu mijou hon jou jengin eiboluvin, Mijou hon jouna lhingset’in,” kati.
Vo leiset chunga chengpa, Tijatna le kokhuh chule thang nachunga aume!
Tijatna ogina jampa chu kokhuh sunga lha lut ding; Kokhuh sunga hung kaldoh pa chu thanga oh ding ahi. Ajeh chu chung lama bangkot jouse akihongin, Chule leiset bulpi jouse akilinge.
Leiset keh ni akiso hel jengin, leiset nasatah in akithing tai.
Leiset hi mihem jukham bangin alonle len, A vaipohna jong loubuh bep ahi; Asuhkhelna achunga gihsa tah-in akikhaiyin, Hijeh chun alhu tai, kiphongdoh kit louhel ding ahitai.
Hiche nikho chuleh Pakaiyin Chung lama um vanmi jong talen amatsah ding, Leiset chunga leng ho jong Talen amatsah ding ahi.
Abonchauva kokhuh sung khat’a Soh changa kikhom khom diu, Songkul sunga kot kikha khumuva Nikho tamtah nunga talen kimatsah ding ahiuve.

Chutengle Lha jong hung kisu lungdong intin, Nisa jong hung kijumso ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile thaneipen Pakaiyin Zion molsang chung vum le Jerusalema lengvai apoh a Chule amite upa chengse masanga Aman aloupina aphondoh ding ahi.
O Pakai, nangma ka-Pathen nahin, Keiman nachoi-an ing ting namin vahchoi inge; Ajeh chu nangman thil kidang dang nabolin, Kitah tah le thon louhel din gollui laiya pat thil gonsan nakoiye.
Ajeh chu nangman khopi jeng jong in-gem jeng naso sah tan, Kulpi kikaikhum khopi jong chu asesan nakoitai! Gamdang mite leng inpi ho jong khopi him him nahisah tapon, Kisathah kit louhel ding ahitai.
Hichejeh chun mi thahat ten loupi tah-in nabol’uvin tin, Phatchomna bei namtin vaipi khopin jong nagin diu ahi.

Ajeh chu nangma mi tah lel dingin kulpi nahi jingin, Angaicha geova umpa dingin agenthei pet le akulpin napange; Khopi huiya kiselna nahin, nisat noiya lim nahi; Ajeh chu duh dah beipa miden chu khopi huiyin pal anuh tobang ahin,
Lhang golaiya nisa sat tobang ahi. Nangman gamdang mite husa chu naphoh lhan, Meilom lah a nisa sat bangin Pannabei miho lasah chu athip tai.

Hiche molsang chunga hi thaneipen Pakaiyin mitin dinga golvah, atui tui jenga kivahna, lengpitwi ninga kivahna, thao jeng dimset golvah, lengpitwi ning phatah a kilhi thengsela kivahna abolpeh ding ahi.
Chule aman hiche molsang chunga hi mitin kikhu khum den chu ahodoh a, namtin vaipi kijao khum pon lukhuh chu ahodoh ding ahi.
Pakaiyin thina chu tonsot geiya din hin vallhumin tin, Pakai Pathenin mitin maiya mit lhi long jouse atheh hul peh a, leiset’a kona amite kihousetna alah mang ding ahi, ajeh chu Pakaiyin thu aseitai.

Hiche nikho chuleh hita kisei ding ahi, “Ven, hiche hi eiho Pathen chu ahi; eihuhhing theina dinguva eihon ama inga jingu ahiye. Hiche hi Pakai chu ahi, eihon ama inga jingu ahiye! ama mi huhhingna a hin eiho thanomin kipah uhite,” kitinte.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai khut chu hiche molsang chunga hi hung kingama, eh khula changpol kichon lut banga Moab chu aumna muna keng chotpha kinei ding ahi.
Alailung tah a chu aman, twiya kijap’in akhut teni ajah doh banga, akhut teni ajah ding ahi; ahinla Pakaiyin ama kiletsahna chu akhut themna puma asot lhah peh ding ahibouve.
Chule akulpi sang tah a kikai ho jong chu aloi nem peh a, nem cha akoipeh a, leivui lah tol keova ahin sot lhah jeng ding ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh hiche la hi Judah gamsunga hung kisa ding ahiye. “Keihon khopi dettah khat kaneiyun, Pakaiyin huhhingna pal leh leipal bangin atungdoh-e.
Tahsanna nei jing nam midihho ahung lut theina dingin, Kelkot ho chu hongdoh-uvin.
Nachunga alunggil chensah jingpa chu chamna lhingset’in napei, Ijeh-inem itile ama nachunga akingai jinge.
Pakai chu tonsot atonsot geiyin tahsan jingun, Ijeh-inem itile Pakai Pathen chu tonsot songpi ahiye.
Ajeh chu munsang lai laiya cheng miho le, Khopi sang ahin, aloinem soh tai; Nemcha chan aloinemin, tola nemchan ajamin, Leivui lah a aleh lhai.
Vaichate keng chotpha leh nelou chaloute kalsena, Mihem keng chotphan aume,” tia kisa ding ahi.
Midih lampi chu acham dengin, Nangin midih lamlhah chu jol dengin nasemin ahi.
Vo Pakai, nathutan vaihopna lampi dunga Keihon nangma ka-ngah jingun! Suhmil theilou nangma min chu ka-lhagaovun alha-ngai jinge.
Jan tengle kalhagaovin nalha-ngai jin, Kalaigila kalhagaovin gen ngaitah-in nahol jinge. Ijeh-inem itile leiset’a nangma thutan vaihomna akiphon tengleh Vannoiya chengten adih chu ahedoh ji tauve.
Mi gilou chu akilungset vangin Aman la adih akhohsah dehpoi. Migilouvin midih gamsunga dih lou tah-in thil abol jin, Pakai lalloupina jong amudoh ji poi.

O Pakai, nakhut nadom sangin, Migilouhon la amu pouvin ahi! Amaho chu namite dia natom ngaina mudoh sah-in lang, Chutengle abon chauvin jahcha soh keiyu hen. Abonchau hin nadoumah te halvamna ding meikong chun Kavamsoh keiyu hen.
O Pakai, nangman kei ho chamna nei sempeh dingu ahin, Katoh kathilbol jouseu neibolpeh soh tauve.
Vo Pakai keiho-Pathen, Nang tailou pakai dangin kachunguva vai ahom vangin Keihon nangma min seh seh bou Kagel jing jeng nauve.

Adangho hi athisa ahiuvin, hing thei lou ding ahiuve; Hiche ho hi alekeo bou ahiuvin, hung kithoudoh lou ding ahiuve, Akikhonna chu nangman suhmang dinga nahung vetsa ahin. Akihet jingna jouse jong nahung noi mangsa ahitai.
O Pakai, nangman hiche nam mite hi napunsah-in, Hiche nam mite hi napunsah tai; Nangma loupi tah-in naumin, Gamsunga gamgi jouse jong nakeh len soh tai.
O Pakai, genthei pet’in mihon nahol uvin, Achunguva naphosalna achuh teng ahung tao jiuvin ahi.
Numei naovop aso nat’a Aso phat anailam tengleh kipeh le lea apen pen bangin, O Pakai nangma angsunga Keiho jong chutima chu kahiuve.
Keihon nao kavop’un, kakipehle leuvin; Hitobang chun keiho cha hing ding kon kabanguve; Leiset dingin huhhingna lhagao kape thei pouve, Vannoiya chengte jong akipal lhu deh pouve.

Namithi ho chu hung hingdoh-intin, Atahsau jong hung thou doh ding ahi; Vo leivui lah a chengte, Hung thouvun lang kipa la sauvin’ Ajeh chu nadaitwi jong khovah daitwi ahin, Mithi gama nasun lhah ding ahi.
Chen kamite, na-indan chung nunga lut’in; Nanunga kotpi ho chu kikha khumin lang, Lungsatna akichaisoh kahsen Phat chomkhat kisel mangin.

Ijeh-inem itile vetan, leiset’a chengte Athemmonau jeh a talen matsah din Pakai chu amunna konin ahunge; Leiset in, achunga thisan kiso chu ahin phondoh ding, Achunga tol kithat chengse chu Akhu mang kit louhel ding ahi.

Hiche nikho chuleh Pakaiyin a-chemjam hemtah le len tah chule thahat tah a Leviathan kiti gul len jamle le, Leviathan kiti gul len kiveikol ngeng ngung chu asat’a chule twikhanglena cheng dragon chu atha ding ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh, “Lunglhai umtah lengpi leiyin hiche thudola la asah ding ahi.
Pakai keima hiche lengpilei ngah a pang kahin, Phat tinin twi kachap nou jinge; Achuti loule min suse khante tia, Asun ajana ka-nga jing jeng ahi.
Keiman lungsatna kaneipoi; kisatpi ding ling le khao kaneihileh! Akidoupi dingin phutdoh ing ting, Aboncha kahalvam tha ding ahiye.
Ahiloule kathahat hinbel jeng hen, Keitoh chamna semu hen, keitoh chamna semu hen,” tin te.
Ahung lhun phat le Jacob’in jung hinkhon tin, Israel ajih hung dona abah tampi hung jamdoh ding, Leiset pumpi hi Aga ahindip set ding ahi.
Amaho dengho avoh banga chu Ama ho avoh hitam? Amaho that-ho kitha banga chu Amaho kithat’a hitam?
Natetoh-in soh nachansah-in athu natanpeh-in, Niso lama khopihui nun nin Alungsat behseh jeh-in Amut mangsah tai.

Hichea hi Jacob themmo kisop thenga, Chutengle hiche hi achonset kitolmang ga lhingset chu hi ding; Aman maicham dunga song ho asemtoh teng jong leh Ngun song kivogoi hoi tobang hiya, Ashe’rim hihen gimnamtui halvamna maicham ho hijongleh Akitung den khat cha um louhel ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile kulpi kikai khum khopi chu agoh keuvin aumin, Chennasa chu don louvin akidalhan, gammang lah abange; Hikom dunga chun bongnou alhan, Kolle nan aneiyin hamhing bah jouse asuchaiye.

Abah ho agot tengle akiheh lha jin, Numei ho ahunguvin meithing dingin akichom jiuve. Ajeh chu hichete hi hetna bei mite ahin, Hichejeh hin asempauvin jong achunguva dipdamna anei lou ding; Amaho lim gongdoh pan alung lhai peh louhel dingu ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh Eu-phra’tes vadunga konin Egypt vadung geiyin Pakaiyin hinjep khomin tin. Vo Israel chate, nang ho khat khat’a nakikhop khomsoh diu ahi.

Hiche nikho chuleh sumkon lentah hung kimut’in tin, chuteng leh Assyria gamsunga mang thah jouse leh Egypt gamsunga kidellut jouse hunguvin tin Jerusalem molsang theng chunga Pakai chibai ahung boh diu ahi.
Ohe ada ahi. E’phraim mi jukhamho lah a leng kiletsah pa, Amel-hoi loupina pahcha pula pul ding, Haona phaichama jukham miho lallukhuh Luchanga kikhuh chu pul ding ahi!
