Vetan, Pakaiyin mi thahat tah tha nei tah khat aneiyin, Ama chu huise leh gel kitho bangin, Mi sumang khopihui hattah abange; Khopihui hattah-in Twipi asemdil jeng banga khu Aman pumhat changa tol jepna anei ding ahi.
E’phraim mi jukham ho lah a leng kiletsah pa chu, Kengto chotpha kinei ding ahiye.
Chule amel-hoi loupina pahcha pul banga pula, Haona phaicham vuma pah chu Nipi laiya theichang ga amin masa tobang ding; Mihemin amua atham khah khah leh aneh jeng tobang ding ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh thaneipen Pakai chu Loupina lallukhuh a hung pang ding; Amite amoh chengse dinga Mel lomtah lallukhuh a hung pang ding ahi;
Chule thutanna toupa chunga thutan dihna lhagaova pang ding, Kelkot’a gal leno kit ho dinga thahat’a hung pang ding ahi.

Hiche ho jong jukhamin alonle leuvin, Khamna theiyin akihot dot dot’uve; Thempu le themgao jong khamna theiyin alonle leuvin, Jukhamin akisu lung donguvin, Khamna theiyin akihot dot dot’uve; Mu anei nauva jong Amukhel gam tauvin, Thu atan nauva jong akipal soh tauve.
Ijeh-inem itile dokhan jouse loh adimset’in, Aboh lou mun aum tapoi.
“Koiham hitobang hin hetna ahil ding chu, Koiham, athu thot hilchen ding chu? Noitwiya kivah nalai noi chep ho chu ha, Noi chep bana kiloi lhah peh ho chu hiuvam?
Ajeh chu chondan jeng chondan jeng ahin, Chonna jeng chonna jeng, Hilama them khat Khulama them khat, ahi,” ati.
Hijeh a chu Pakaiyin hiche mite henga Hetphah lou mite kamsung le leiguiya thu ahinsei ding ahi.
Amaho jah a chu Pakaiyin, “Hiche pi hi choldona hiya hilah-em! Pohgihte chu kicholdo sah tau; Chule hiche hi kithadona hiya hilah em,” Tin aseipeh tan, Amahon la ngaisah-in aneipouve.

Hijeh chun amaho dingin Pakai thusei Chondan jeng chondan jenga hung panga, Chonna jeng chonna jenga hung pang ding, Hilama themkhat uma, khulama them khat um ding ahi; Chuta chu amaho acheuva nung lama nung lhuh-uva, Kisugep’uva, thanga oh den diu, chule kimandoh ding ahiuve.
Hichejeh hin Pakai thusei hi ngaiyuvin, Nang ho mi musit hatte, Jerusalema hiche mite chunga vaihomte!

Ijeh-inem itile nanghon naseiyuvin, “Keihon thina toh kitepna kasemun Noimigam toh kinoptona kanei tauve; Thoh hahsa chimgel gulin hung kitol jongleh Keiho vang eihin phah lou diu ahi; Ajeh chu keihon jouthu jeng kiselnan ka manguvin, Chule thujou thunal jeng Kilepnan kamang tauve,” natiuve.

Hichejeh hin Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Vetan, keiman Ziona inbul khompi dingin song khat kadoi, Patepsa song, inning song manlu tah, inbul khompi dettah ahin, Atahsan chan chu kikin no louhel ding ahi.
Keiman thutan dihna chu gol kaina kaman a, Adih chu songkhai intena kaman ding; Gel ahung lhah teng jouthua kiselna chu lhoh mangin tin, Kiselna chu twiyin ahin chup mang ding ahi,” ati.
Hiche tengle chun thina toh nakitepnau kisumang intin, Noimigam toh nakinop to nau jong ding jou deh lou ding ahi; Thoh hahsa chim gel gula ahung kitol teng leh Hiche chun najep lhah dingu ahi.
Thoh hahsa ahung kitol chan’a namat khah diu ahi; Ijeh-inem itile jingkah sim jingkah seh a hung kitol ding, Asun ajana hung kitol ding ahi; Athupoh hettoh ding chu tijat um chung nung ding ahi.
Ajeh chu jalkhun jong kilhotna dia chom behseh ding, Ponsil jong kikhu khum dia neo behseh ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile Pera’zim molsang chunga banga chu Pakai hung kipatdoh ding, Gibeon phaichama banga Hung lunghang ding; Anatoh ding dol tong dia, ama natoh chu lamdang tah ahi! Athilbol abol ding, ama thilbol chu ajatchom hele!

Hichejeh chun tun mi musit dauvin, Achutilouleh nakihen nau kiheldet cheh ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile Pakai, thaneipen Pakaiya konin Leiset pumpi chunga hung lhung ding manthahna dinga thutep khat kajadoh tai.
Na-nakhang hinsung uvin lang, kasei ngaiyuvin; Kho ngaiyuvin lang kathusei ja chehuvin.
Muchi tulutna dinga loukaipan akai kai jeng ding ha, Lei kaljal pan leilhang akaljal jal jeng ding ham?
Atol alai cham teng leh Lengmusel the louva um ngaiya, jira tulouva um ngaiyam; Suhlou chang agol gola gol louva, Sakol chang amun cheh a pansah louva, akimvela kolbutun phut louva um ngaiyam?
Ajeh chu ama thudih a kihil chahsa ahitan, A-Pathenin ama ahil nai.
Lengmusel chu chang mola kivo ngim lou ahin, Sakol kangtalai val jong jira chunga akitang poi; Ahin lengmusel chu tenggol in akideng lhan, Chule jira chu min molin avo lhaji bouve.
Min changlhah a sem ding chang khu asuh bong jim? Ahipoi, aitih-in adeng deng ji pon, Achunga kangtalai val alih khuma Asakolte puma atol tha jongleh asubong deh sampoi.
Hiche jeng jong thaneipan Pakaiya hung kon ahi; Ama chu thumop them kidang tah ahin, Chihna jong giltah aneiye.
Ohe, Ariel Ariel, David’in ngahmun anasemna! Kum akuma atamna, Kut ho jong avel velin hung kitol hen.
Ahin keiman Ariel kabol genthei ding, Lunghem nale ka-na hung um ding; Khopi chu kei dinga Ariel tobang ding ahiye.
Chule keiman nakimvela ngahmun hinseming ting, Intingvum sangtah a kabola kahin umkhum ding nahi.

Chutengle leiset noilam peh a konin nangman thu hinseiyin natin, Noilam leivui lah a kona nathusei hung ging ding; Na-ogin chu tol lama kona Thilha ogin banga hung ging ding, Chule nathusei jong chu Leivui lah a kona hung kikhodoh ding ahi.
Amavang nagalte mihonpi chu Leivui themcha bep hiding, Duh dah bei mihonpi chu changsi banga kitol mang ding ahi. Mitphet kah louva hung chuti ding ahi.
Thaneipen Pakaiyin nangma hi Van gin thong leh ling kihot pum, Ogin thongje ju leh chimpeiya chuleh khopihuiya, Chujong leh mi halvam jeng meikonga nahung vilding ahi.
Chutengleh namtin vaipia kon mihonpi, Ariel douna galsat ho, Akhopi douna leh akulpi douna Galsat’a akhopi bolgenthei jouse chu Jan mang bep hung hiya, jan manga thil kimubep hi ding ahiuve.

Chule mi agilkel’an amanga an aneh jia Ahung khah phat le la ava chomdeh lou tobang ding; Mihem dangchah-in amanga twi adon jia Pannabeiya ahung khah tengleh adang chah achimlou banga, Zion molsang douna galsat Namtin vaipi chu abonchauva chutobanga hung um ding ahiuve.
Kilungdon sah-uvin lang lungdong tah tah-uvin, Kimitchot sah-uvin lang mitcho jeng uvin! Kham uvin lang, jun vang kham hihuvin; Lonle leuvin lang, khamna theiyin vang lonle hih-uvin!
Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin nachunguva Ihmutsetna lhagao khat ahin bung lhan, Themgao ho jong namit’u akisin sah-in, Chule mitva nei jouse naluchungu akhu khum tai.

Nangho dingin mu kinei hicheng hi mohor kinamden lekhabu sunga thucheng ho abang jenge. Mihon hiche lekhabu simthei khat chu gape hen lang hitin seileh, “Hiche hi sim temmo ong,” tileh; aman, “Ahithei hih-e, mohor akinamden bouve.” tinte.
Chule lekhabu chu asim thei lou khat kipe hen lang hitin kisei hen, “Hiche hi sim temmo ong,” kitileh; aman, “Keiman lekha kasim theipoi.” tinte.

@@Hichun Pakaiyin adonbut’in aseitai. “Hiche mite hi akamsung uvin naichan ahung umuvin, Chule akam’uvin eijaboluvin, Alungthimula keiya kona gamla tah ahi; Chule eigin u jong hi Mihem thupeh jeng chinhat’a achin jeh-u ahibouve;

Hichejeh chun neihin vetan, hiche mite dinga hi Datmo umtah thil, thil kidang, datmo tah kahinbol kit ding; Amichingteu chihna hung mangthah soh-a, Hetkhenna neithei amiteu hetkhenna hung kisel mang ding ahi,” ati.
Ohe ada ahiuve, akithumop nau Pakai jah dia im-mang ho; Anatoh jouseu muthim lah dimset’a Chule hita seiji ho, “Koiham eiho eimu uva, koiham eiho eiheuvah?” ti ho!

Nangho thil akhup athala leh ho! Bel dengpa chu bel lei kihisah ngaiya, Thilsem chun asempa jah a,“Ama hin eisempoi,” atia; Thil gontohsa chun agongtoh pa jah a, “Aman hetkhenna aneipoi,” tia asei ngaiyam?
Chomcha kah louva Lebanon hi louma phatah kihisah a, Louma ga phatah chu gammang kihisah jeng lou ding ham?
Hiche nikho chuleh nangongin lekhabua thu kisei ho hin jan tin, Muthim le khojing lah a mitchote mit’in kho amu ding ahi.
Chuteng mi lungneng ten Pakaiya kipana thah kimun tin, Miho lah a vaichate vang Israel Mithengpa a kichoisang ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile duh dah bei mi chu hung mangthah ding ahi, Mi musit pa chu hungbei paiya Chule agilou bol dinga ngah jing ho Kisat lha soh ding ahiuve;
Thu kamkhat’a mi thilse bol hisah jenga, Kelkot phunga adih bolgo ho kipalna thang kampeh ho, Adih a umpa jeng jong Kamthem mana alep’a heilha jeng ho.
Hichejeh chun Pakai, Abraham lhatdampun Jacob insung chung chang thudola hitin aseitai, “Jacob chu kijumso kit louhel ding, Amai jong ngui kit louhel ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile aman alailunga kakhutsoh achate amu tengleh Kamin athensouva, Jacob Mithengpa chu athenso diu Israel Pathen chu hagin a agin diu ahi.
Chutengle lhagaova hetkhel neiho jong chun Ahin hetkhen theiyuva; Mi phun chel ho jong chun Hilchahna ahin kisan thei dingu ahi.” ati.
Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Ohe ada ahiuve, doumah mah bol chate; Keima gon hilouhel thilgon khat podoh, Keima lhagaova hilouhel Chonset chunga chonset bolbe be nading a Kiloi khomna khat semdoh ho;
Keima thumop hoi louhel a Egypt lam jona kijot suh a, Pharaoh thaneina noiya Kisel ding kigoa; Egypt lhaving noiya Kiselna kihol ho!
Hichejeh a hi Pharaoh thaneina chu Nangho kijumso na hung panga, Egypt lhaving noiya kiselna chu Nakisuh neo nauva pang ding ahi.
Ajeh chu Zo’an khoa milente atouvuva, Apalai hon Ha’nes kho aphah tah vanguvin;
Amaho phatchomsah joulou mitea kon-in Mijouse chunga jachatna ahung lhungin, Hiche chun panpina la apepon phatchomna jong alhut peh poi Jachatna le gentheina bou ahiye,” ati.

Negeb gam gamsa ho thudola thuchih. Gamna le hesohna hung konna gam, Sakei le keichal hung kondohna gam, Gulse leh gulsum hung konna gama Amahon ahaona jouseu sangan chunga ahin pouvin, Athil khol chengseu sangongsao chunga ahin pouve, Amaho phatchom sah joulou Mite henga dingin.
Egypt mite kithopina chu pannabei leh ahomsa ahijeh-in Keiman Egypt hi “Rahab touthim beh-nu,” kati.
Tun chen lang amasanguva song pheng chunga gasun tan, Chule lekhabu sung khat’a jih lut’in Hita chu phat hung lhung nikhoa, tonsot tonsot geiya Hettohsah khat’a ahung pan theina dingin.
Ijeh-inem itile amaho hi doumah mah a chon mite, Mijou chapate, Pakai hilchahna nahsah lou chapate ahiuvin;
Mitvanei ho jah a, “Imacha mu hihuvin,” tia, Themgao ho jah a, “Keiho henga adih chu gao dauvin lang, Thil nom lam lam kahenguva seiyun, Alhem lhem ho chubou gaojo tauvin;
Lampi dalhauvin lang, lamlen a konin kihei mangun, Israel Mithengpa chu kamasang uvah phapoh kit tahih-uvin,” tiho!
Hichejeh hin Israel Mithengpan adonbut’in hitin aseiye, “Nanghon hiche thu nadon dauva, Bolgentheina leh gitlouna natahsan uva Hicheng chunga chu ki-ngaiya nahiu ahin;
Hichejeh a chu hiche setna hi nachunguva hung lhung ding, Pal sangtah kivochim banga, alhu ding kona hung jalgei guiya, Hetman louhela hung lhu lham jeng banga Hung lhu lha jeng ding;

Chuta chu akitakeh jong bel dengpa bel kitat keh banga, Lah thei beihel a kivogoiya, ahalsi lah a chu Thuh phunga mei al lona ding jeng hihen lang Twi kuna twi thalna ding hijongleh kimudoh jou lou ding ahi,” ati.

Ijeh-inem itile Pakai Pathen Israel Mithengpan hitin aseiye, “Hung kile kit’in kicholdo leu chun huhhingin umjouvin natin, Thipbeh chan umun tahsan leu chun hatjouvin nate,” ati. Ahinla nanghon nadei pouvin,

Chuti sang chun nanghon, “Ahipoi, sakol chunga kalhai eujel diu ahi,” natiuve; Hichejeh a chu nalhai mang pai pai jeng diu ahi. Chule, “Keiho sakol lhai hat hat’a katou diu ahi,” natiuvin, Hijeh tah a chu nangho nungdel ho jong Hung lhai jangkhai cheh ding ahiuve.

Mi khatseh hohsal vanga mi sang khat jam mang ding, Mi nga seh seh hohsal vanga Molsang vuma ponlap kikhai pheleng leng bang, Thing lhanga ponlap kikhai kileh le le banga Nakidalhah thip kahseuva Najam najam jeng dingu ahi.

Ahivangin Pakaiyin nangho lungset din na-ngah ngah-uvin, Nangho khoto theina dingin Amatah akichoi sangin ahi; Ijeh-inem itile Pakai chu Thutan dihna Pathen ahin, Ama ngah jing ho chu anun nom ahiuve.
Ajeh chu, Vo Ziona cheng mite leh Jerusalema chengte; nang ho naka kit louhel dingu ahitai. Nataona oginu ajah teng leh nalungset tei tei diu ahiye; ajah doh tih tih nadonbut jeng diu ahi.
Pakaiyin gimna chang lhah napeh-uva, bolgentheina twi napeh vangun, nangho mihil pan amai asel mang kit lou ding, namit tah-uva nanghon mihilpa chu namu vah dingu ahi.
Chutengleh nanung lamuva konin nanabenguva thu kisei jauvin natin, hita asei ding, nakijet hei nakivei hei tengu leh, “Lampi hiche hi ahiye, hichea hin cheuvin,” ati ding ahi.

Hiche teng chuleh nanghon dangka a kitomjol milim semthu kijempol ho le sana a kitomjol milim kilhajol chengse chu nasuh thang dingu ahi. Hichengse chu thil theng louva nathe thang soh-uva, ajah a jong, “Kitol mangin!” nati dingu ahi.
Aman leiset’a namuchi tu chu gotwi hinchap’in tin, leiset gasoh chu hung pha theiya hung thalhing ding ahin; hiche nikho chuleh nagancha jong hamhing tamna lah lah a hung lhale ding ahi.
Chule bongchal ho leh sangan ho leiset’a loukai ho jengin jong anneh tui tah tah aneh diu, changkhea kilhachila kangkuiya kikui chilsa geiya aneh diu ahi.
Mi tamtah akitha ni, intingvum jouse alhuh nikho chuleh molsang jouse leh thinglhang sang lai jousea twi lonna vadung hung longlha cheh ding ahi.

Hiche kalvala jong chu lhavah jeng jong nisa vah bang jenga, nisa vah jong ajat sagi jena vah ding, nisagi sunga avah jat kigom bang ding ahi, Pakaiyin amite kisuh khahna akhuipeh a, genthei tah a aman adena amavo na jouse aboldam ni leh chuti ding ahi.
Vetan, gamla tah a konin Pakai min ahung kithang thangin, Alunghan kouje jun meikhu kijel let lut’in ahunge; Akamsung jong lungsatna adimset’in, Aleigui la mi kavam jeng thei meikong abange;
Ahai husa gin jong ngong geijena soh Vadung twisoh kikhang jeju abangin; Namtin vaipi hi hopkhen khena manthah sah dingin agon, Akikai mangna diu mipi kamsunga kamdal bupeh din agoi.
Kut theng akiman jan banga nanghon la kisa najah dingu ahi; Pakai molsang lam, Israel Songpi phunga theile kimut ging alungthim kipah thanoma potdoh a chepa tobang nahi dingu ahi.
Chutengleh Pakaiyin alal loupi ogin chu akijah sah a, chule alungsat nasatah, mi vallhum thei meikong, le khopihui chule gel toh hung kitol lhah tha a amijepna abanjang chu akimudoh sah ding ahi.
Pakaiyin amoljola ahin den tengleh aogina chu Assyria mite kihot lhul gam ding ahiuve.
Chule Pakaiyin achunguva ahin chuh sah ding engbolna tenggola aden gin jeng jong chu khutbeh gin le selangdah gin bang ding; aman khut kilehpela akisatpi ding ahiuve.

Ijehinem itile thuh khuh khat masang peh a pat gonsa um ahitan; lengpa dinga gonsa ahi; a thing lom jong a lhuh a lhuh, alet’a len ahin, mei le thing lhingset ahiye; Pakai hai husa chu katsong luidunga long bangin akouje jun ahi.

O he ada ahiuve, kithopi ngaicha Egypt’a che ho, Chule sakol ho vanga kisong ho; Kangtalai atam jeh a kisonna neiya Sakol touthem mi atam jeh a Kisonna nei ho; Israel Mithengpa lam kat louva, Pakai doh a neilou ho!
Ahivangin Pakai chu chingtah ahin, manthahna ahin lhunsah jie; Aseisa thu jong aim mangpon, Thil gilou bolte insung douna hung kipatdoh ding, Chonset bolte panpi ho douva hung pang ding ahi.

Egypt mite chu Pathen ahipouve; Asakolteu jong tahsaphe mai mai ahin lhagao ahipoi. Pakaiyin akhut ahinjah teng, Mi panpi chu kisep lhua, Chule akipanpi pa jong kipal lhu ding, Anilhona lhu sap cheh lhon ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin kei jah a hitin aseitai. Sakei ahiloule anou asahing neh chunga akitaule leo Adeljam dinga kelngoi ching mihon khat akikou tengleh Ahusauva chu tija louva uma, aoginuva chu lungdoi louva umam? Hitobanga chu Pakai jong Zion mol sang chungleh athing lhangvuma Gal sat dinga hung kumlha ding ahiye.
Vachaten anoute aop khum banga, Thaneipen Pakaiyin Jerusalem ahuh ding ahi; Aman ahuh a ahuhdoh ding, Chule ahoidoh sah a chuteng alhadoh ding ahi,” ati.
Vo Israel chate, giltah a nadoupau henga hung kile kit’uvin.
Ijeh-inem itile hiche nikho chuleh nabonchauva nasemsau dangka milim, sana milim, chonsetna dinga nakhut tah-uva nakisemsau chu nahin pai mang cheh diu ahi.

“Chutengleh Assyria mi chu mihem chemjam hilou, Chemjama hung lou soh kei ding. Mihem chemjam hilou, Chemjam khat’in ahin satgam ding ahi; Assyria hiche chemjam masanga chu hung jam manga, Akhangdong mite jong engbolna na kitohsah ding ahiuve.
Asongpi jong tijat’a kitol mang ding, Avaibolte jeng jong kichat mana apanmun adalhah diu ahi.” Tin Pakai, Ziona ameikong uma, Jerusalema athuh khuh koipan aseiye.
Ven, leng khat’in adih-in lengvai hin pon tin, Leng chapaten jong thu adih-a atanuva vaihom diu ahi.

Abonchauva khopihuiya kiselna thei mun tobang hung hi diu, Huise lah a bel thei thingbo lah bang ding ahiuve: Leigo lah a twi dimset vadung long tobang hiuva Thacholna gama songpi lim tobang ding ahiuve.
Chutengle kho muthei ho mit chu kising lou ding, Kho jathei ho nakhangin kho ajah ding ahi.
Milung chavai ho lunggil in thu hetkhenje thema, Mipaomo ho leiguiyin jong baitah le thengsela thu asei ding ahi.
Mi-ngol chu alen alal kiti kit louhel ding, Duh dah bei mi chu ja umtah kiti louhel ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile mi-ngolin ngol thu jeng aseiyin, Chule alunggil in jong aphalou jeng angaitoi; Pathen hetphah louva chonna hihen lang, Pakai chung chang thudola adih lou bol ding hileh; Agilkelte gilkel vahva louva dalhah ding hihen, Adang chah ho dang chah donpeh lou ding hijong leh angaitoi.
Duh dah bei mi duh dah lou ahina chengse chu agilou ahin, Aman thil gilou jeng jeng agong jin ahi: Nelou chaloute dihna hihen, Vaichate hijeng jongleh suhmang din bou angaitoi.
Amavang mi nasan thil nasa jengbou angaiton, Thil nasatah tah-in apansai.
Hung thoudoh-uvin, thei nomtah a um numei ho, Keima ogin hung ngaiyuvin; Anop apeh a lam chanute, Kathusei hung ngaiyuvin.
Kum khat valjep jou teng leh Nakiho lhuh dingu ahi, nangho numei nomsa ho; Ijeh-inem itile lengpithei hung galou ding, Theiga hung lhung lou ding ahi.
Kitihot’uvin, naning nanop’a um numei ho, Kihot lhuluvin numei nomsa ho; Kihoh lhauvin lang nakeo changseh-in lhauvin, Chule nataibuh a khaodip pon kiveiyuvin.
Loumun lungdei tah tah ho leh theiga phatah tah jeh-in Na omlhang beng beng jenguvin;
Ajeh chu kamite leiset hi lingle khao akeh dimtan, Kipana khopi sunga kipana in jouse jong adimtai.

Ijeh-inem itile leng inpi jong hung kidalha thip’a, Japi chenna khopi jong kidalha hel ding; Thing lhang le kho-nga na intingvum sang jong chu Atonsot’a gamsa chenna hung hi ding, Gamlah sangan ho dinga jong kipana joh hiya Kelngoi hon ho lhat lena hamhing lah soh ding ahi.
Chung lama kona ichunguva lhagao ahung kibuh lhah a, Gamthip lah jong louma ga pha tah ahidoh a, Loumun ga phatah chu Gammang banga akigel kahsen.
Chuteng leh gammang lah jenga jong thu adih a kitan ding, Louma phalai jousea jong adih hung leng ding ahi.
Adih aumjeh a chu chamna hung uma, Adih alenjeh a Atonsot geiya dia thipbeh cha Tahsanna um ding ahi.
Kamite chu lung mong tah Chenna muna hung chenguva, Chenna mundet le thipbeh a kicholdona mun dunga Hung cheng diu ahi.
Chule gel alhah teng gammang lah lhamat jeng ding, Khopi jong chu kiphetmai hel ding ahi.
Twi panga muchi tu ho anun nom ahiuvin, Bongchal le sangan keng somlou ho chu anun nom ahiuve.

Ohe nada ahi, misu mangpa, nangma tah jeng jong kisu mang loulai pa; Joule nal dimset, koimachan ajou lhep khah loulai pa! Nangman nami suhmang na-ngah teng, Nangma nakisu mang ding ahi; Chule nangman jouva mi nalhep nangah teng leh Nangma jou jenga nakilhem ding ahiye.
O Pakai, keiho neilungset’uvin, Kei hon nang jeng ka ngah jingui; Jingkah seh leh kei ho ban Thahat’in pangin lang, Thohgim phat seh leh Kei ho huhhingin hung pangin!
Van gin kithong chun namtin ajam tauvin, Nangma nakichoi sang phat’in namtin vaipi akithe cheh tai.
Thil kichom doh chu tang-ngol kikhol khom bangin akikhol khomin, Khao khopi kichop bangin achunga chun mihem akichom tai.
Pakai chu choisangin aume, ajeh chu ama chung lama cheng ahi; Aman Ziona thu adih-a atana adih jeng adipset ding ahi.
Chule Pakai chu nakhanga nadin detna hiya, Huhhingna thalhingset leh chihna chule hetna hi ding; Pakai ginna chu agou kikhol ahiye.
Vetan, gal-hang ho chu apeng det dut’uvin, Chamna thuseiya che ho chu lhase tah-in akap’uve.
Lamlen jouse jong akeo hel jengin, Lam lhah a vahle mi jong athip tai. Kitepna akisukeh tan, Hettohsah a pang jong akinot thap’in, mihem khohsahna jong aumpoi.
Gamsung alunghemin, alung hesoh-e. Lebanon akisudongin ago lhan; Sharon jong nelgam a bang jengin, Bashan le Carmel jong ana apul lhatai.
Tun “Keima kipatdoh ing ting,” tin Pakaiyin aseiyin; “Tun keima kitahsanging ting, Keima kichoisang ing kate.
Changsia nahung gaiyuva, changpol nahin dingu ahin; Nahaina husau chu meikonga panga, Nahin leogep diu ahi.
Chule mitin mitang chu ngunsong kihulgo banga kihulgouva, Ling kisat lha a meikonga kihalvam tobang hiding ahiuve,” ati,
Ngaiyuvin, nangho gamla tah a um ho, ipi kaboldoh hi tam; Chule nailama um hon jong kathahat na phongdoh-uvin.

Ziona michonse ho chu kichatnan alosoh tan, Pathen hephalou ho akitihot lhul tauve; “Eiho lah a koipen ham mihalvam jeng thei meikong toh geh khom theiya? Eiho lah a koipen ham tonsot meikong toh geh khom theiya chu?” atiuve.

Adih tah a lam jot a, adih dih a thusei pa, Bolgentheina kona phatchomna kimu ho deilou pa, Nehguh kilahna dinga akhut thinglha jeng pa, Thisan sona thu kisei ngailou pa, Agilou thil vetna dinga Amit teni hasah loupa,
Ama chu chung sanga cheng ding, Akihuhna ding kulpi kikai ho jong songpi jeng hiya; A-an neh ding kipe jing ding, Atwi don ding jong beimoa um ding ahi.
Lengpa chu amel-hoi laitah namit tenin amu ding, Gamla kijal tah khat amudoh lhon ding ahi.
Nalunggil a natija ja jeng ding, “Sum simtoh pa chu hoiya um hita, Kai kidong tetoh pa chu hoilama um hitam? Intingvum insang simtoh pa hoiya umah ham?” nati ding ahi.
Mi louchal ho namu kit louhel ding, Apao kicheh lou nahetdoh joulou Aleigui oh dot dot’a thusei jong Nahet khen thei lou umlou ding ahi.

Lhentum kut ibolnau Zion chungvum khu ve temin, Namit’a Jerusalem namu ding ahi; Thip beh cha chenna, toldoh theilou ponbuh kisonna, Akhom kikhenlut ho kibotdoh kit louhel ding, Akhao jang khat cha jong Kibot tan louhel ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh hikoma chu Pakaiyin alal loupina ei panpi diu Vapi dung lentah leh vacha dung kijal tah a long ding; Kong innei chena thei vang hipontin, Kong innei lentah tah kitol thei lou ding ahi.
Ajeh chu Pakai chu thutan pa ahin, Pakai chu eiho vaihom pa ahi; Pakai chu eiho lengpa ahin, aman eihuhhing diu ahiye.

Nakong tolna ponkhao akilham kange, Kong tolna pondal aumna muna ahendet thei lou ding, Kong kitol jong chu Pon kijal jah a alha thei lou ding ahi. Chuteng leh neh dingle thil kichom ho nengtah a kihom ding, Elbai jengin jong neh ding akilah ding ahi.
Jerusalema cheng ho khat chan jong, “Kadampoi,” atilou ding, Asunga cheng miho athemmonau kingaidam ding ahi.
Vo namtin vaipi, thu ngaidin hung naiyun, Vo mitin namtin miten ngaitemun; Leiset leh achunga cheng jousen ngaiyuvin; Vannoi leiset leh asunga peng jousen ngaiyuvin.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai chu namtin vaipi dounan aphin lung hanguvin, Asepaiteu chunga alung hang cheh-e Amaho chu asugam soh keiyin Thagam dingin abonchan apedoh tai.
Amiu thasa jouse kipai doh-in tin, Athilong jouse hung namse lheh ding ahi; Molsang jouse chunga Athisanu hung long ding ahi.
Van loupina jouse jong mon manga, Van laijol phehjol banga hung kijela Aloupina jouse jong Hung lha mang ding, Lengpigui na pul bang ding, Theichang na pul bang ding ahi.
Ajeh chu kachemjam in vana achimset adontan, Vetan, Edom mite chung leh Kasuh mangsa mite chunga thutan din Chemjam ahung leng lhai.

Pakaiyin chemjam khat aneiyin, Thisan anat jeng jungin; Sathao anujol sel jengin, Kelngoite le kelchalte thisan anat’e; Kelngoichal ho kal teni Thisan anat jengjunge, Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin Bozrah khoa kilhaina gantha ding aneiyin, Edom gamsunga tha ding tampi akoiye.
Gam bongchal te toh thi tha’uvin tin, Bongchal hat tah tah jong bongnou toh kijam khom diu ahi. Agamsungu thisanin achup ding, Aleiset’u jong sathao hungjol ding ahi.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin phulahna ding nikho khat aneiyin, Zion khohsahna lethuhna ding kum khat aneiye.
Edom vadung jouse jong boldung soh ding, Aleiset jong chu kathmei song soh a; Agamsung chu Boldung savevu soh doh ding ahiye.
Sun le jana mitlou hel ding, Ameikhu kitung jing jeng ding ahi. Akhang khanga akeohela kijama, Imachan jong ajotpa kit louhel ding ahiye.
Chammu le saleiyin chenna aneiya, Simbupi le va-ah-in chenna anei ding ahiye. Pakaiyin achunga kisuh lung dongna amoljol ahinjama, Amilalte chunga nohphahna songkhai intena akhai ding ahi.
Amin jong ‘Lenggam umlouna mun’ asah diu, Chuteng leng chapate abonchauva imacha hilou ding ahiuve.
Apal dunga lingnang kaiya, Akulpi dunga jong ling le khao hung keh ding; Kamkeite chenna hung hiya, Va-ngongsao te chenna hung hi ding ahiye.
Gamsa ho leh ngeihon hung lha khoma, Lho min jong aloi agol akou ding Janvah thilha nu jengjong hung kumlha Kicholdo muna anei ding ahiye.
Hikoma chu simbupi hung busa, atui athah a, Noukeu ding, alhaving noiya anoute akhop khom ding ahi. Muleng lai jouse jong hung kikhomuva, Achal le api akop kop’a hung kikhom ding ahiuve.

Pakai lekhabua konin holuvin lang chule simtem uvin, Hiche ho hi khat cha jong mang thah louva um cheh ding, Khat chabeh hi akiloipi beiya umlou ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile Pakai Kamsungin thu aseipeh tan, Chule Alhagaovin amaho chu akhom khomsoh tai.
Pakaiyin amaho dingin vang asandoh peh tan, Akhut tah-in asekhenpeh-in agol golin akoipeh tai; Edom chu tonsot geiya alo’uva, Akhang khanga asunga cheng ding ahiuve.
Gammang lah le sainou lah hung kipah-in tin, Nelgam jong hung kipah a hampa louhing asep doh ding; Uikep pah banga

Thalhingset’a hung pah a, Kipah le thanoma la asah ding, Lebanon loupina chu kipen tin, Carmel le Sharon lal loupina jong chang ding ahi. Amahon Pakai loupina leh Eiho Pathen lal loupina chu ahinmu dingu ahi.
Khut ngoiho chu tha hatsah-uvin lang, Khupbuh kithing thing ho chu pandet sah-uvin.

Alungthima kiphalam geova um ho jah a chun, “Thahat’uvin lang kicha hih-uvin, Ven, na-Pathenu chu phula dinga hung ding, Pathen mi lethuhna ahinpoh ding ahi. Ama hunga Nangho nahung huhhing dingu ahiye” tiuvin.
Chutengle mitchote mit kihasah intin, Nangongte nakhang kihongsoh ding;

Chutengle keng baiya um chu sakhi chop’a kichom ding, Paomote leigui kilhama kipa la asah dingu ahi. Ijeh-inem itile gammang lah a twi tampi hung longdoh intin, Chule nelgam sunga jong vadung tampi hung long ding ahi.

Neldi sathe thu jong twikul hungsoh gam ding, Tolgo lah a jong twisam hung putdoh ding; Ngeite kokhuh dung jong chu si lah hung hi ding, Hamhing keh jong chu pumpeng ho leh theiphung jeng hi ding ahi.
Chule lamlen khat hung kilhungin tin, Hiche chu ‘Lampi Theng’ kiti ding ahi; Miboh atheng lou jousen hiche lampi chu ajot louhel ding, Mi-ngolten jong asunga chu adihlou abol louhel diu ahi.
Hichea chu sakei jong hungvah le lou ding. Chule sahingne gamsa khat’a khat cha jong hung lut lou ding ahi; Asunga chu hiche ho hi khatcha kimudoh louhel ding, Lhatdamte chubou vahle ding ahiuve.

Chutengleh Pakaiyin achohsate chu hung kilekit’uvin tin. La sah pum puma Zion ahinjot diu ahi; Alu chunguva chun tonsot kipana kitot uvin tin, Kipana le thanopna akimu dingu, Gimna leh thoh sahsa chu Jammang ding ahitai.
Hezeki’ah lengpa lengchan kum som le kum li lhin kumin Assyria lengpa Sennach’erib chu Judah gam kulpi kikaikhum khopi jouse sat dingin ahung konin, abonchan ajousoh-e.
Assyria lengpa Lachish khoa konin Rab’shakeh chu sepai tamtah toh Jerusalem lengpa Hezeki’ah henga asoltan ahi. Rab’shakeh chu sahlam twikul, ponsoppa lou lampia twikai phunga chun agadinge.
Hichea chun ahenga insung vaipoa pang, Hilki’ah chapa, Eli’akim le lekhasun pa Shebna toh thuching pa, Asaph chapa, Jo’ah toh ahunguve.
Rab’shakeh chun amaho jah a, “Hezeki’ah jah a chun gaseiyuvin lang, ‘Leng len tah, Assyria lengpan hitin aseiye, “Nangma ipi chung pena kisonga hitobang loma lungdet’a kicholdo nahim?
Thucheng kisei mai mai ho nangman galsatna themna leh thahatna dana nagel ham? Tua hi koipen chunga kisonga nahiya hita hi keima neidou ham?
Ven, nangma, achunga kingaipen pen dotvang jeng thei, peng tenggol kiheh chipsa tobang Egypt chunga kisonga nahi. Egypt lengpa Pharaoh chu achunga kingai jouse dinga hi tobang chu ahiye.

Ahin nangman kajah a, ‘Keiho ka-Pathenu chunga kisong kahiuve,’ ti jongle chun; hiche Pathen chu hilouham amunsang jouse le maicham jouse Hezeki’ah-in atolmang peh a, Judah le Jerusalem jah a, “Hiche maicham masanga hin Pathen chibai boh-uvin,” tia aseipeh chu?
Hijeh chun tun khohsah tah-in kapu Assyria lengpa henga natahsa tah-in kihoutohna hung neiyin. Keiman achunga tou ding nakimu jou dinga ahileh sakol sang ni napenge.
Chuti jongle Egypt mite kangtalai ho leh sakol touthem ho chunga naki-ngai laisea kapu sepai aneopen lah a lamkai khat jeng jong iti nanungno jou ding ham?

Hiche kalval jong chun keima hiche gamsung kidoupia, asumang dinga kahung jeng hi Pakai thusah hi lou ham? Pakai chun kajah a, ‘Chetouvin lang hiche gam hi kidoupin gasu mangtan, ati.’ tin gasei tauvin.” ati.

Chuphat’in Eli’akim le Shebna chule Jo’ah chun Rab’shakeh jah a, “Lungset tah-in nasohte jah a Aramaic paovin thu seiyin, keihon hiche pao chu kahet’u ahi; hiche pal vuma um mite hetphah dingin keiho henga Judah paovin thu seida tan,” atiuleh;

Rab’shakeh chun, “Kapun thu hicheng hi nangho leh napu u kom mai maiya seipeh dinga eihinsol hiya naboluva, aeh-u kineh a, ajun twi kidona nangho toh manthah tha ding, hiche mite palvuma touho henga seipeh dia eihinsol hilouva nabolu ham?” tin aseitai.
Hiti chun Rab’shakeh jong adingin, Ogin sang tah-in Judah pao chun lhang asamin, “Assyria lengpa, lenglenpa thusei hicheng hi ngaiyuvin!
Lengpa chun hitin thu aseiye, ‘Hezeki’ah chu kilhep lhahsah hih-uvin, ajeh chu aman nahuhdoh jou lou dingu ahiye.
Hezeki’ah chun Pakaiya nakison sah dau hen lang hitin jong tida hen, “Pakaiyin thon louhelin eihuhdoh-uvin tin, hiche khopi hi Assyria lengpa khut’a kipedoh louhel ding ahi,” tin.

Hezeki’ah thu ngai hihuvin; ijeh-inem itile Assyria lengpan hitin aseiye, “Kei toh chamna kisemuvin lang kahenga hunguvin, chutile nangma lengpithei cheh nakineh-uva, natheichang ga cheh nakineh diu, natwikula twi cheh nakidon dingu ahi;
keima kahunga nangho gamsung tobang khat, chang le lengpitwi umna gam, changlhah le lengpilei tampi umna gamsung khat’a kapui mang masanguvin.
Ching theiyun, achutiloule Hezeki’ah-in hita aseiya, ‘Pakaiyin eihuhdoh nauvinte,’ tia napui mang dingu ahi. Namtin vaipi lah a apathenu koi pen chun agamu Assyria lengpa khut’a kona ahuhdoh khah am?
Hamath le Arpad miho pathen ho chu hoilamba hitam? Sepharva’im ho pathen jouse hoiya ba um hitau vam? Hiche ho chun keima khut’a kona Samar’ia khopi ahuhdoh nah am?
Hiche gam mite lah a pathen ho koipen chun keima khut’a agam ahuhdoh peh a Pakai chun keima khut’a kona Jerusalem ahuhdoh ding ham?’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Ahivangin amaho athip beh-uvin thucheng khat chan jong adonbut pouve, ajeh chu, “Hichepa khu nadonbut lou diu ahi,” tia kisei lengpa thupeh umsa ahi.

Hichun insung vaipoa pang Hilki’ah chapa Eli’akim leh lekhasun pa Shebna toh chule thu chingpa Asaph chapa Jo’ah chu Hezeki’ah henga ahunguvin, aponsil chengseu kibottel pumin Rab’shakeh thusei ho chu ahung seipeh tauve.
Hezeki’ah chun hiche hi ajahdoh phat’in aponsil abottel in atahsa tah-in khaodip pon akikhun, chuin Pakai insunga alut tai.
Chujongle aman insung vaipopa Eli’akim leh lekha sunpa Shebna toh thempu masa ho chu khaodip pon kisil pumin Amoz chapa Isaiah henga asoltai.
Amahon Isaiah jah a, “Hezeki’ah-in hitin aseiye, ‘Tuni hi hesoh nikho, beh lhah nikho chule vetda nikho ahi; ijeh-inem itile naosente apengdoh kigon, ahinla ahung pen lhah jengna diu thahat aumpoi.

Pakai na-Pathen uvin Rab’shakeh kitipa apupa Assyria lengpan Pathen Hing dai chavai dinga ahinsolpa thusei ho chu ajahna thei dingle Pakai naPathen uvin athujah chengse chu ahin beh lhah theina dingin, hijeh chun akidalha amoh chengse dingin sang tah-in taovuvin,’ tin aseiye,” agatiuvin ahi.
Hezeki’ah lengpa lhacha ho chu Isaiah henga ahung phat’uvin
Isaiah chun ajah-uva, “Napu u jah a chun hitin gaseiyuvin; ‘Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye, “Assyria lengpa lhachaten keima eiphin nau thu kisei najah chengse jeh chun nangma kicha loujenin.

Vetan, keiman Sennach’erib sunga lhagao khat lhalut’ing ting, chuteng aman thuthang khat ajah a agamsung lama kilekit ding ahi; keiman agamsung lam agei tengle chemjama kalousah ding ahi,” ati’tin gaseipeh tauvin,” ati.
Rab’shakeh chu ahung kilekit’in ahileh Assyria lengpa chu Libnah khopi douna agalsat pet ahung toh khai; ajeh chu Lachish khoa konin anapotdoh tai, ti ajatai.

Hichun lengpan Ethiopia lengpa Tirha’kah chung changa thu kisei, “Nangma douna nakisatpi dingin ama ahung kontai,” tin ajatai. Aman hiche hi ajah phat’in Hezeki’ah henga sottolle ho asolin hitin aseiye,
“Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah henga chu hita nasei dingu ahi, ‘Kingaina nanei na-Pathen chun Jerusalem hi Assyria lengpa khut’a apehdoh lou ding ahi, tin kitepsah-in lang kilhep lhah sah hih beh-in.
Vetan; nangman nathujah chengse hi, itobang tah a Assyria lengpan gam jousea thil abola, amite jouse asuh manghel jeng hi tam! Nangma jong eiki huhdoh inte natim?
Namtin vaipite pathen hon amaho ahuhdoh mong hinam, kapu kapaten anasuh mangsa namtin vaipi ho, Gozan ho, Haran ho, Rezeph ho chule Telas’ser a chengte Eden mite chu?
Hamath lengpa hoilamba hita, Arpad lengpa hoilamba hita, Sepharva’im khopia lengpa hoilama um hita, Hena lengpa hoilamba hita, lvvah lengpa hoilamba hitam?’ ati tin gasei uvin,” ati.
Hezeki’ah chun sottolle ho khut’a konin lekha thot chu alan asimtai; chuin Hezeki’ah jong Pakai inlama achetouvin, hiche chu Pakai angsunga aga lham lhan aphajaltai.
Hichun Hezeki’ah Pakai henga ataovin aseiye,
“Vo thaneipen Pakai Israel Pathen, Cherubim chunga laltouna toupa, nangma nachangseh a leiset lenggam jouse chunga Pathen nahin, nangman van le leiset jong nasem ahi.
Vo Pakai, nanakhang hindon lang chule ngaitemin; Pakai namit’in hin vetan, Pathen Hing daichavai dinga Sennach’erib’in mi ahinsola athusei jouse hi.
Vo Pakai, tahbeh mongin Assyria lengpan namtin vaipi leh alenggam jouseu achomgam tai;
chule apathen jouseu jong meilhum sunga aleh lut gam tauve; ajeh chu hiche ho chu Pathen hilou ahiuvin, mihem khutsem thing le song jeng ahibouvui; hichejeh a chu amaho kisu mang ahiuvin ahi.
O Pakai ka-Pathenu, tu hin keiho ama khut’a konin nei huhhing uvin, chutileh leiset lenggam jouse hin nang bou Pathen nahi, ti ahet thei diu ahi,” ati.
Hichun Amoz chapa Isaiah Hezeki’ah henga mi asolin hitin aseiye, “Pakai Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Assyria lengpa Sennach’erib chung thudola kahenga nahung tao jeh a
@@ama chung thudola Pakai thusei chu hiche hi ahiye; “Zion chanu nu-ngah nun Nangma nanot thap’in nahousei, Nanung lama aluchang athing thinge, Jerusalem chanu chun.
Koipen nadai chavai hiya, chule nahouset ham? Koipen douna na-ogin nasansah loi loi hiya Kiletsah tah a chunglam navet vet ham? Israel Mithengpa douna ham!

Nasohte namangin Pakai chu nadai chavaiye, Chule nangman naseiyin, keima kakangtalai tampi hin Molsang lai laiya kakaltouvin, Gamla tah Lebanon gamgil lai lai jong kageiye; Keiman Cedar thing asang pen leh chah thing phapen tah jong kaphuh lhun; A sang laipena jong kakaldoh-in Gammang thim cheh laiya jong kahungtai.
Keiman twikul tampi kalaiyin, Twi tampi jong kadon tai; Chule kakengto hin Egypt vadung jouse kathe kang soh tai.

Masangpeh a chu gontohsa kakoi ahitai, ti najah khah loulai ha? Tua kathilbol hi ni masa laipeh a kagonsa ahitan, Nangman kulpi kikai khum khopi tampi nasemdoh a, Chimgel gula alhuh lhuh a hung kisethom ding;

Achengte athahat jouseu kimeh lhasoh a, Lungthoiyuva kisu lung dong ding ahiuvin; Loujaova hamphung keh ho tobang ahiuve. Hampa nemcha tobang, Inchunga hampa keh tobanga Akhandoh masanga thidenji tobang ahi.
Natoupet jong, napotdoh le nahung lut le jong kahei, Keima douna nalunghan jong kahenai.

Keima douna nalunghan, Naham hoitho kanakhang teniaa ahung lut tah jeh hin, Keiman nanah hom sunga kathih koi phut’ing ting, Nakama kakamdal kabu ding, Chutengle nahungna lampia chu Nangma kanungno ding nahi.” ati.

Chule hiche hi nang dinga melchihna hiding ahi; tukum sunga ipi hijongle acham chama hung kehdoh chu nen lang, chule kum ni lhinna jong le hitobanga hung dondoh chu nen; chuteng kum thum lhin phat leh muchi natua aga nalo ding, lengpilei hon tampi nabola aga naneh ding ahi.
Judah insung mi ahingdoh amoh chengse noilama hung jungkho lut’in tin, chule chunglama hung gadoh ding ahi;
ijehinem itile Jerusalema konin amoh cheng aval ho chu hung umdoh intin, Zion molsanga ahingdoh hung um ding ahi. Thaneipen Pakai tom ngainan hiche hi ahinboldoh ding ahiye.

“Hichejeh chun Assyria lengpa chung chang thudola Pakaiyin hitin aseiye. ‘Ama hiche khopi sunga hi hung lut louhel ding, thalpi chang khat jong akap lou ding, lumpho amasanga jong hung kithah lou ding, adouna dinga leipal jong aset louhel ding ahi.
Ahung konna lampi ma ma kile kit ding, hiche khopi sunga hi hunglut louhel ding ahi,’ tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Ijeh-inem itile hiche khopi hi keima jeh le kasohpa David jeh a kahuhhing ding ahi,” ati.

Chuin Pakai Vantil apotdoh-in Assyria mite ngahmun chu adengin mihem sang ja khat le sang som get le sang nga a that gamtai; hiti chun jingkah a miho ahung jingtho phat’uvin, vetan, abonchan mithi long jeng anahiuve.
Chuphat’in Sennach’erib Assyria lengpa chu akipatdoh-in inlama achen Ninevah khopia acheng tai.

Aman apathen Nisroch insunga chibai aboh pet’in achapa teni Adram’melech le Share’zer-in ama chu chemjamin athat lhonin Ararat gamsunga ajamlut lhontai. Hijeh chun achapa E’sar-had’don chun ama khelin lengvai apon ahi.

Hiche lai chun Hezeki’ah adam mon thipai ding ahitai. Hichun Amoz chapa Isaiah chu ahenga ahungin ajah a, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Nainsung semtup tan, ajeh chu nangma nathi ding, nadamdoh lou ding ahitai.’ tin aseive.” ahungti.
Chuphat’in Hezeki’ah bangmai lang ngan akiheiyin Pakaiya ataovin,

chule aseitai, “O Pakai, tun keima neihin geldoh-in nahenga hung taovah kahi, keima itobang tah a kitahna lhingset le lungthim pumpia nangma angsunga lam jot kahiya, nangma mitmua itobang thilpha kanabol hitam,” atin; Hezeki’ah chu hakan akaptai.
Hichun Isaiah henga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin.
“Chen lang Hezeki’ah jah a gaseitan, ‘Pakai napa David Pathenin hitin aseiyc, “Keiman nataona kajan, nalhilon jong kamutai, ven, keiman nahinkho hi kum som le kum nga kajophe peh ding nahi.
Keiman nang le hiche khopi hi Assyria lengpa khut’a kona kahuhdoh a chule hiche khopi hi kapanhu ding ahi.
“Hiche hi Pakaiya hung kon nang dinga melchihna hi ding ahi, hita chu Pakaiyin athutep thil chu ahinbol ding ahiye,

ven, keiman nisa lhumsuh, alim Ahaz chunga che kimvelsa chu kalsom kanung chonsah kit ding ahi,’ ati tin seipeh-in,” ati. Hiti chun nisa alhumsuhsa akikimvelna a konin kalsom akinung chon kit’ in ahi.
Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah-in adammo anatna kona ahung damdoh nunga alekhasut chu:
“Keiman kaseiyin, kahin nikho dong laitah hi dalha a Keiding kumkho aum nalai chengse Noimigam gamsung kelkot jotna dinga gonsa eikikoiyah ahitai.
O Pakai chu mihing gamsunga kamu lou ding ahi tai; Vannoiya chengte lah a mihem mai jong kamu kit louhel ding ahitai.

Kachenna jong kelngoi chingpa ponbuh bangin Akiloichim in kakoma konin akitol mangtai; Pon khongnun thil ajeldoh bangin kahinkho hi akijeldoh tai, Kongdop kisat tan bangin eisat lhan ahi; Sun’a pat chun nilhah geiya Nangman nei suhbei soh ahitai.
Jingkah geiyin panpi ding kakou kouvin, Aman sakei bangin kagu kachang jouse aheh bonge; Sun’a pat nilhah geiya Nangman neisuh beisoh ahitai.
Pelpalep bang leh vakengsang bangin kapeng pengin, Vahui maovin kamaove; Chunglam kavet vetna kamit teni akhamin, O Pakai, bol gentheiyin kaume, nangma kei dingin hung kitungin!
Ipi kasei thei ding ham? Ajeh chu aman kajah a thu aseitai, Ama mong mongin hiche aboldoh ahitai. Kalhagao genthei behseh jeh in ihmu thei louvin ka umtai.
O Pakai, hicheng chunga hi miho kihinsona umah ahin, Hichenga hi keima lhagao jong hing theiya ahi. Oh, neidamsah kit’in lang Neihinsah kit tei teiyin!
Vetan, hiche kagentheina nasatah hi Keima khankhoa ding ahi; Nangman thina khuh sunga konin Kahinkho nahuhdoh kit’in ahi; Ijeh-inem itile nangman kachonset jouse Abonchan kanung lam senan naneitai.
Ajeh chu noimigam in la nangma thangvah thei pontin, Thinan jong nangma navahchoi thei lou ding ahi; Kokhuh sunga lutsa ho chun nangma kitahna jala Kinepna jong anei thei lou diu ahitai.
Mihinga mihing vang chun, Tunia keiman kabol bang hin nathangvah-e; Mipan chate ho henga chun Nangma kitahna ahetsah jin ahi.
Pakaiyin keima eihuhhingin tin, Chuteng keihon tumging to thoa Pakai insunga chu kahin laiseuva La kasah dingu ahiye,” kati.
Isaiah chun aseitai, “Amaho chun theichangga a kisem changlhah lhon khat lauhen lang, adamtheina dingin atipat laiya khun ganu u hen,” ati.
Chuphat’in Hezeki’ah chun, “Pakai inlam jona kache touna ding chu amelchihna ipiba hiding ham?” ati.
Hichepet chun Babylon lengpa Bal’adan chapa Mero’dach-bal’adanin Hezeki’ah chu anan chule adamdoh tai, ti ajah phat’in lekha thot tampi le thilpeh apohsah-in akoma dingin palai phabep asoltai.

Hezeki’ah chun amaho ana lamton, chule amaho chu athilkholna in avetsah-in, dangka ahin, sana ahin, thil gimnamtui ahin, thao namtui ahin, agalsat manchah ahin abonchan athil kholna dunga um jouse avetsah tai. Amaho avetsah lou chu ipi thil hijongleh ainsunga hihen agamsunga hileh, khatcha jong anei tapoi.

Hichun Isaiah themgao chu Hezeki’ah lengpa henga ahungin ajah a, “Hiche miho hin najah a ipi aseiyuva chule hoilama kona nahenga hung hiuvam ?” atileh; Hezeki’ah chun “Amaho hi gamla tah, Babylon gama kona kei henga hung ahiuve,” ati.
Chuphat’in aman, “Nangma insunga amaho hin ipi pi amudoh tah-um?” atileh; Hezeki’ah chun, “Kainsunga thil um jouse amusoh keitauve, amaho kavetsah lou kathil kholna in dunga umah abeihel tai,” ati.
Chutah-in Isaiah-in jong Hezeki’ah jah a chun, “Thaneipen Pakai thusei hi ngaiyin;

vetan, na-insunga thil um jouse leh napu napaten tuni geiya ahinkhol thil ho chu aboncha Babylon gam langa akipoh mangna ding nikho ahung naitul tul’e; thil imacha kidalha lou ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Chule nasung peng nachate phabep jong kikai mang ding ahi; amaho chu Babylon lengpa inpi sunga nukiso sohgam ding ahitauve,” ati.
Hichun Hezeki’ah-in Isaiah jah a, “Nangman nasei Pakai thusei chu aphabouve,” atitai. Ijeh-inem itile ama gela chu, “Keima hinlai sungin chamna le chendetna um nante” ati ahi.
“Lung monguvin, lung monguvin kamite, Tin na-Pathenuvin aseiye.
Jerusalem henga onem heochan gaseipeh-uvin lang. Akhankho ding akichaitai, tin gasam leuvin; Achonsetna akingaidamin, Pakai khut’a konin Achonset jouse ngaidamna ajat nin akimutai.
Ogin khat ahung kithongin. “Gammang lah a Pakai lampi semuvin lang, Neldi gama jong eiho Pathen dingin Lamlen semjang uvin.
Phaicham jouse hung kichoisangin tin. Molsang jouse leh thinglhang jouse kison nem ding; Leiset kitoh loulai jong hung chamdela, Tong lah jouse jong phaicham hungsoh ding ahi.
Chutengle Pakai loupina chu hung kilah intin, Tahsa a hing jousen ama loupina thakhat mua amu cheh ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile Pakai kamsungin thu aseitai.” ati.
Ogin thong khat’in, “Khosamin!” a tin; Chuin keiman, “Ipi kho kasap ding ham?” kati. Tahsa a hing jouse hi hampa ahin, Chule amel-hoi jong hi aboncha loujaova pahcha pah bep ahi.
Hampa agop jin, pahcha apuljie. Pakai husan ahinsem khah teng leh; Dih tah mongin Mipi hi hampa bep ahiuve.
Hampa agopjin, pahcha apuljie; I-Pathenu thusei vang tonsot’a ding jing ding ahi.

Vo Zion, kipana thupha lhangsam, Kaltouvin molsang chunga khun; Vo Jerusalem, kipana thupha lhangsam. Thanei tah-in na-ogin sansah-in; O sangin, kicha hih-in; “Ven, na-Pathenu khu” tin Judah khopi ho sei peh-in.
Ven, Pakai Pathen thanei tah-in ahungin, Abanjangin ama din vai ahompeh-e; Vetan, tohman apeh ding ahin choiyin, Alethuh nading amasanga a um jinge.
Aman kelngoi chingpa banga akelngoihon chu akivah ding, Kelngoite chu akhut tenia ahoi khoma A-angsunga akipom soh keiya, Anousen nei ho jong olcha apuile ding ahi.

Pathen khut phang tong sunga twivei chu koiham ate jou ding, Chule vanjouse atena khat’a melchih jou ding koiham, Leiya leivui jouse atena khat sunga thunsoh keiya Molsang jouse jong thiltena ho manga Tedoh thei ding leh Thinglhang jouse thil ten a tejou ding koiham?
Koiham Pakai Lhagao lampi kopeh thei ding leh Athumop’a pang banga ama hilchah theiya chu?
Ahetbena dinga Pakaiyin koipen adoh beh a Thu adih-a tanje kon ahil beh ham? Hetna chu kon Pakai ahil beh a Thil hetkhendol lampi kon avetsah beh ham?
Vetan, namtin vaipi hi baltina twi vat khat valha bep ahin, Thil tena chunga leivui bangin akisimbouve; Vetan, Pakaiyin twikol kah a leiset jong khu Sana pheng hoitah bangin akhohdoh-e.
Lebanon chu thing tia ti dingin jong lhing pontin, Asunga gamsa cheng ho jong pumgo thilto din alhingpoi.
Pakai angsunga namtin vaipi jong imacha hilou in aumin, Abonchauvin imacha lou leh ahomkeovin bou asime.
Chuti ahileh Pathen chu koipen toh nate dingu hiya, Ama chu ipi tobang thiltoh nate dingu ham?
Milim semthu! khut themin asemdoh, Sana kheng themin sanaa atomjola Chule hiche dinga chu
Thilpha lai lai kilhendoh pan thilto dingin akilhen jin, Thing tithei amot lou ding chu Aman thingthembol mi khut themtah aholdoh jin, Achat theilou milim kisemthu khat atundoh sah jie.
Nahet loulaiyu hiya, najah khah lou laiyu ham? Akipat tila pat najah uva jong kisei kha loulai ham? Leiset bulkhom kiphudoh a pat chu Nakiseipeh loulai helu ham?
Pathen chu leiset kolvel chunga toupa ahin, Leiset’a cheng ho chu khaokhopi tobang ahiuve; Pathenin van jong khu pondal kidal bangin adah jin, Asunga chenna theiyin ponbuh bangin adah jie.
Leng chapate jouse pannabeiyin akoiyin, Leiset vaihomte jong, imacha hilouvin alhai.

Lhasam tah a amaho chu Thingphung phu banga kiphut’a muchi tu banga kitu ahiuvin, Leiset’a det louhelin ajung khouvin ahi; Pathenin ahinmut khah tengleh ago gam jiuvin, Huipi le gosen abonchauvin Changpol bangin alhoh mangsoh jitauve.
Koipen to hin nanghon keima neitekah uva, Ama chutoh keima kakibah ding ham? tin Mithengpan aseiye.

Chunglam galdot’uvin lang vetemuvin, Hichengpi hi koipenin asem ham? Pathenin Vanmi janelte ahon honin apuidoh jin, Abonchauvin amin cheh-in akou jin ahi: Athahatna anasa behseh-in, Thaneitah ahin imacha alhasampoi.
Vo Jacob ipi dinga nasei hiya, Vo Israel ipi nasei ham; “Pakai koma kalampi akisel mangin, Ka-Pathenin keima dihna adondai,” tia?

Nahet khah loulai hiya, najah khah loulai ham? Pakai chu tonsot Pathen ahi, Leiset kol kimvel sempa ahi hi! Ama chu alhadah ngaipon, chol jong athachol ngaipoi; Thil ahetkhen themna jong hi Sophah joudan ahipoi.
Aman alhadahsa chu thahat apen. Athabeiya jong ahat sah cheh cheh jin ahi.
Khangdong ho jeng jong lhadah a thachol diu, Chule gollhang ho jong thabeiya lhulham diu ahi;
Amavang Pakai ngah jing ho chu Athau semthah-uvin tin, Muvanlai bangin alhan lengtouvun tin, Thachol louva lhaitou diu, Lhadah louhela Kijot ding ahiuve.
Vo twikhanglen kol gamsung dung, Thipbeh chan ngai temuvin; Mitin vaipin athau semthah uhen lang, Chutengle hin puilut uvin: Thu seisah uvin lang, Ibonchauvin thutanna mun jon temu hite.

Koipen ham niso lama kona mi khat hintildoh a Muntina galjou jou jeng pa chu? Atildoh pan a-angsunga namtin vaipi ahoilut peh jin, Hijeh chun aman leng ho jong keng chotphan aneiye; Achemjam in leivui len aleh jin, Athalpin changpol paidohsa abahsah jie.
Miho chu anung nungu adelin kisu khalouvin ajotdoh paiyin, Lamlen dung jong akengin ajot khapoi.

Koiham hiche thil hi gongdoh a chule boldoh pa, Thilsem kipat’a pat’a khangtina mi jouse kou jing jengpa chu? Keima Pakai kitipa hi kahin, akipatna leh akichaina toh umtha jing, Keima hi Ama chu kahiye.
Twikhanglen pang dung min amu uvin akichatauve. Leiset kolmong jouse jong akitihot gamtauvin ahi; Amaho ahung kikhin naiyuvin Chule ahung tauve.
Amitakip’in aheng akom akithopi, Chule asopipa jah a, “Hang tah-in pan gin,” ati.
Khut thempan sana khengpa atilkhouvin, Chule sehcha a vojola lungthang chunga khengpan, Akisolmatna chu hitin aseiyin, “Aphabouve,” ati. Akilon kit louna din Thingkilin akil det tauve.
Nangma kalhacha Israel, Kalhenchom Jacob, kajolpa Abraham chilhah;
Keiman leiset kolmong kimvel sunga kona ka lhendohpa, Gam mong gamla pena kona kakouva, najah a “Nangma kalhacha nahin, Keiman kalhendoh nahitai, napaidoh kit ponge,” kati.
Kicha hih-in, ijeh-inem itile keiman kaumpi jing nai; Lungthoi hih-in, ajeh chu keima na-Pathen kahi; Keiman nahatsah ing ting, kapanpi ding nahi; Kagaljona khut jetlama kadop sang jing ding nahi.
Vetan, nachunga lung hang jouse Abonchauva kijumsouva kisu lung dong ding ahiuve; Nangma douna kisalel ho chu Imacha hilou hela hung mangthah ding ahiuve.
Nakinahpi ho chu nahol le ding, Ahivanga namudoh lou ding ahi; Nangma douna gal bol-ho chu Imacha hilou ding ahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itile keima Pakai nangma Pathen kahin, Nakhut jetlam in katuh jing jenge; Nangma jah a, “Kicha hih-in keiman napanpi nange,” Tia seipa chu keima kahiye.
Kicha hih-in lungtol Jacob, Nangho Israel mi pasal ho! Ken nakithopinge, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; Nangma lhatdampu chu Israel Mithengpa ahiye.
Vetan, nangma hi changhuina kangkuiya kasem ding, Athah leh, ahemseu chule aha nei hi ding; Nangin molsang jouse nakuilea nachilgoi ding, Thinglhang jouse jong hi changsi nabahsah ding ahi;

Nangin changsi kijap banga najap ding, Abonchauva huiyin alhoh mang diu, Amaho chu khopi huiyin apoh mangsoh ding. Chutengleh nangma Pakaiya nakipa thanop ding ahi; Chule Israel Mithengpa chunga Nangma naloupi ding ahiye.

Mi vaichate leh nelou chalou ten twi aholuva Twila abeihel teng leh Aleiyu chu dangchah-in akijel kon jin, Kei Pakaiyin amaho chu kakou ding, Keima Israel Pathenin Amaho chu kadalhah louhel ding ahiuve.
Keiman molsang vel vul lah a vadung kalon sah a. Phaicham dunga twisam kaputsah ding; Gammang lah chu twikul kaso sah a Gamgo lai jenga jong twisam put ding ahi.
Gammang lah a chu Cedar thing, thingge thing, joujam thing Chule Olive thing kaphu ding; Neldi gamsunga chah thing kaphua, Phan thing chule meila thing kaphu khom ding ahi;
Hita chu mihemin amudoh a ahetdoh theiya, Gelkhoh a aneiya aboncha ahetkhom cheh-uva Pakai khut’in hiche hi aboldoh ahin, Israel Mithengpan asemdoh ahi, ti ahetna dingu ahi.
Kibaona thu hin polut’uvin, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; Jacob dinga lengpan nadindetna thu hinpo lut’uvin ati.

Hicheng chu hinpoh lut sah-uvin lang Ipi thu soh ding ham, neihung seipeh-uvin; Masanglai thilsoh ho chu ipi pi ham keiho neihung seipeh-uvin. Hiche ho chu keihon kagelkhoh theiyuva Chuta chu hichenga thilsoh chu kahetdoh theina diuvin: Ahiloule ahung lhung ding thil ho chu neihung phondoh peh-uvin.

Tu nung tengleh ipi hungsoh ding ham neiseipeh temun, Chutile nangho pathen nahiuve ti kahet thei dingu ahi: Thilpha boluvin ahilouva thilse naboluva ahileh Keiho lung thoiya kaumuva katijat lo dingu ahi.
Vetan, nangho imacha nahipouve, Nathilbolu jong pannabei ahibouve; Chujongle nangho nakilhenpau jong Thet umtah mi ahibouve.

Keiman sahlam gama konin mi khat katildoh-in Hijeh chun amapa ahungin ahi. Aman nisa soa pat kamin akou kou ding; Aman vaihom ho chu songkong kichotpha banga achotpha ding, Bel dengpan bonlhoh Achilnang banga achilnang ding ahi.

Eihon ihet theina dinguva thilsem kipat tila hiche phongdoh pa, Eihon, “Ama hi adih-e,” iti theina dinguva Phat umdoh masanga um jing pa chu koi ham? Hiche hi anaphongdoh a jong aumpon, Anasamlea jong koima aumpoi, Koimachan nangho thusei jouse hi anaja kha hih hel e.
Keiman amasan hiche hi Ziona kana phongdoh-in, Jerusalem dingin thupha lhangsam ding khat kakoipeh-e;
Ahivangin keiman kaven ahileh koima kamudoh pon, Keiman kadoh tengleh eidonbut thei, Hiche ho lah a hin thumop theiya Koimacha aumpoi.
Ven, amaho hi abonchauva alhem jeng ahiuvin, Anatoh chengseu jong hi imacha ahipoi; Amilim kilhajol chengseu jong hi Ahomkeo hui lhoh mang theibep ahibouve.
Vetan, keiman katuh chah jing kalhacha lhen chom, Achunga kalungthim kipana pa hi; Keiman achunga kalhagao kakoiyin Aman namtin vaipi henga thutan dihna ahinso doh ding ahi.
Ama chu kap jong kap lou ding, osanga jong pao lou ding, Kholai dunga jong aogin kijadoh lou ding ahi;
Pumpeng kihehchipsa chu aman aheboh lou ding, Thaomei don havah lou jong chu amut mit pai lou ding ahi; Aman kitahna neitah a Thutan dihna ahinso doh ding ahiye.
Leiset chunga thutan dihna aphudoh masangsea Ama chu kisumo lou ding lung jong lungthoi lou ding ahi; Chule twikhanglen pang dunga miten Ama danthu chu anga nga diu ahi.
Pathen, Pakai chun hitin aseiye, Van semdoh a ponpha pha pa, Leiset ponpha a pha, asunga peng jouse sem doh pa, Leiset chunga mihem ho hai theina hu pepa, Leiya leng ho Lhagao hinpe pa chun;

“Keima hi Pakai chu kahin, Nangma hi thildih a kakou nahi, Keiman nang hi khut’a katuh a Chule kachin jing nahi; Mitin dinga nang hi kitepna tobanga, Namtin vaipi salvah ding khovah a pang dinga kapehdoh nahi;
Mitchote mit hasah ding, Leikhul sunga kona soh chang kihen ho puidoh ding, Muthim lah a tou ho Songkul sunga kona puidoh dinga kapansah nahi.
Pakai kiti chu keima kahin, hiche chu keima min ahiye; Kaloupina chu keiman koima dang kapeh lou ding, Keima eiki vahchoina jong Milim kilhajol ho kachansah louhel ding ahi.
Vetan, thil masa chengse chu ahung lhungsoh tan, Ahung dotdoh masanga thil thah ho Tua keiman kaphondoh a Chule nangho kaseipeh nahiuve,” ati.
Leiset kolkimvela konin Pakai vahchoina ding Kipana lathah sauvin; Twikhanglen leh asunga cheng jouse kithongu hen lang, Twikhanglen pang dung le agamsunga cheng jouse kithongu hen!
Neldi gam leh akhopi jouse, Kedar chenna kho neo jousen Ogin thongin la sau hen! Sela a chengten kipa la sauhen lang, Molsang vum dunga konin kho hinsamu hen.
Amahon Pakaiya loupina peu hen lang Twikhanglen pang dunga avahchoina phongjal leu hen.
Pasal thahat tah bangin Pakai ahung kondoh-e, Galsat mi bangin alung asou sah-in: Apengjah-in osang tah-in kho asame. Akidoupi ho dounan thanei tah-in akiphonge.
Phat sottah pi hi keima lung monga um kahin, Hitin kaum jingin, kei kakituh kih jinge; Tun numei naoso nat thoh lel bangin penging ting, Kino the thu tah a kahai nong ding ahi.
Keiman molsang jouse leh thing lhang gam jouse kavatchai ding, Ahamhing alou hing jouse kagotlhah sah ding ahi: Vadung jouse jong twikol kah a leigo kahisah a, Twikul jouse jong kakansah ding ahiye.

Mitcho ho chu keiman ahetphah louvu lampia kapuiya, Ahet khah louhelu lamlen dunga kapuile ding ahi; Amasanguva muthim jeng jong khovah kasosah a, Sephou lah jong jangcham kahisah ding ahi. Thil hicheng hi ahiye, keiman kabol ding chu, Hiche ho hi kadalhah louhel ding ahi.

Amaho kinung nouvin tin, kijumso hel ding ahiuve, Milim kijempah ho ki-ngaina nei, Milim kilhajol ho jah a, “Nangho hi keiho pathen nahiuve,” tia seiho. Bolgimna kona Israel min phatchomna anei ding achanlel.
Ngaiyuvin mi nangong ho, Mitchoten namu theina dinguvin veuvin!
Mitchoa chu koiham, kalhachapa chu hilou hiya, Keiman kasol kasottolle banga ana ngonga koi ham? Keiman kakatdohsa pa banga amitchoa koi hiya, Pakai lhachapa banga mitcho koi ham?
Aman thil tamtah amujin, Hiche ho chu amelchih poi; Anabeng teni akihong soh tan, Ahivangin kho ajadeh poi.
Pakai chu adih jalin alung lhaiyin, Adanthu choiat’a chule loupi sah dingin agoi.

Ahinla hiche mite hi nehgamsa leh chomngimsa ahiuvin, Abonchauva hi thangkol sunga ohsa Songkul sunga selmang sa ahiuve; Ahuhdoh dingu beihelin nehgam ding bep ahiuvin, “Sempha kit’uvo!” tia seipeh ding beihel Mihem kichomgam ding bep ahitauve.
Nangho lah a koipenin hiche hi angaiya Phat hung lhung ding chu akhohsah a ngaisah a anei ding ham?

Michomgam khut’a Jacob pedoh a chu koi hiya, Mi bahgampa khut’a Israel pedoh a chu koi ham? Chonset iboluva eidou jing pau chu Pakai hilou ham? Alampia alamlhah thei lou nau, Chule adanthu jong Anitpeh lou pau chu?

Hijeh chun aman alunghan savevu chu ahin lheilhah denin, Gal pi thahat tah chu ahin lhut dentai; Hichun akimvela meikong ahinhal kimveltan, Ahivangin ahekhen thei hih laiye; Hichun ama akapantan, Ahinla lung nachangin agel hih laiye.
Vo Jacob, nasempa Pakaiyin tun hitin aseiye, Vo Israel nalim gongdoh pa ahiye; “Kicha hih-in, ajeh chu keiman nangma kalhatdamtan, Keiman naminin kakouvin nangma keiya nahitai.

Nangin twipi lah najot tengleh keiman nalhon ping ting, Vadung ho napal teng jongleh nachup lou ding ahi; Nangman meikong lah napal teng leh Nakahvam den lou ding; Meikong deujejun nangma Naleogep den louhel ding ahiye.
Ijeh-inem itile keima Pakai, na-Pathen kahin, Israel Mithengpa, nahuhhingpa kahi; Keiman nang lhatdohnan Egypt kapen, Ethiopia le Seba chu nangma khelin kapetai.
Ijeh-inem itile keima mitmun manlu tah, Jabol umtah nahin, ken jong nangma ka-ngailui; Hijeh chun nangma khelin mihem kapen, Nangma hinkho toh lhet dingin mitin kapedoh tai.
Kicha hih-in, ajeh chu keiman kaumpi jinge; Keiman niso lama konin nachilhah hinpuiying ting, Nilhum langa konin dongkhom inge;
Sahlam jah a keiman donda tan katia, Lhanglam jah a jong Kolchah den hih-in kati ding; Gamla tah a konin kachapate hinpuiyin lang, Leiset kolkimvela konin kachanu jouse hin puiyin;
Keima mina kikou chengse, keiman kaloupina dinga kasemsa ho, Keiman alim kagona kasemdohsa ho chu, kati ding ahi,” ati.
Amit uma mitchote chu hinpuidoh temin, Nakhang la neiya kho ja louho chu!

Namtin vaipi abonchan hung kikhom khom uhen lang, Mitin vaipin kikhoppi hung bol uhen; Amaho lah a hiche thil phongdoh theiya koipen hi ding hiya, Thil um masa cheng eivetsah thei dinguva koi ham? Adihnau seichen dingin sakhia pang ho hin kipuiyu hen lang, Chuteng hiche ho chun hiche hi adihnai tin seiyu hen.

“Nangho keima dinga sakhi nahiuve,” tin Pakaiyin aseiye, “Chule kalhentum kalhacha nahiuve, Hita chu nanghon nahet theiyuva nei tahsan theina diu, Chule keima hi Ama chu kahidol nahetkhen theiyuva; Keima masanga pathen dang akigong pon, Keima nunga jong khat cha kigong lou ding ahi.
Akeiya kei hi Pakai kitipa chu kahin, Chule keima tailou huhhinga adang aumpoi.
Nangho lah a pathen dang nasem thu loupet’uva, Keiman kaphondoh a, kahuhhinga, chule kaphonjal ahi; Chujeh a chu nang ho hi Keima dinga sakhi nahiuve,” tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Keima Pathen kahin, hijeh a jong chu keima Ama chu kahi ahiye; Keima khut’a eichu lhathei ding koima cha aumpoi; Keiman na katoh ahin, Hiche chu kon asuhmo thei ding ham?” ati.
Pakai, Na lhatdampu, Israel Mithengpan hitin aseiye, “Nangho khohsah nan keiman Babylana mi soling ting, Kotgol jouse katumboh soh ding, Chalde’a mite aosat gin chu ka-gina kiheidoh ding ahi.
Keima hi Pakai chu kahin, nangho Mithengpa, Israel sempa, nelengpau chu kahiye,” ati.
Hitin aseiye Pakai twikhanglena lampi semdoh pa, Twi hattah lah a lamlen goldoh pa.
Kangtalai hintol galkaiya, sakol hinkaidoh pa, Galsat mi leh gal-hang mi hinpuidoh pan; Amaho alumuvin athoudoh jou pouve, Athau angoi gamin thaomei don bangin akimut mit tai;
“Thil masa ho chu geldauvin lang, Thil luiho jong chu ngaitokhoh dauvin.
Neive temin, keiman thil thah khat kabolin; Tun hiche chu ahung potdoh-e, nanghon nahet loulaiyu ham? Keiman gammang noiya lampi khat kasemdoh a Neldi gamsunga vadung tampi kalonsah ding ahi.

Gamsa ho, kamkei ho, vangongsao hon keima eijabol diu ahi. Ajeh chu kalhenchom kamite don dingin Keiman gammang lah a twi tampi kaveisah-in, Neldi gamsunga vadung tampi kalonsah-e; kalhen chomte don din.
Keima choiatna aphonjalna dinguva, Keiman kei ding mong monga kagondoh mite don dingin.
“Ahinla Vo Jacob, nangin neikou pon, Vo Israel, nangman neithei chime!
Nakelngoi pumgo thilto ding neihin choipeh tapon, Nakilhaina gantha ho jong kei jana boldin nago tapoi; Ken jong pumgo thilto pohgih hahsan kapohsah pon, Gimnamtui lhutnan kasugim hih hele.
Nangman kolju lhum la sumin neichoh peh pon, Nakilhaina gantha hon jong neivahva tapoi; Nachonset ho hi pohgih hahsan neipohsah jon, Nathemmona chengsen neigimsah tai.
Akei mong mong hi Ama chu kahin, Kei le kei kikhoh sahjeh a nasuh khel jouse kathehdoh peh jia, Chule nachonset jouse jong Kageldoh kit louhel ding ahi.
Neigeldoh temin, kinel hite; Nachung thu hinpodoh tan dih nakichansah dingin.
Napa amasa pa chu ana chonsen, Nangma ding seiya pang hon kei dounan thil tampi asukhel tauve.
Hichejeh chun keiman munthenga milen jouse kasuboh-in, Jacob chu suhmang pai dingin kapedoh-in, Chule Israel jong chu Houset dingin kapedoh tai.
Ahin tun ngaitemin, Vo kalhacha Jacob, Kalhenchom Israel!
Hitin aseiye Pakai nangma nasempa, Naobu sunga nalim gongpan nakithopi ding ahi; Kicha hih-in. Vo kalhacha Jacob. Kalhenchompa Jesh’urun.
Ijeh-inem itile leigo the thu lah a twi kahin chap’a, Tolgo lah a vadung tampi kalonsah ding; Nason nachilhah ho chunga kalhagao kabuh lhah a, Kaphattheina chu nachilhah chunga kabuh lhah ding ahi.
Amaho chu twi lah a hamhing hung dondoh banguvin tin, Twi long jing vadung panga thing phung tobang hidiu ahi.
Hiche hin, ‘Keivang Pakaiya kahi,’ tin seiyin tin, Achom dang khatma ama le ama Jacob mina kikou ding ahin; Adang khat’in ma akhut’a chutia akisut ding, Ama le ama Israel mina kiminvo ding ahi,” ati.
Hitin aseiye Pakai, Israel lengpa Alhatdampu, thaneipen Pakaiyin, “Keima amasa leh anukhah kahin, Kei tailou Pathen dang aumpoi.
Keima tobang koi umam? Ama chun hinphongjal hen, Ama chun ka-angsunga phongdoh hen tungdoh hen, Tonlaiya pat thilsoh ding phongdoh a koiham? Amaho chun thil ahung lhung ding Ipi ham eihinseipeh uhen,

Kicha hih-un, tija hih-un, keiman thil kajahsah loulai nahiya, Hiche hi kaseipeh loulai nahim? Nangho keima sakhi nahiuve! Kei tailou Pathen dang um kham? Songpi dang aumpoi, keiman khatcha kahepoi,” ati.
Pathen lim semthu mite hi imacha ahipouve, chule akipanau thil ho jong khu phatchomna aumpon ahi; amaho sakhia pang hon akijumso diu khu amuphah peh pouvin hejong ahetphah peh pouve.
Koiham pathen lim gonthua, imacha phatchomna hilouhel milim kilhahjola chu?

Ven, agol apai jouse kijumso cheh ding ahiuve, chule khut themho jong mihem ahibouvui; amaho chu hung kikhom khomu hen lang, hung ding doh cheh uhen, tija soh keiyuva chule kijumso khom cheh ding ahiuve.
Thih khengpan alim agontoh a, meihol lah a ago ap’a, chutengleh sehcha a avoh toh toh a, ban-gol thahat’a avoh a, ahung gilkel teng atha achol jin, twi adon louva ahileh lhadah jia ahi.

Thing them bolpan gol akaiya, pencil a amelchihna ajih a, thing tolnam na agong athol toh a, chuteng thil gol tena khat’a amelchih a, mihem lim bang banga agondoh a mihem mel-hoi banga ahoisah a, insunga chensah dinga agot ahi.
Aman Cedar thing ho chu aphuh lhun, kheng thing ham gangpi thing ham alhengin hiche chu gamchang thing ho lah a akhan letsah jin, Cedar thing jong aphut jin ahileh gotwiyin achap nou nou jie.

Chujou teng hiche chu mihem dingin meithingin ahung pang jin, min akeh khat akilah jin akitin aki-oijin, meiya atikong tengleh chang lhah akanna jie; hiche chu pathen limin jong asem jin chibai aboh jin, hiche ma ma chu milim kijempolin asemin, amasanga chun abohkhup jie.

Akeh khat chu meiyah atih jin, akeh lang khat saneh nan amangin, sa akigo nan oiva nan aneiye; chujongleh atahsa tah chun aki-oilumin chutengleh, “Aha, kati alumtan, meikong jong kamu mong mong tai!” tin aseijie.
Chule amoh chengse chu milimin pathen khat chun asemdoh jin, aboh khup’in chibai abohjie; chutengle akoma chun atao tao jin, “Neihuhdoh-in, ajeh chu nangma kapathen nahi!” atijie.
Amahon ahepha pouvin he jong ahekhen him him pouve; ajeh chu hiche hin amit’u achotsah tan kho amuthei tapouve, alungthimu jong ajinsah-in, hijeh chun ahekhen thei tapouvin ahi.

Koima alungthima ngaito khoh a aumpon, hetna hihen thil datkhenna hijongleh, “Akeh khat hi meiya katia, ameiam chunga changlhah kakikana, sa kakigona a kanehna sa ahitai; alang khat hi iti thet umtah thil khat’a kasemdoh ding hitam? Iti thingtum khat masanga kaboh khup ding ham?” ati theipouve.
Ama chu vutvam a kivah ahin, lungthim kihei chavaiyin apui mang ahitai; ama changseh la akihuhdoh theipon, ahilou jongleh “Kakhut jetlama hi jouthu umah hilou ham?” tin aseidoh theipoi.
Thil hichengpi hi geldoh temin Vo Jacob le Israel Ijeh-inem itile nangma kalhacha nahiye: Keiman kagondohsa nahin, kalhacha nahiye. Vo Israel keidin nangma suhmil thei nahipoi.
Keiman nasuhkhel chengse meilhang kitol mang bangin katheh mangin, Nachonset jouse meibol kitol mang bangin katol mangtai; Kahenga hung kilekit’in, Keiman kalhatdoh nahitai.

O vanin la san, ajeh chu Pakaiyin hiche hi aboldoh tai; O lei laigilin jong kho hinsam tan; O molsang jousen la sauvin lang, O gamchang noi jouse leh thing phung jousen la sauvin! Ajeh chu Pakaiyin Jacob alhatdam tan, Israel lah a ama choiat’a um jing jeng ding ahi.

Hitin aseiye Pakai, nangma lhatdampu, Naobu sunga kona nalim gongdoh pa; “Pakai kiti chu keima kahin, thil ijakai sempa, Achangseh a van ponpha pha jeng pa, Leiset hinjam doh pa chu, Koiham eitoh hua chu?
Keihi mijou ho doithu jouse suhnoh peh pa, Mi agaotheiho su-ngolpa, Miching ho nung no kit’a Athil hetnau ngolthua sempeh pa,

Alhachapa thusei suhdet peh a Asottolle pa lunggel bolpeh pa, Jerusalem jah a, ‘Hiche hi chenna kinei ding ahi,’ tipeh a, Judah gam khopi ho jah a, ‘Hiche ho kisadoh kit ding ahi. Chule keiman alhulhamsa ho hi kaphoh doh peh ding ahi,’ tipeh pa;
Vakom jah a, ‘Kang gon, Keiman navadung jouseu kakan-got sah ding ahi,’ tipeh a,

Cyrus jah a, ‘Ama hi keima kelngoi chingpa ahin, Aman ka-ngaito jouse abulhit ding ahi,’ tia seipeh a; Jerusalem jah a jong hila seipeh a, ‘Hiche hi kisadoh ding ahi,’ tipeh a, Pathen houin jah a, ‘Na inmun kilai ding ahi,’ tia seipeh pa chu kahi,” ati.

Hitin aseiye Pakaiyin athaonu Cyrus jah a, Kelkot jouse akikha theilouna dinga Amasanga kotpi jouse ahondoh theiya Lengho jouse konggah alhap lhah peh a, Amasanga namtin vaipi asot lhah na dinga Akhut jetlam thahat kapeh pa chu;
“Keima namasanga cheng ting, Molsang jouse kathe chamsoh ding; Sum-eng kotpi jouse kavoh chip soh a, Thih kotgol jouse kasat khen hel ding.
Muthima kikhol thil jouse nangma kapeh a, Hetna louva guhthim thilsel jouse kapeh ding; Hita chu nangin keima hi Pakai chu ahin, Israel Pathen nangma namina koupa chu, ahi ti nahet theina din.
Kalhacha Jacob leh kalhenchom Israel jala Ken nangma namin a kakouva, Nangman neihet lou vanga Deichom mina kakou nahi.
Pakai kiti chu keima kahin, adang aumpoi, Kei tailou Pathen dang aumpoi; Nangman neihet lou vanga Keiman natai kagah peh nahiye.
Hita chu nisa solama pat nilhum lam geiya miten Kei tailou adang aumpoi, ti ahet theina dinguvin; Pakai kiti chu keima kahin Adang koimacha aumpoi.
Keiman khovah kagongdoh-in, muthim kasemdoh-in, Chamna kasemdoh-in, gimna jong kasemdoh-e; Pakai kiti chu keima kahin Thil hichengse sempa chu kahi.

Vo van, chunga konin gohong hinjuh lhah sah-in lang, Vanlaijol’in jong adih chu gojuh bangin juhlhah sah hen; Leiset pohkeh hen, huhhingna ahung dotdoh theina ding, Chule leiset chun adih jong hinsep doh hen; Pakai kiti keiman Leiset chu kasemsa ahiye.
Ohe Asempa toh kinelpa chu ada ahi, Leibel abel dengpa toh akinel banga! Abellei chun alim gongdoh pa jah a, ‘Ipi bol nahim?’ atia, Ahilouleh ‘Nathilbol hi akhut tuhna ding aumpoi’ atim?
Ohe, mipa jah a ‘Ipi nahindoh ham?’ tipa chu ada ahi. Ahilouleh numei jah a ‘Ipi dinga so nat nahim?’ tipa chu ada ahi.” ati.
Hitin aseiye Pakai, Israel Mithengpa, Israel Sempan; “Nanghon kachate chung chang thudol neidoh ngam diu ha, Ahilouleh kakhut tenia Kathilbol chung chang thudol neidoh ngam diu ham?
Keiman leiset kasemin Achunga chun mihem kasemdoh-e: Van ponbuh son’a song doh chu keima khut teni ahin, Chule aloupina chengse jong hi kei thusah a um ahiuve.

Keiman Cyrus chu thil dih a katildoh tan, Chule alampi jouse kasemjang ding ahi; Aman kakhopi san tin kami sohchang ho alhadoh ding, Atohman la kipelou ding Kipaman jong umlou ding ahi,” tin Thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.

Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Egypt gam haona leh Ethiopia gam kiveina thil, Midung sang Sabe’a miho chu Nahenga hung kitol galkaiyuva nami hung hi ding, Hiche ho chun nanung nung ahin juiyuva Thih khaova kikan pum puma hung galkaiyuva nahenga hung boh khup diu; Nahenga taove tia hung taovuva, ‘Pathenin nang naumpin adanga aumpoi, Ama tailou Pathen dang aumpoi,’ ati diu ahi,” ati.
Tahbeh mongin nangbou Pathen nahin, Nangle Nang kiselji nahi: Vo Israel Pathen, Huhhingpa!
Amaho abonchauvin akijumson, akisu lung dong tauve. Milim semthua bol ho chu lung dongin akilhonle le tauvin ahi.
Israel vang chu Pakaiyin tonsot huhhing nan ahuhhingin. Atonsot geiya nangho nakijumso lou diu, lung jong nalungdon lou diu ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile hitin aseiye Pakai Van Sempa, Ama chu Pathen ahi! Leiset lim gongdoh a semdoh pa, leiset tungdoh a, Aman hiche hi anohphah dinga asem ahipoi; Hiche hi chenna dinga asem ahiye! “Pakai kiti chu keima kahin, adang aumpoi.
Keiman guhthim chan muthim gama thu kaseipoi, Jacob chilhah jah a chun, ‘Nohphahna din neiholun,’ katipoi. Keima Pakai kitipan adih kasei ahin, Atahbeh ho chu kaphondoh ahiye.

Kikhom khomuvin lang hunguvin, hin nailut’uvin Nangho namtin vaipi lah a ahingdoh chengse! Thinga kisem milim kisemthu ho Kipohle le hon hetna la aneipouvin, Mi huhhing theilou hel Semthu pathen henga chun atao taovuve.

Phongdoh-uvin lang nachung thu hinpo lut’un, Chule amahon lung gelkhomna neiyu hen; Masang laipeh a pat hiche anajah sah jing chu koi hiya, Khanglui laiya pat hiche phongdoh ji chu koi ham? Hiche chu Pakai kiti keima hi kanahi hilou ham? Chuti ahin Kei tailou pathen dang aumpoi, Pathen dihtah Huhhingpa kahin Kei tailou adang aumpoi.
“Kahenga hung kiheiyun lang huhhingin umuvin Leiset kolkimvela mite! Ijeh-inem itile keima hi Pathen kahin Adang aumpoi.
Keile Kei kakihahsel tai. Kakamsunga konin ahung kilekit louhel dingin Thucheng dih khat apotdoh tai. ‘Kahenga khupbuh jouse dilsua, leigui jouse kihahsel ding ahi,’ ati.
“Kachung chang thua hita kisei ding, Pakaiya bou adih le thahat aume; Ama douna gimnamtui halnam ho chu Ahenga hunguva kijumso diu ahi.
Pakaiya chu Israel chilhah jousen Gal ajouva loupi cheh ding ahiuve,”
Bel chu aboh khup’in, Nebo chu akune; Amilim semthu jouse lhon jong gamsa ho le ganchaten apouve; Hicheng nathilpoh lhon hi Gancha thachol sah, pohgih a kisemdoh ahitai.
Hiche ho akunuvin, aboh khomuvin, Pohgih poh hinla ahoidoh thei pouvin Amaho leh amaho hi Sohchanga lut’a ahitauve.
Kathu ngaiyuvin, Vo Jacob insung Israel insung mi amoh chengse, Napen lhah-uva pat keiman kahin poh poh ho, Naobu sunga kona kapoh doh ho chu;
Natehset geiyin jong Keima hi Ama chu kahi jingin, Nasam kan geiya jong Keiman kapoh ding nahi. Keiman kanasem ahin, Keiman kapoh ding ahi, Keiman kapoh a kahuhhing ding nahi.
“Nanghon koipen toh neitekah a neikibah sah diu ham? Chule itobangin neitekah leu chun kakibah thei diu ham?
Sumdip sunga kona sana anop nop’a mang ho Chule dangka atena tedoh ho, Sana khengthem khat thalah a, Amapa chu pathen ho lima semsah ho; Chutengleh amaho chu Aboh khup’uvin chibai aboh jiuve!

Hiche chu alengkouva alehdoh uvin apujiuvin ahi. Atunna atunguvin ahileh hikoma chun akitungden jie; Aumna muna kon chun akichondoh theipoi. Ahenga chu mi khattou ataova ahi jongleh Hiche chun ahou theipoi, Agimna a konin jong ahuhhing theipoi.
“Hiche hi geldoh-uvin lang ngaitouvin, Nalungthim in gel khoh-uvin nangho thil dih lou bol ho;
Gollui laiya thil masa ho chu geldoh temuvin, Ajeh chu Keima hi Pathen kahin, adang aumpoi; Keima hi Pathen kahin Adang aumpoi, Keima tobanga

Thilsem kipatna pat akichaina geiya phongdoh a Gollui laiya pat thil ahung lhung loulai ho geiya phongdoh a ‘Keima thumop chu ding jing ding, Chule keiman kalung ngaito aboncha kamolso ding ahi,’ tia seiya,
Niso lama kona vacha hingne khat kouva Gamla tah a kona kathu mopsa mihem koudoh pa chu. Keiman kaseisa ahitan kaguilhun sah tei ding ahi, Ka-ngaito ahitan hiche chu kaboldoh tei ding ahi.
“Kathu ngaiyuvin, nang ho milung tah ho Huhdoh phah hoiya umlou ho;
Keiman mi kahuhdohna chu kahin tolnai ding ahi, agamla poi; Chule mi kahuhhingna jong sot lou ding ahitai; Keiman Ziona huhhingna kakoi ding Israel dinga kaloupina chu,” ati.

Hung kumsuh-in lang leivui lah a hung touvin Vo Babylon chanu nu-ngah nu; Tola hin laltouna beiyin hung touvin Vo Chalde’a mite chanu! Ijeh-inem itile nangma Ati noudeh le ati jolsel nakiti kit lou ding ahitai.
Sumhei song teni kilah-in lang, Napon lukhuh kihodoh-in lang hin; Naponchol kisut lhah-in, nakeng teni kihodoh-in lang Vadung ho jong pal galkaiyin.
Nasagohkeo pi chu hung kihohdoh intin, Najamo jong hung kimudoh ding ahi; Keiman phu kalah ding, Pasal khat cha kahing hoi louding ahiye.
Keiho Lhatdampu chu amin thaneipen Pakai ahin, Israel Mithengpa ahiye.
Thipbeh chan touvin lang, chule muthim lah a vah lut’in Vo Chalde’a chanu; Ijeh-inem itile lenggam sung dunga Nangma hi nulun nakiti kit louhel ding ahi.
Keima kamite chunga kalung hangin, Kagoulo chu kasuboh tai; Amaho chu nangma khut’a kana pen, Ahinla nangin amaho chu hepin nabolpoi; Tehset ho geiyin nangman Nanamkol gihsa tah chu napohsah-e.
Nangin, “Keima tonsot geiya nulun kahi ding ahi,” nati’n, Hijeh chun hiche ho hi Nalungthima naching pon Akichaina dingu jong nageldoh poi.

Hijeh chun tun hiche hi ngaiyin, lungdei deiya umnom nu; Lung mong tah a tou touva nalungthima “Keima bou kahin, kei tobang adang aumpoi, Kei meithaiyin umdeh pongting, cha le nao thi jong heponge.” tia seinu.

Hiche thil teni hi nahenga Phat chomcha kah a, nikhat sunga naheng hung lhung ding ahi. Cha le nao thina, meithai na Lhingset’a nachunga hung lhung ding ahi; Mitphel doithemna tampi neiyin. Na ailhim themna tampi um jongleh.
Nagitlouna a jong lung mong tah-in naumin. “Koiman eimu poi,” tin naseiye; Nachihna le nahet nan napui mang ahitan, Chule nangin nalungthimin, “Keima bou kahin, Kei tailou adang aumpoi,” nati.

Ahinla nakiboldam thei louhelna ding Nachunga thilse hung lhung ding ahi; Manthah nan nahin lhun den ding, Hiche chu nakithoidam thei louhel ding ahi; Ima nahetphah lou, het man louhela Nachunga manna hung lhung ding ahi.
Nakhangdon laiya pat’a khohsah tah a natoh jing Na-ailhim themna ho le mitpheldoi tampi nabol chun pangin. Ijem itileh namolso jeng thei ahin, Tijatna tah jong nathua nung mai thei ahi.

Nangma naki thumop tampi chu nacholpi set ahitan, Hiche ho pi chu dindoh sah-in lang kihuhhingsah tangem; Van le van jong homkhen khena, ahsi ho velhi jing ho, Lha thah chana nachunga hung lhung ding sei thei ho.

Vetan, amaho chu changpol bep ahiuvin, Abonchan meiyin akavam ji tauve; Meikong thahattah lah a konin Amaho leh amaho akihuhdoh jou pouve; Min aki-oi dinga kito meiam dan ahipon, Amasanga touna ngam meikong ahipoi!
Natoh gimna chu hiche tobang chu ahin, Nakhangdon laiya pat nahin seilet tha peh ho chu ahiuve; Amaho chu amai ngat lam lama acheuvin, Nangho huhhing ding koimacha aumpoi.
Hiche hi ngaiyuvin, Vo Israel insung, Israel mina kikou ho, chule Judah taiguiya pengdoh ho; Pakai mina kihahsela chule Israel Pathen phongdoh ho, Adih le atahbeh a bol lou ho.
Ajeh chu khopi thenga konin amaho leh amaho akikouvun, Amaho le amaho Israel Pathen chunga apansauvin; Thaneipen Pakai kiti chu Ama min chu ahiye.
“Hichea konin thil masa chengse chu kaphongdoh tan, Hicheng chu kakamsunga kona potdoh ahitan hetsa kaumsah ahitai; Chujouvin hetman louhelin kaboltan Abonchan akichaisoh tai.
Nangma nalouchal’e ti keiman kahen. Nangongchang jong hi thih khaojang ahin Nachalpang jong sum-eng ahiye;

Masang laiya pat keiman hiche ho chu najah a kaphongdoh tan, Ahung guilhun masanguvin Najah a kaseidoh peh soh tai; Achuti louleh nangin, ‘Hiche ho hi kalim semthu pathen chun asem ahin, Kamilim kijempol le kamilim kilhajolin Hiche ho hi thu apeh cheh ahi,’ tin seikhan nate.

“Nangman najahsa ahitan, hichu abonchan vetem’un, Chule hiche nasei phong loulai diu ham? Tua pat’a hi keiman thil thah thah jeng kajah sah ding Nahetkhah loulai thil kiselguh jeng kajah sah ding nahiuve.
Hiche ho chu tun akisemtan, asot hih laiye, Tuni nikho masanga chu najah khah loulai hel’u ahi; Achuti louleh nangman, ‘Ven, kahetsa jeng nahi,’ nati tah hih diu ham,

Nangman jajong najakha hih laiyin, hejong nahekha hih laiye; Hiche laiya pat chun nanakhang jong akihong hih laiye. Ijeh-inem itile nangman jou le nal jenga nabol tei ding kahen. Hijeh a chu napen lhah a pat doumah bolpa nakiti ahitai.
“Keima min gelkhoh nan kalunghan kakhelin, Keima eikivahchoina kakhohsah jehin nang din katuh tangpeh-e; Hita chu nang jeng jong Kasat lhah louna dingin.
Vetan, dangka tobang ahilou vangin nangma kasemjol tai, Bolgentheina meilhum sung tobanga nangma kapatepsa nahitai.
Kei kikhohsah mong monga hiche hi Kabol ahi; Ajeh chu itidola kamin chu suhboh a um ding ham? Keiman kaloupina chu Midang kapeh louhel ding ahi.
Vo Jacob, chule kakousa Israel kathu ngaiyin! Keima hi Ama chu kahin, Keima Amasa le Anukhah kahi.
Keima khut’in leiset bulpi aphutdoh-in, Kakhut jetlam hin van hi ponpha apha ahi; Aboncha hi keiman kakouva ahileh Hung ding khom jeng ahiuve.

“Nabonchauvin hung kikhomuvin lang hung ngaiyuvin! Alah-uva koi penin hiche ho hi aseiphong khah am? Pakaiyin amapa chu alungset’e; Aman Babylon chunga alung ngaito ahinbol ding, Aban thahat chu Chalde’a mite Douva hung pang ding ahi.
Kei mong mongin thu kaseiya amapa chu kakou ahitan, Keiman Jacob kahin puidohna lamdola hi ama khangtou ding ahi.

Neihin nailut’uvin lang hiche hi ngai temuvin, Thilsem kipat tila pat keiman guhthimin thu kasei khapoi; Thil ahung umdoh a pat keima hikoma chu anaumsa kahi,” ati. Chule tun Pakai Pathenin keima leh Alhagao eisoltai.
Hitin aseiye Pakai, Nalhatdampu, Israel Mithengpan; “Keima Pakai na-Pathen kahin, Naphatchom chomna ding nahilpa Nachena ding lampia napuile pa chu kahi.
O kadeh, nangman kathupeh ho chu ngaisah a nanei anahitave leh ong! Chutileh nang dia chamna chu vadung long bangin tin, Chujongle nadihna jeng jong Twikhanglen kidil bang ding ahi;
Nachilhah jong neldi jat phan tin, Nason nachilhah ho chu changpah jat pha ding; Keima masanga kona amaho min chu Itih chana jong kisat lhalou ding, suhmanga umlou ding ahi,” ati.

Babylona konin potdoh-uvin lang, Chalde’a mitea konin jammang un. Hiche hi kipana ogin thongin seiphonguvin samleuvin; Leiset kol kimvela lhutsoh-uvin lang, “Pakaiyin alhacha Jacob chu alhatdoh tai!” tin seiyuvin.
Pakaiyin neldi gamsung jotpaiya apui jong chun amaho adangchah pou ve, Songpia konin amaho dingin aman twi aputsah-in ahi; Aman songpi chu akehson ahileh Twi ahung kikhodoh jenge.
“Mi giloute dingin chamna aumpoi,” tin Pakaiyin aseiye. Pakai Lhachapa chu namtin vaipi khovah hi ding ahi.
Twikhanglen panga cheng hon kathusei ngaiyuvin, Gamla tah a kon miten nanakhang hinsungu vin; Pakaiyin naobu sunga kona einakou ahitan, Kanu tahsa a kauma chu kamin anasah ahitai.
Aman kakamsung hi chemjam hemtah bangin asemin, Abanjang le noiya einasel ahiye; Aman thalchang kinol-hem bangin einol hemin, Alivathei sunga keima einasel mange.
Chule aman kajah a, “Nang hi kalhacha nahin, Israel nang jeh a eikichoian ding ahi,” ati.

Ahin keiman, “Phatchomna beiya na katoh ahitan, Imacha louleh pannabeiya katha hangsan kasuhmang ahitai; Ahivangin kathudihna chu Pakai koma a um jingin, Kagim man chu ka-Pathen koma aum jingnai,” kati.

Chule tun hitin aseiye Pakai Naobu sunga pat alhacha pang dinga eihin gongdoh pa, Hita chu Ama koma Jacob lepui kit ding leh Ama henga Israel akikhop khom kitna dinga; Ajeh chu Pakai mitmun keima eikijabol tan, Hijeh chun ka-Pathen chu keima thahat’in apang tai.

Aman aseiyin, “Nangma kalhacha nahung pana Jacob phung jouse natundoh a Israel lhentum nathahsem doh ding hi Thil bailam chabou ahiye; Mi kahuhhingna hi leiset kol kimvela alhunsohna dinga Namtin vaipi dinga nangma hi khovah a kapansah ding nahi,” ati.

Hitin aseiye Pakai Israel Lhatdampu le Mithengpan, Namtin vaipin donlou dailouva akoiya ahotbolpa Vaihomte lhachapa chu; “Leng jousen muvin tin hung kipatdoh diu, Leng chapaho hung bohkhup ding ahiuve; Tahsan umtah Pakai, Israel Mithengpa Nangma nakilhendoh pa jala chu,” ati.

Pakaiyin, hitin aseiye, “Lunglhai pet’in keiman nangma kahouvin, Huhhing nikhon nangma kapan pie; Keiman nang hi kanachin jinga Mipi dinga kitepna tobanga kapeh nahin, Chuta chu gamsung nachendoh sahna ding leh Gou dalhahsa chu Nahomtoh pehna ding;
