Songkul lut ho jah a, ‘Hung potdoh tauvin,’ natia, Muthim lah a umho jah a, ‘Hung kilahdoh-uvin,’ natina dingin. Amahon lampi vel dunga neh kihol leuvin tin, Molbuh chai lai laiya jong amaho neh thei hamhing tobang um ding;

Amaho gilkel louhel diu, dang jong dangchah lou diu, Khohui savet vut’in amut khah lou diu, nisan jong akah lou diu ahi; Ijeh-inem itile amaho lainatpi pan Apuile ding, twinah dung dunga apuile ding ahi.
Keiman molsang jouse aboncha lampia kasemdoh a Chule kalhang lamlen aboncha kisemsang cheh ding ahiuve.
Ven, hicheng hi gamla tah a kona hunguva, Chule vetan, hicheng hi sahlam le lhumlama hungkon, Chujongle hicheng hi Syene gama kona hung ding ahiuve,” ati.
Vo van, kipah-in la san, Vo leiset kichoi sangin; Vo molsang jouse kipah-in la hinsa soh keiyuvin! Ajeh chu Pakaiyin amite alhamon tan, Akibol gentheina chunga dip damna aneipeh ding ahi.
Ahivangin Zion chun, “Pakaiyin eidalha tan, Ka-Pakaiyin eisumil tai,” ati.

“Numeiyin anaosen noichep pet chu asuhmila Hita chu anaobua peng achapa chung a dip damna neilouva um ding dam?” ati. Hiche ho chun sumil jong sumil jeng theiyun tin, Kenvang nangma kasuhmil louhel ding nahi.
Vetan, keiman kabanjang tenia hin nang lim kajih doh-in, Napal jouse jong kamaiya akilang jing jenge.
Nangho insa a pang hon nasugam mite chu nasuleng jenguvin, Nachom gamuva pang ho nanga konin apotdoh tauve.
Khodah-in lang nakimvel vetemin, Amaho akikhomuvin nahenga ahunguve. Pakaiyin keima kahing jingnai, Nangin amaho hi kijepna nanei ding, Abonchauva chu mounu kikan chah bang a Nakan chah ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile nangma mun aong lai jouse leh dalhah thip lai jouse, Chule nagam dalhah thip lai jouse jong chu Hita chu nasunga cheng ho dinga naneo behseh jeng ding, Nabah gama pang ho chu gamla tah a kitol mang ding ahiuve.
Pul douva naum pet’a nahin nachaten nanakhang tenia chu ‘Kei dingin amun hi aneo behseh jenge, Kachenna ding mun Neisempeh-in,’ ati dingu ahi.

Chutengle nangman nalungthima, ‘Hiche ho hi koipenin eihinpeh ham? Keima pul douvin kana umin, cha hing louvin kachingme; Sohchangin eikikaiyin eikithah mang tame, Hiche ho hi koipenin ahinvah doh ba ham? Vetan, kei changseh eina kidalhan ahibou me, Hoilam pena kona Hiche ho pi hi hunguva ham?’ nati ding ahi,” ati.

Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Vetan, keiman namtin vaipi chunga kakhut kadom sangin, Mitin henga kaponlap kadom sange; Chutengleh amahon nachapate angsunga kipom uvin tin, Nachanute hi amahon Alengkou uva akitot dingu ahi.

Lengho napanon hung panguvin tin, Alengnu jouseu jong chu nadonnua hung pang diu; Tola amaiyu asuhlut’uva nahenga hung bohkhup diu, Chule nakeng phang tenia leivui chu ahin le-ngim diu ahi. Chutengle nangman Keima hi Pakai kahi nahetdoh ding, Keima eingah jing ho chu jachatna kichuhsah lou ding ahiuve,” ati.
Athahatpa a kona aneh ban chu kisalhah peh jou monga, Midih-in sohchanga akai chu kichu lhah peh theiyam?

Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Mi thahatpan sohchang akai ho jong kilah peh ding, Pumhat’a vaihompa neh ban jong kisalhah peh ding ahi; Ajeh chu nangma nakinahpi chu keiman kakinahpi ding, Chule nachapate chu Keiman kahuhhing ding ahi.

Nangma nabol gentheiya pang ho chu Amaho tahsa ma ma kanehsah ding, Jukham banga amaho Thisan ma ma adonkham set diu ahi. Chutengle tahsa a hing jousen Keima hi Pakai kahiya nangma Huhhingpa kahi Nalhatdampu, Jacob dinga Mithahatpa kahi ahet dingu ahi.” ati.

Pakaiyin hitin aseiye. “Nanu u kidana lekha keiman ka Jana chu hoiya um tam? Ahiloule kaleibate koipen koma chu nangho kajoh doh nahiu hitam, Vetan, nathemmo jeh-uva nangho kajoh doh nahitauve. Chule nangho suhkhel jeh a, Nanu u chu anakida ahitai.

Ipi dinga keima kahung pet’a chu pasal khat beh ana um lou ham? Ken kahin koupet’a chu koima eidonbut ding ana umlou ham? Alhatdam joulouna dinga kakhut chu kisuchoma hitam? Ahiloule ken ahuhdohna ding thahat kaneilou ham? Vetan, keiman kaphoh-in twikhanglen kakansah-in, Vadung jouse jong neldi gam kaso sah-e; A-nga jouseu jong twi umlou jeh-in anamse gamin Dangchah-in athigam tauve.
Keiman van ho jong khu ponvom kasilpeh jin, Chule khaodip pon chu akhunan kamang jin ahi.” ati.

Pakai Pathenin keima hi akihil themsa ho leigui eibu peh-in, Hita chu athacholpa chu thuseiya vah hingle kahetna dingin, Ajingkah sim ajingkah seh-in akihil ho thu ngai na dingin Aman kanabeng hi asuthou vin, atilkhou jinge.
Pakai chun kanabeng ahong tan, Keima doumah bolin kanapang pon, nung jong kanung chon poi.
Mideng hat ho chu katung tun kado peh-in, Chule kabengmul botchai ho chu kangeiphe teni kado peh-e; Jumso dingle chil setkhum dingin jong Kamaichang kasel mang deh poi.
Ajeh chu Pakai Pathenin eipanpin. Hijeh chun eikisulung dong khapoi; Chuti ahijeh chun kamaichang hi meituh song bangin kadoi. Ijeh-inem itile eikijumso louhel ding keiman kahei;
Them eichansah dingpa chu ahung naiye. Koipen ham eikinahpi ding chu? Eiho dingdoh cheh-u hite, Keima kidoupi chu koipen ham? Ama chu kakoma hung lut hen.
Vetan, Pakai Pathenin keima eipanpi, Koiham themmo eichansah ding chu? Ven, abonchauva hi ponjela kijeldoh ding ahiuvin, Nget’in aneh gam dingu ahi.
Nangho lah a koipen chun Pakai agina Ama lhachapa thusei angaiyam. Vah beiya muthima vahle le pa Ahivanga Pakai mina tahsan jinga, a-Pathena kingai jingpa chu?

Vetan, nachan cheh-uva mei kidet’a, Meisel alom loma kidet ho! Nameivah-uva vah leuvin lang Meisel alom loma nadetnauva chun kitolun! Kei khut’a kona namu dingu chu hiche hi ahin, Thohgim tah a nakijam dingu ahiye.
Kathusei ngaiyuvin adih del tea, Pakai holle le ho; Nakikhet lhahna songpi leh Naki khoidohna song chu veuvin.
Napau Abraham leh nahingnu Sarah veuvin, Ajeh chu ama changseh ahipet’a kakouva Ama phatthei kanaboh a Chule mi tamtah kahisah ahitai.

Ajeh chu Pakaiyin Zion hin lhamonin tin, Chuche mun dalhah thip’a umlai jouse alhamona Agammang lah jong chu Eden banga asem ding, Aneldi gamsung chu Pakai honlei banga abol ding ahi; Asunga chun kipana leh thanopna kimuntin, Thangvahna leh kipa lasah gin kija ding ahi.
Kathu ngaiyuvin kamite, Chule nanakhang hindouvin kanam mite; Ijeh-inem itile keiya kona danthu hung potdoh a Chule kathutan dihna chu mitin dinga khovah a hung pang ding ahi.

Kadihna chu ahung kikhin naitul tulin, Mi kahuhhingna ahung potdoh tai; Chuteng kabanjang tenin mitin dinga vai ahom ding Twikhanglen pang dung min jong keima eingah-uvin Chule keima ban thahat chu Amahon akineppiu ahiye.

Khodah-uvin lang van lam veuvin Chutengle noilama leiset hi veuvin; Ajeh chu van jong hi meikhu banga kitolmang ding, Chule leiset hi ponjela kijel doh a Chutengle asunga cheng ho chu Khoinoute banga thi gam ding ahiuve; Amavang keima mihuhhingna chu um jing jenga Kadihna jong chun beitih anei lou ding ahi.
“Adih hethem ho chun kathu ngaiyuvin, Alungthima keima danthu cheng jing miten, Mihemte seisetna ging hih-uvin, Ami houset jalun lung thoi hih-un.

Ijeh-inem itile amaho chu ponsil banga lungin aneh gam diu, Samul pon banga lungtolin aneh chai ding ahiuve; Ahin keima dihna chu atonsot geiya um jing jenga, Chule kami huhhingna chu akhang khanga um jing ding ahi.” ati.

Hung thouvin, hung thouvin thahat hin kivon temin. Vo Pakai banjang; Masang laiya bang chun khang che masa chengse chu Hung thoudoh temuvin. Rahab sat tel jeng jung chu nang nahi hilou ha, Dragon tenga dot pai pai chu nang nahilou ham?
Twikhanglen anakan got sah chu nang nahilou ha, Twipi thuhtah kan-got sah jeng chu? Lhatdam chate galkaina dinga Twikhanglen tong laitah lampi sosah pa chu nahi louham?

Chutengleh Pakaiyin alhatdamsate chu hung kile kit’uvin tin, La asah-uva Zion lama hung kijot ding ahiuve; Alubuh-uva tonsot kipana hung chongin tin, Amahon kipana leh thanopna akimu diu; Gimna leh thoh hahsa chu Jam mang ding ahiye.
“Keima hi Ama chu kahin, nangho lhamonji pa chu kahi; Nang koi nahiya athi thei mihem, Hamhing tobanga kisem mihem chapa Nakichat ham?

Nangman nasumil tai Pakai, nangma Nasempa, Van jong ponbuh sona songdoh pa, Leiset bulpi khom jouse phutdoh pa, Chule ibola nilhum lhuma mi bolgentheipa Lunghan chu nagin jing jeng ham, Pakai mi sumang dinga ahung kigot teng? Mi bolgentheipa Lunghanna chu hoilamba hitam?
Akison kunpa chu kilhakang vah ding, Ama chu thi jong thi louva lhankhuh Ajotsuh jeng lou ding, Chule hai jong haisam lou ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile keima Pakai, na-Pathen kahin, Twikhanglen jeng jong nuh ling jia Chutengleh twidil thongje jua lhapa, Thaneipen Pakai kiti chu Ama min ahiye.

Chule keiman nakam sunga kathu jouse kakhumin, Nangma jeng jong kabanjang lim noiya kasel nahi; Van jong ponbuh son bangin kasongin, Leiset khom bulpi jong kaphutdoh-e; Chule Zion jah a jong chun ‘Nangma kamite nahi,’ kati,” ati.
Hung thoudoh mong mongin, hung thoudoh mong mongin Vo Jerusalem, hung dingdoh tan; Nangman Pakai lunghanna khon chu Pakai khut’a konin nadontai. Lungvaina khon chu Atoneng geiyin nadon vaset tan ahi.
Jerusalem puile ding khatcha aumpon, Ahinsa achapate lah a khat cha umpoi; Jerusalem vah dohsa achapate lah a hin Akhut’a kaile ding khatcha beh aumpoi.
Hiche thil ni hi nachunga hung lhunga ahitan, Koiham nangma nalung hempi ding chu? Suhgamna le suhmangna ahin, Gilkelna le chemjam thahat ahin, Koipen ham nangma Nalhamon ding chu?
Nachapa jouse la alhadah gam tan, Sapeng thanga oh bangin Amaho kholai lampi bul jousea akijamuvin, Abonchauva amaho hi Pakai lunghan dimset ahiuvin, Na Pathen phosalna dimset ahiuve.
Hichejeh chun hiche hi ngaiyin, nang bolgentheiya umpa, Ju ahilou vanga khamna thei donkhamset pa.
Amite ding khohsah a Pakai na-Pathen chun hi tin aseiye; “Vetan, keiman lungvaina khon chu Nangma khut’a konin kala mang tai; Keima lunghanna khon chu Nangman nadon kit louhel ding ahitai;

Hiche chu keiman nangma bolgima pang ho khut’a kakoiya, Nangma jah a, ‘Kunin nachunga lamjot’inge,’ tia seiho; Chujongle nangman natung tun chu tollhang nabahsah-in, Amahon ajot galkai theina dinguvin kholai lamlen nabahsah-in ahi,” ati.

Vo Zion, thoudoh-in, thoudoh-in, nathahat’in hung kivonin; Vo Jerusalem khopi theng, naponsil hoitah kisil temin; Ijeh-inem itile cheptan lou ho leh aboh jouse chu Nasunga hunglut kit louhel ding ahitai.
Hung thoudoh-in lang, leivui chu kithin ngim jengin Vo sohchang Jerusalem; Vo sohchang Zion chanu, Nangonga nakihenna khao ho chu sut lhamin.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Nangho pannabeiya kijohdoh nahiuvin, chule sum beihela kilhatdoh ding nahiuve.
Ajeh chu Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, ‘Kamite chu amasan Egypt gama khopem dingin anacheuvin, chuin Assyria miten imacha hilouvin anabol genthei tauve.
Chule tua hi keiman hikoma ipi kasei ding ham, kamite imacha louvin akikai mange, avaihomteu la amao maovun, nilhum lhumin keima min jong nahsah mon akibole.
Hichejeh chun kamiten keima min hi hin heteiyun tin, hichejeh a chu hiche nikho chuleh thuseiya chu Pakai kiti Keima kahiya, hikoma kaum jing hi ahettei dingu ahi,” ati.

Molsang chungvuma ding kipana thupha hinpo pa Kengphang teni chu itihoi hoiya hoi hitam Kipana thupha hinpoa chamna thu phongle pa, Huhhingna thu phonglea Zion jah a, “Na-Pathenin lengvai apoi,” Tia seile pa chu!
Samu hen, nakho-ngah ho chun Ogin sangtah-in samu hen; Kitha khat tah-in kipa la sau hen, Zion jona Pakai ahung kilekit chu Amahon amit mong monguvin Amusoh kei tauvin ahi.
Jerusalema aongkeova um lai jousen Kipa la hinsa khomuvin; Ajeh chu Pakaiyin amite alhamon in, Jerusalem jong alhatdam tai!
Pakaiyin namtin vaipi jouse mitmun Abanjang theng chu ahinlhangdoh tai; Leiset kolkimvel pumpi hin I-Pathenu mihuhhingna chu amusoh ding ahi.

Kihei mangun, kihei mangun, hichea konin potdoh-uvin, Thilboh chu tongkha hih heluvin; Alah-a konin potdoh-uvin lang Nangho le nangho jeng jong kisuthenguvin Nangho Pakai ding thilkeo manchah ho Polea pang jouse.
Ijeh-inem itile nangho napotdoh phung jeng lou diu, Jam jong najam lou dingu ahi; Ajeh chu Pakai chu namasang uva chea, Israel Pathen chu nanung uva hung pang ding ahi.
Vetan, kalhachapa chu hung khangtouvin tin, Choisanga hung uma hung kidomsang ding; Hita chu hasan sana Hungsang ding ahiye.
Achung changa mi tamtah alungdon bangin, Alimso alemput mihem limso melput sangin achomhelin; Agong umdol jong Mihem chapatea sangin achome.

Hita chu aman namtin vaipi tamtah alungdonsah ding, Ama jeh a leng hon jong akam akisip diu ahi; Ijeh-inem itile ajah-uva kisei khalou hel chu amudiu ahin, Ajah khah loulaiyu chu ahetkhen dingu ahiye.
Keiho thujah tahsan’a koi hiya, Chule koipen henga Pakai banthahat kiphongdoh tam?
Ama chu amasanga hamdon bangin ahung dondoh-in, Tolgoa adon momdoh bangin ahung momdoh-e; Eihon ivetnom dinguvin gong hoile mel-hoi jong apupon, Eideichat theiyu mel-hoi jong apupoi.

Ama chu mihemten not thap le don louvin akoitauvin, Gim genthei dimset mihem hesohna dimset pa, Mihemte vet ngam louhela kikoipa chutoh abang tan, Amapa not thap’in akikoiyin, eihon jong ama imachan igel pouve.
Tahbeh mongin aman eiho hesohna tin cheng apon, Igimna jouseu apomangtai; Ahinla eihon ama chu Pathenin aengbola Adena abolgenthei danin igeljo tauve.

Hijongleh ama chu eiho suhkhel chengse jeh-in akimavon, Eiho themmo chengse jalin ama akisu gep tai; Ama chunga chun eiho kithoidamna engbolna chu achu tan, Chule ama kijepna chengsen eiho eidamsah tauve.
Eiho ibonchauva kelngoi banga vahmang gam ihitauvin, Ibonchauva ama ama deilam cheh a kihei cheh ihitauve; Hiti chun Pakaiyin eiho themmona Abonchan ama chunga alhut tai.
Ama chu akibol gentheiyin, chule akibol hesoh tai; Ahivangin aman kam cheng khat jeng jong akeh poi.
Bol gentheina le thutan nan ama chu akikai mang tai; Chule ama khang guiya mite koipen ham Ama chu mihing gamsunga konin akisat lhan, Kamite suhkheljeh a ki-engbol ahitai, tia geldoh ah?
Amahon ama chu mi giloute toh alhankhuh tha khat’in asem gomuvin, Chule mihaopa chutoh jong athina a athi tha sah-uve; Aman pumhat thil imacha abol louhela, Akam sunga jong thujou apot louhel vangin.

Hita jongleh ama suhgep ding chu Pakai lunglam ahitan, Pakaiyin ama chu natna athohsah tai; Amale ama chonset thoina thilto dinga akipehdoh jeh hin, Aman ason achilhah amutei ding, ahin nikho jong sot ding ahi; Ama khut’a kona Pakai lungdei chu Hung khangtou ding ahiye.
Aman ahinkhoa athohgim ga chu amua lung nachim ding, Ama hetna jeh-a chu midih, kalhachapan Mihem tamtah hi adih-a asim ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile aman athemmona jouseu apoh ding ahiye.

Hichejeh a chu keiman ama chu milen ho toh chan kahoppeh a, Aman jong mihat te chu thil kichomdoh akihoppi ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile aman ahinkho chu athi din twisunin asung lha jengin, Hijeh chun suhkhel neiho toh akisim tha tai: Hichea chun aman mi tamtah chonset apon, Suh khel neiho dingin ataopeh-in ahi.

Kipah-in la san, Vo achinga cha neilou; Chohje jun la san lang. Hatah-in khosamin, Nangma naoso nat thoh kha loulai; Ijeh-inem itile akeova umnu chate chu Jipa neinu chate sanga tamjo ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Naponbuh sonna mun keh lenin lang, Nachenna pondal chengse chu kiphajal sah-in: Nakhaojang ho chu nungjel hih-in, Nakhom ho chu phutdet jingin.
Ijeh-inem itile nangma jet le veiya nakithejal ding, Nachilhah hon namtin vaipi alouva, Dalhah thipsa khopi jouse jong chu Mihem ahin chensah ding ahi.

Kicha hih-in, ajeh chu nakijumso louhel ding ahi. Lung dongin um hih-in, ajeh chu nakijachat sah louhel ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile nangman naneo laiya najachatna chu nasuhmil a, Nameithai jeh a vetsetna chu nageldoh kit louhel ding ahitai.
Ijeh-inem itile nasempa chu najipa ahin, Thaneipen Pakai kiti chu ama min ahiye: Chule Israelte Mithengpa chu Nalhatdampu ahin, Leiset pumpi Pathen akiti.
Ajeh chu donlouva ki koi, lungthima hesoh thoh Mi jinu banga Pakaiyin nangma nakou ahitan: Mouthah cha kida doh tobang nahi. Tin na-Pathenin aseiye.
Ijeh-inem itile phat chomkhat chu nangma kadalhahsa nahitan, Hijongleh laina tah a kachop khom ding nahi.
Phat chomkhat chu lungsatna let jeng junga Kaki heimang khum nahitan, Hijongleh lungsetna gui tan louva nachunga lainatna kanei ding ahi, Tin Nalhatdampu, Pakaiyin aseiye.

Ajeh chu hiche hi keima dingin Noah nikho lai toh abangin, Noah khanga twisanglen chun leiset chup kit hih hen, Tia kakihahsel tobanga chu Nangma chunga lung hang taponge Tia kihahsela Chule naphoh kit taponge kati ahitai.

Ijeh-inem itile molsang jouse jong kitolmang thei, Thinglhang jouse jong hi tolmanga um thei ahi: Ahin keima lungset longlou vang chu Nanga kona kitolmang louhel ding, Chule keima chamna kitepna chu Tolmanga um louhel ding ahi, Tin nachunga lainatna nei Pakai chun aseiye.
Vo bolgentheiya umnu, khopihui sem onsa, lhamon louva umnu. Vetan, keiman na-in song ho chu songval jenga kasah-a, Na-in bul khom jong chu Sapphire song mantam jenga kaphu ding ahi.
Keiman na-in tingvum kitungdoh jouse song mantama kasema, Nakelkot jouse jong songdula kasem ding; Chule napal dung jouse jong chu Song mantam cha cha kasem ding ahiye.
Nachapate abonchauva Pakaiyin ahil ding, Nachapate nasatah a hung hao ding ahiuve.

Nang jong adih a nakiphutdet ding, Bolgentheina gamla tah a nadalhah ding ahitai; Ijeh-inem itile nakichat louhel ding ahitan ahi, Tijatna kona nagamlat ding ahi; Ajeh pen tah chu Hitobang chun nahinphah lou ding ahitai.
Mi khattouvin kitomona asemdoh a ahileh, Hiche chu keiya hung kon ahipoi; Koi hijeng jongleh nang toh kitomona semdoh chan chu Nangma jeh a kipal lhu cheh ding ahi.
Vetan, keiman thih khenga, meihol jap jap pa, Adeiya aman chah ding manchah kikhenpa chu kasemsa ahiye. Keiman thil sumang dinga Thil sumangpa jong chu kasem ahi.

Hijeh chun nangma douna manchah kisem chan chu Khangtou louhel ding ahi; Chule nangman jong thutanna a nang douna thusei leigui jouse chu Nakisuh noh sah gam ding ahi; Hiche hi Pakai lhacha ho goulo ding ahin, Chule keiya kona athem channa diu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
Kha-e, adang chah chanin twiphung hinjon cheh-uvin, Sum neilou chu hungu hen kichoh uhen nejong neu hen! Hunguvin lengpitwi le bongnoi kichohuvin, Sum beiyin chule aman beiyin.

Ipibola chang lhah hilouhel chohna nasum nasuh mangu hiya, Chule oivana thei hilouva natoh gimu ham? Kasei hi lunglut tah-in ngaiyuvin Apha pha neuvin; Chule nangho le nangho jeng jong Sathao chunga chun kipah-uvin.

Nanakhang hinsunguvin lang kahenga hunguvin, Nahin theina dinguvin ngaicheh-uvin; Chule keiman nangho toh kalungset longlou, David dinga thon thei lou lungsetna dinga Tonsot kumkhoa dinga Kitepna khat kasemdoh ding ahiye.
Vetan, keiman David chu mitin dinga hettohsah khat’a kasema, Mitin japi dinga lamkai khat le thuneiya kasem ahi.

Vetan, nangman nahet phah louhel namtin vaipi nakouva, Hijeh a chu nahepha louhel namtin vaipi nahenga hung lhailut ding ahiuve; Pakai na-Pathen jal leh Israelte Mithengpa jal a, Ijeh-inem itile aman nangma naloupi sah tai.
Mutheiya aumpet’in Pakai chu holin, Nailama aum pet’in ama chu kouvin;

Migilou chun achonna lampi dalha hen lang, Midih louvin alunggel jouse gelda hen; Pakaiyin ahepi theina dingin Pakai henga hung kile kit hen, I-Pathenu henga chun; Ajeh chu Pakaiyin bulhingset’a angaidam ding ahiye.
Ijeh-inem itile keima lunggel ho chu nangho lunggel ahipon, Nangho lampi ho chu keima lampi ahipoi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Ajeh chu leiset sanga van asan joh bang hin, Keima lampi ho chu nangho lampi ho sangin asang jon, Chule kalunggel ho jong chu Nangho lunggel ho sangin asang joi.
Ijeh-inem itile vana kona gotwi le buhbang ahung lhah a Kinungle kit louva leiset achap nouva Hamhing louhing dotsah theiya alha a Muchi tupa muchi akimusah-a an’a kivahpa changlhah apeh banga,

Kakamsunga kona potdoh thucheng chu chuti ding ahin; Hiche chu ahomkeova hung kilekit louhel ding, Keiman ka-ngaito chu abulhit tei tei ding, Keiman apanna dinga kasolpeh thil’a chu khangtou ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile nangho kipah a navaikon diu, Namasang uva molsang jouse leh thinglhang jousen Kipa la ahinsah khom cheh dingu ahin, Loujaova thingphung jousen jong Akhut abeh soh kei dingu ahiye.

Lingle khao khela chah thing hung keh doh ding, Theimiling khela pahcha phung hung keh doh ding; Chule hiche chu Pakaiya het jingna thil hi ding, Sat lhuh kit louhel ding tonsot’a melchihna pang ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin hitin aseiye. “Thutan adih-a kitan chu nit’uvin lang adih chu boluvin; Ajeh chu kamihuhhingna hung lhung pai ding ahitan, Kamihuhdohna hung kiphongdoh ding ahitai.
Kasei banga bola mihem chu anun nom ahi, Kasei tuh chah jing mihem chapa, Suboh louva cholngah nikho nit jing pa, Agilou bolna dinga akhut tuh tang jingpa chu,” ati.

Amatah Pakaiya kijopmatsa gamdang min hitin seida hen, “Thon louvin Pakai chun amite lah a konin eisep khen inte,” tin; Chule nukiso jong chun hitin seida hen, “Vetan, keima thing phung gosa kahiye” tin.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Nukiso ho keima cholngah nikho jouse nit jinga, Keima lung lhai lhaina thil jeng kilhendoh a, Chule kakitepna tuh chahjing ho chu
Keiman kapal sunga ka-in kapeh a, Chapate leh chanute sanga phajo het jingna leh min khat kapeh ding ahiuve. Keiman tonsot’a min thanna kapeh a Hiche min chu kinoi mang kit louhel ding ahitai.

Chujongleh gamdang miho acham tahuva Pakaiya kijopmat ho, Ama jenle ding ngaitoa, Pakai min ngailut deiya, Chule ama lhacha hinomho, Cholngah nikho nitjing ho leh Asuboh lou chengse Chule keima kitepna tuh chah jing jeng ho chu

Keiman abonchauva kalhang theng chunga kapuilut ding, Kei koma taona insunga amaho chu kipah thanoma kalha ding ahi; Apumgo thiltou ahin, akilhaina ganthau ahin, Kamaicham phunga kasanpeh cheh ding ahiuve; Ijeh-inem itile keima in chu mitin dinga Taona in kiti ding ahiye.
Hitin aseiye Pakai Pathen, Israel paidohsa chengse chomkhom pan, Akichom khomsa chengse tailouva jong Keiman ahenga adang dang jong kakhop khombe ding ahi,” ati.
Loujaova gamsa jouse hunguvin lang hung bah gamuvin, Nangho gammang lah a gamsa jousen.
Akho-ngah ho chu amit acho gam tan, Abonchan hetna beiyin aumsoh tai; Abonchan uicha paotheilou abangun, Hijeh chun mi ahap thei tapouve; Mang jeng jeng neiyuvin, Alum lumuvin, akijam jam nomuve.

Uichaten vang neh ding hatah-in aducha tun tun uvin, Ahinla neh khop anei bulhing pouve. Kelngoi ching hon jong ima ahekhen thei pouvin, Hijeh chun ama ama deilam cheh a akiheitauve; Abonchauvin koi ti dingpen beihelin Ama ama phatchomna cheh aholtauve.
Amahon, “Hunguvin, keiman lengpitwi gahol ingting, Ibonchauvin khamna thei ju donchimset’u hite; Jing nikho jong tuni nikho bang bang hintin, Seithei louhela len hiding ahi,” atiuve.
Midih chu amang thah jin, Koimachan jong lungthim in achingpoi; Houva kitah ho min akai mang jiuvin, Koimacha la ima hekhen thei aumpoi; Ajeh chu tosetna masanga Midih kikaimangjo ahiye.
Ama chu chamna a lutjo ahin, Amaho chu ajalkhun uva kicholdo ahitauve Achondih nauva Lamjot jing ho chu.
Ahin nangho, hikoma hung lut’uvin, mitphel doithem ho chapate, Pasal mijong ho leh, noti numei chilhah ho;

Koipen chung chang thua kichem nahiuva, Koipen tah douna kamka hom hel hoi nahiuvam? Chule lei lhajap jap nahiuvam? Nangho hi suhkhelna neiho chate nahiu hilou ha, Jouthu sei ho Chilhah nahiu hilou ham?
Gangpi phung dung le thing na-eng noi tina lop hen hun ho. Phaicham dunga nachasen jouse phil manga, Songpi khikah noidunga Selmang ho nahiu hilou ham?

Phaichama songjol lah a chun nang chan ding aume. Hiche ho mong mong chu ahi nangma chan ding; Hiche ho hounan ju-ning nalhit khum jin, Chang thilto nahin choipeh jie. Hiche thil hoa hi keima Eikijol lungdam ding ham?
Nangman molsang chungvuma najal khun nadon, Hilama chun kilhaina gantha that dingin nachetoutai.

Kotpi sungnung le kotpi khom sungnung achun Namilim hou natungdoh-in; Ijeh-inem itile keima neida lhan, Najalkhun chu pon nahoh-in achunga nakaldoh-in, Lentah-in naphajal soh keiyin, Amaho chu nadei dei nakilhen jengin, Ajalkhun uva nalup nomin, Sagohkeo pi chu navet nom e!
Thaotwi choiyin Molech doiphunga nachen, Thao nasu nam let lut jeng jin; Nangman napalaiho chu gamla tah a nasol mangin, Noimigam geiyin nasollhan ahi.
Nalampi asao behseh jeh-in nachol lheh jeng tan, Ahinla nangman, “Kinepna bei ahitai,” nati poi; Nakhut tah-in tha thah beh namaidoh tan, Hijeh chun nalhadah tapoi.
Koipen tah nakichat’a nagin leh jou nasei hiya, Keima neigeldoh louhel ham? Gel haicha jong neigel louhel ham? Phat sotpi hi lungmong tah a kana um jeh a neigin lou hilou ham?
Keiman nadihna le nathilbol ho seipeh ing ting, Ahinla hiche ho chun napanpi thei ponte.

Natao teng jongleh milim nasem khom letlut ho chun Nangma nahuhdoh jengu hen! Aboncha chu khopi huiyin apoh manga, Husa khat’in aboncha alhoh mang diu ahi. Amavang keiya kisel pan gam leiset alo ding, Chule keima lhang theng chu alo ding ahi.
Chutengleh hita kisei ding ahi. “Leipal sep sanguvin, lei pal sep sanguvin. Lamlen ding chu semtoh uvin, Kamite lamlhah a kipalna thei jouse toldoh-uvin.” kitinte.

Ijeh-inem itile hitin aseiye, Mi chungnung, choisanga umpa, Amin jong Atheng kitipan; “Keima chungsang, munthenga kachengin, Lung khela lhagaova lungnem mi toh kacheng khom e; Mi lungnem lhagao suh hal peh ding leh Lung khel mi lungthim suh hal peh dingin.

Ajeh chu keima aitih a kalung himo jing jeng lou ding, Phat tina kalunghan jing jeng lou ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile lhagao chu keiya hung kondoh ahin, Chule hinkho jouse haina husa hi keima semsa ahi cheh-e.
Ajeh pentah chu aneipap akiloset jeh a keima lung hang kahin. Ken ama kadengin, kakihei mangkhumin, kalung hange; Aman ma einung seiset setin Ama lunglam jenga bou ache jinge.
Keiman lamlhah jouse jong kamutai, hijongle kadamsah ding, Kapuiya kithuh bep’a kalhamon ding ahi; Alhasetpi chengse dinga jong, Akauva akam cholmanu kasemdoh peh ding ahi.
Cham leng hen, cham leng hen, gamla naiya, Tin Pakaiyin aseiye, chule keiman ama kadamsah ding ahi.
Amavang mi giloute chu twikhanglen kidil tobang ahiuve. Ajeh chu twi kidil chu kicholdo theiji lou ahi: Chule twipinjong bonlhoh le atheng lou jeng a nuh doh jin ahi.
Ka-Pathenin, ‘Migiloute dingin Chamna aumpoi,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Kho samin, na-ogin nemsah hih helin. Na-ogin sangtah-in samin lang sumkon gin toh bahsah-in: Kamite henga asuh khelnau gaphongin lang, Jacob insung jah a achonsetnau gaphong in.

Hijeng jongleh amahon nisim niseh-in Keima eihol jinguvin, Keima lampi jouse hetding atha nom uvin ahi; Thildih bol nam mite tobang le A-Pathenu thupeh chondan jouse Sumil louhel mite bangin aumuve; Amahon thu adih-a kitan thudol keima eidong uvin, Pathen nailam ding athanom uve.

‘Ibola keihon an ka-ngoluva nangman neimupeh louvu ham? Ibola keiho kineosah kahiuva nangin neihet peh louvu hitam? Vetan, nanghon an na-ngol niu chun Nangma deicheh nahol jouvin. Nangho natong jouse chu Nabol genthei uvin ahi.
Vetan, kinahna ding leh kisatna ding Tin hemtah tah a kikhotto dinga an ngolji nahi bouvui. Tuni nikhoa na an-ngol tobangu hin Chung gama na oginu kijah phah sah ponte.

Hitobanga an ngolna dinga hi Keiman nikho khat mihem kineosahna dinga kalhen ham? Min alu akhai khut’a ting phung jela akijela Chule khaodip pon akikhuh a vutbol lah-a lum ding ham? Nangman hiche chu an ngol ahi nati ding hiya, Pakai dinga santhei tah nikho ahi nati ding ham?

Keiman kalhendoh an ngol ding chu Gitlouva kigahna jouse sut lhah ding, Namkol khao jouse jong lhap lhah ding, Bolgentheiya umte chamlhat sah ding Chule namkol kitijouse Sut lhah soh ding hi hilou ham?
Nachang lhah agilkel ho toh kihop’a, Inbei ho na insunga hin puilut ding, Asagoh keova umpa namu tengleh ponsil silpeh a Nakisel manga namihempi nadonda lou ding hilou ham?

Chutileh navah chu jing khovah bangin hungvah lhan tin, Chutengle nadamna chu twisam banga hung putdoh loi ding; Nadihna chu na-masanga lamkaiyin tin, Pakai loupina chu nangma nung lama hung pang ding ahi.

Chuteng nangman Pakai chu nakouva Aman nahin hou ding; Nangman kho samin natin, Aman ‘Hikoma kaume’ ati ding ahiye. “Nangma najalah a pohgih namkol chu nasuh manga, Khutjunga kichiuko na leh thu gilou sei nangah a ahileh,
Agilkel dinga nakipum sunlhah jenga Bolgentheiya um chu na-oiva sah a ahileh. Chuteng muthim lah a konin navah hung vahdoh intin, Namuthim lai jong chu sun changlai bang ding ahi.

Chule Pakaiyin nangma tang louvin napuile jingin tin, Nadeichat thil apha pha navah va ding ahi; Chujongleh nagu nachang jouse thahatsah intin, Twi kichapnou jing honlei nabah ding, Atwiput jong kang khalou hel jeng Twinah phung tobang nahi ding ahiye.

Chule nathillui asesa chengse chu kisathah kit’in tin, Nangman khanggui tamtah bulpi naphudoh kit’a, Akeh lai jouse sempha pa nakiti ding, Kholai dung jouse chenna theiya thah semphatpa nakiti ding ahi.

Nangman cholngah nikhoa nakengphang natuh tanga, Keima nitheng nia nalungdei nabolda, Cholngah nikho chu kipa nikho ahi natia, Pakai choldo nikho chu jatah a nabol a; Nangma lampi jenga chelouva, cholngah nikho najabola Nangma lunglhaina jeng hol louva, imacha louva gel louva nauma ahileh,
Pakaiya nakipa thanop ding, Keiman nangma leiset chung sang lai jousea katousah ding; Napa Jacob gouva chu nangma kavah ding nahi, Ajeh chu Pakai kamsungin thu aseitai,” ati.
Vetan, Pakai khut chun mi ahuhhing thei louna dingin Akisuchom deh hih laiyin; Chule anakhang jong kho ajah thei louna dingin Angong kha hih laiye;
Amavang nathemmona chengseuvin nangho leh Na-Pathenu kikah a kikhenna asemdoh a, Nachonset hou chun nangho dinga amai aselmang ahin, Hijeh a chu Pathenin ajah phah lou ahiye.
Ijeh-inem itile nakhut jouseu chu thisanin akisuboh gamtan, Nakhutjung houjong chu themmona adimsoh tai; Nakamsung uvin la jouthu jeng aseiyin, Naleigui uvin jong thu gilou jeng asodoh jinge.

Koima chan thildih-a mi aheh ngaipon, Khat chan jong lung thengselin danthu aholngaipoi; Abonchauva thu homkeova bou kisong ahiuvin, Jouthujeng aseijiu ahibouve; Amahon jou le nal akheng khom jiuvin Themmona ahinso doh jiuvin ahi.
Amahon gulse tuiho jong agalauvin, Maimom panjang apheh jiuvin, Koi hijongle atuiho nekhapen pa chu athijie, Chule khat pen pen chu akikhedoh a ahileh gulse ahijenge.

Maimom panjang apheh-u chu ponsila jong pang louding, Amaho thil semsa chu mihemin ponsila jong akisil lou ding ahi. Athilbol jouseu themmona kibol jeng ahin, Akhut’uva pumhat’a thil kibol jeng ahibouve.

Thil gilou lama akengphangu ajang khai jelin, Chule themmona bei mite thisan aso loi jeng jiuvin ahi; Amaho lunggel jouse chu themmona lunggel jeng ahin, Alhanglam dunguva jong gamna le manthahna jeng aume.
Chamna lampi chu ahepouve. Akiheina lam lamuva jong thu adih a kitanna aumpoi. Alamlen u jong jum thet’in akisemuvin. Hiche dunga vah lut jousen lung nopna akimupouve.

Hijeh chun kakomuva thu adih a akitan ding agamla lheh jengin. Hijeh hin adih chun eipha jou tapouvin ahi; Keihon khovah kavelhi jinguvin, ahinla vetan muthimjeng ahibouve. Khovah changsan kavelhiuvin, ahinla muthima kavah leuve.
Mitcho ho bangin bang kamai le leuvin, Mit neilou ho bangin kakimai le leuve; Khomut chip cheppet bangin sun chang laiyin kakipal lhuvin, Thahat tah ho henga keiho hi mithisa bang bang kahiuve.
Savom ho bangin kakithol le kakithol leuvin, Vahuite bangin kamao maovuve: Thu adih kitanna kahol leuvin, khat cha la aumpoi. Huhhingna kaholuvin, ahinla keiho dingin agamla lheh jenge.

Ajeh chu nangma masanga kasuh khelnau apunbe cheh cheh jengin, Chule kachonset hou hin keiho douna thu aseiye; Ijeh-inem itile kasuh khelnau toh kaumkhom jinguvin, Chule keihon jong kathemmona jouseu kakihet nauve;
Thil kasukhel’uvin, Pakai kataitom uvin, Ka-Pathenu kajuinauva konin kakihei mang tauve; Bolgentheina le kidouna thu jeng kaseiyuvin, Lungthima konin jouthu jeng kasem thu uvin kaseidoh jiuvin ahi.
Thu adih-a kitanna akinung notan, Adih jong chu gamla tah ageitai: Ijeh-inem itile thutah chu mipi lenna tollhang ningkoi dunga alhamang tan, Hijeh chun chondihna chu avahlut theipoi.
Thutah chu alhasamin, Hijeh chun agilouva kona jamdohpa chu mi nehgam din akisemdoh-e. Pakaiyin hiche hi amun, hichea thu adih-a akitan lou jeh-in Alung lhai naisai tapoi.
Mihem khat cha aumlou amudoh tan, Asutang ding khat chabeh a um louhel adatmo lheh tai: Hichun aban thahat’in gal ajou tan, Chule ama dihna ma man adinsah jou ahi.
Pakaiyin adih ompho bangin akivonin, Alujanga huhhingna thih lukhuh bangin akikhuh-e; Aman phulahna ponsil bangin akisil’in, Chule ponsila kijel bangin lunghan nan akitomjol jenge.
Mi athilbol dungjui cheh a Pakaiyin alethuh cheh ding ahin, Amelmate chunga lungsa ding, agalte chunga alethuh ding; Twikhanglen panga gamsung jouse chu A lethuh a phu alah cheh ding ahiye.
Hijeh chun mihon nilhum lama pat Pakai min aginguvin, Niso lama pat aloupina aginguve; Ajeh chu Pakai hoh lama twi long banga hung ding, Pakai khopi huiyin asemhoh tobang ding ahi.
Chule Pakai chu Jacob mite Asuh khelna kona hung kilekit ho dinga Zion Lhandampua hung pang ding ahi, Tin Pakayin aseiye.

“Chule keima din vang hiche hi amaho toh kakitepna ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye, nachunga um kalhagao le nakam-sunga kakoisa kathusei ho hi nangma kamsunga konin jong, nachate kamsunga konin jong, natute kamsunga konin jong tua pat atonsot geiya potdoh louhel ding ahitai tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
Thoudoh-in, salvah tan, Ajeh chu nakhovah ahung lhung tai; Pakai loupina chu Nangma chunga ahung lhungtan ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile vetan, muthimin leiset hinkhun tin, Muthim lhangkhal chu mitin chunga hung kiheh ding; Hijongleh Pakai chu nangma chunga hung dingdoh intin, Nachunga ama loupina chu kimudoh ding ahiye.
Chutengleh namtin vaipi hi nangma vah a hunguvin tin, Chule lengho jengjong nangma loupi vah a hung diu ahi.
Khodah-in lang nakimvel vetemin, Amaho abonchan akikhomuvin na-henga ahunguve; Gamla tah a konin nachapate hunguvin tin, Chule nachanute chu min akipom mang dingu ahi.
Chuteng nangman ven natin navah hung kikho ding, Nalungthima lutjenjena nakipa ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile twikhanglen neng jeng jung chu nahenga hung kitola Namtin vaipi haonan nahin phah ding ahiye.

Sangongsao hon jamah chun nachup hel ding ahi Mid’ian gam le Ephah gama sangong sao lagol ho chun; Chule Sheba haona chengse aboncha Nangma heng hung lhung ding ahiuve. Amahon sana le gimnamtui ahinpoh-uva Pakai vahchoina chu ahin phonjal dingu ahi.

Kedar’a kelngoi honte nang henga hung kikhomuva, Nebai’oth’a kelngoi chal ho chun nang kin jeng abol diu ahi; Hiche ho chu kamaicham chunga san-thei dola hung kilhut diu, Chuteng keiman ka-in loupi tah chu kaloupi sah cheh ding ahi.
Meilhang banga leng jenjun ho khu koi hiuva, Vakhute banga abangkot dunguva lengdoh hiuvam?

Ajeh chu twikhanglen pang dunga miten keima eingah-uvin tin, Tarshish gama kong ho chu amasa pena Gamla tah a kona nachapateu leh Asana adangkau poh tha dinga hung masa ding ahiuve; Pakai na-Pathen min jal leh Israelte Mithengpa jala, Ajeh chu aman nang naloupisah ahitai.

Gamchom mite chapaten napal jouse hin genuvin tin, Chule aleng teuvin jong nangma kin jeng aboldiu ahi; Ajeh chu kalungsat pet chun nangma kadengin, Hijongleh kalung lhai pet’in nachunga hepina kaneiye.

Nakelkot jouse jong honsa um jing jeng ding, Sun le jan a kikhah louhel ding ahiuve: Hita chu mihemten namtin vaipi haona chu nahenga ahin pohlutna diu, Alengteuvin alamkaiya ahon hona hung kijot diu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile nangma kin bol lou nam mite leh lenggam chu Mangthah ding ahiuve; Hitobang namtin vaipi ho chu Keo hela kilha ding ahiuve.
Lebanon loupina chu nahenga hung lhunga, Chah thing ahin, theipi thing, meila thing ahin Keima muntheng jemhoiya hung pang ding ahiuve; Keiman kakengphang teni kangapna lai chu kaloupi sah ding ahi.

Nangma bolgentheiya pang ho chapate Abong bonga nahenga hung kithol ding ahiuve; Chule nangma not thap’a nabol jouse Nakengphang bul tenia hung kun cheh diu ahi; Hiche ho chun nang hi Pakai khopi natiuvin tin, Israel Mithengpa Zion nati dingu ahi.
Nakidalhah a nakihot bola, Khatcha jong najotpa ding beihela nakikoisa ahin, Keiman tonsot lal loupia kasemdoh a Akhang akhanga kipana kasemdoh ding nahi.

Nangman namtin vaipi jouse noitwi nachep’a, Leng jouse noitwi nachep ding ahi; Chutengle nangman Kei hi Pakai kitipa, Nahuhhingpa, Nalhatdampu, Jacob dinga Hatchungnungpa chu Kahiye, ti nahet doh ding ahi.

Sum-eng khela keiman sana kahin poh lut ding, Thih khela dangka kahin pohlut’a, Thing khela sum-eng kahin poh lut’a Song ho khela chu thih kahin pohlut ding ahi. Keiman natoh vetup’a pang ho chu chamna kapeh a Chule nang dinga toh vaipoa pang ho chu dih kachansah ding ahi.

Nagam sunga chu pumhat thu kija kha louhel ding, Nagamgi sung dunga jong gamna le manthahna um lou ding ahi; Napal jouse jong chu ‘Huhhingna’ tia naseiya. Nakelkot ho jong chu ‘Vahchoina’ nati ding ahi.

Sun tengle nisa jeng jong nang dinga vahchom deh lou ding, Jan tengjongle lhavah chun nasalvah chom lou ding ahi: Amavang Pakai chu nang dinga tonsot khovah a panga Na-Pathen chu nangma loupina hi ding ahi.
Na-nisan jong lhumtih nei talou ding, Na-lhathah jong kitoldoh louhel ding ahiye; Ijeh-inem itile Pakai chu nang dinga tonsot khovah a pang ding, Chule nalunghem na nikho jouse kichaisoh ding ahitai.
Namite abonchauva adih changsoh diu, Gamsung chu aitih geiya alo dingu ahi; Keima choiat’a kaum theina dinga Kakhutsoh, kakhut tah a kathing phu dondoh chu ahi.
Alhompen tah jong chu mihem phung khat hung lhingin tin, Aneopen tah jong chu thahat tah mihem nam khat lhing ding ahi; Keima Pakai chu kahin, Thil aphat cha kahin noloi ding ahi.

Pakai lhagao chu kachunga aume, Ijeh-inem itile bolgentheiya umte henga Kipana thupha hillhang dinga Pakaiyin keima thao einu ahitai: Lung gentheite lung damsah dinga eihinsola Sohchang ho henga lhadohna thu phongdoh dinga, Songkul lut ho henga Songkul kihonna ding phongdoh a,
Pakai lung lhaina Kum phongdoh dinga, I-Pathenu phulah nikho phongdoh a Alunghem jouse lhamon dinga,

Ziona lunghem te lungmonna thu seipeh ding leh Vutvam kinu sanga pahchavui opeh dinga Lunghemna sanga kipana thaotwi nupeh dinga, Lhagao nguisa sanga vahchoina von kivon ding, Hita chu amaho hi adih a pang gangpi phung ho tobang akitiuva, Ama loupia aum theina dinga Pakai thingphu tia akisei theina dinguva Eihinsol ahiye.
Amahon thil lui gemsa chengse chu sapha kit’uvin tin, Masanga kisugepsa alui chengse chu atundoh dingu, Khopi gemsa ho jong chu asemphat phat’uva Khang tamtah sunga agemsa ho chu asemphat dingu ahi.
Midang ho hung dinguvin tin Nakelngoi hon hou chu navah peh dingu, Chule gamchom mi chapate chu nalou kaiyuva panga, Nalengpi lei lhouvuva hung pang ding ahiuve;
Nangho vang chu Pakai thempute nakiti dingu, Mihon nangho chu i-Pathenu kin bola pang ho nati diu ahi: Nanghon namtin vaipi ho gou kivahna naneiyuva, Amaho haona a chu nangho naloupi diu ahiye.
Najachatna kheluva chanphat nijen nachan diu, Jalou tah a nakibolnau khela nachan nakipapi diu ahi; Hijeh a chu nagam sunguva chan ni jen nalo diu, Nangho dinga tonsot kumkhoa kipana hiding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile Kei Pakai hin thu dih-a kitan kadeiyin, Thil guh le thil dih lou kahoi; Keiman kitah tah a atoh manu kalepeh ding, Chule amaho toh tonsot kumkhoa kitepna kasem ding ahi.

Ason achilhah chengse chu namtin vaipi ho lah a kithangsoh-in tin; Achilhah hou jong mitin lah a kihedoh ding ahiuve; Amupha jousen ahetsoh dingu ahi, Amaho hi Pakai phatthei boh chang mite ahiuve tiuvinte.

Keima Pakaiya hapan kipah ingting, Kalhagao jong ka-Pathena kithang-at ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile aman huhhingna ponsilin eisilpeh tan, Dihna chun ponchun in eichunjol sel tai Jinei ding pan pahchavui aki-o bang leh Jinei dingnu thil-hoi hoiya akijep bangin.

Ijeh-inem itile leiset’in hamhing le louhing adotdoh sah a Hon leiyin asunga muchi kitu ahinsep doh bang chun Pakai Pathenin jong adih le vahchoina hinsep doh intin, Namtin vaipi ho masanga hamdon banga adotsah ding ahi.
Ajeh chu Zion khohsah na kaum thim lou ding, Jerusalem khohsah na kacholdo lou ding ahi; Athem channa ding vah leng lunga ahung kikhodoh a Ahuhhingna chu kolphe meivah banga ahung kikapdoh kahsen.
Namtin vaipin nangma them channa muvin tin, Chule leng jousen jong naloupina amu dingu ahi; Chutengleh nangma jong Pakai kamsunga hung kiseidoh ding Min thah beh khat’a nakikou ding ahi.
Pakai khut’a nangma lallukhuh melhoitah nahi ding,

Nangma, dalhahsa, nakiti kit louhel ding, Nagam jong chu gamthipsa kiti kit lou hel ding ahi; Amavang nangma hi Keima kipana sunga umnu nakiti ding, Chule nagam jong chu ajineisa kiti ding ahi; Ajeh chu nachunga Pakai akipah-in, Nagam jeng jong jinei ding ahiye.
Ijeh-inem itile gollhangin nu-ngah akichenpi banga, Nachapaten nangma nakichenpi diu, Chule jinei dingpa ajinei dingnu chunga akipa banga Na-Pathen chu nachunga kipah ding ahi.
Vo Jerusalem, keiman napal chung dunga kho ngah tampi kakoiyin, Amaho chu nilhum lhum jan khovah vah a um thim louhel ding ahiuve. Nang ho Pakai geldoh jing jeng ho Kicholdo hih heluvin.
Pakai chu umthim theiyin lha hih heluvin Aman Jerusalem atundoh a Leiset chunga hi Vahchoi theiya aumsah kah sen.
Pakai chu akhut jetlam leh Aban thahat panin akihahsel tai. “Keiman nalhosoh chang melmate neh dinga kapehkit lou ding, Gamchom min jong natoh gimga lengpitwi adon lou diu ahi;
Amavang chang apanga kikhol pan bou aneh a Pakai avahchoi ding, Lengpitwi athal khoma pang hon bou Keima muntheng lhong laiya adon diu ahibouve,” ati.
Cheuvin, cheuvin kelkot jouse jot paiyun. Mipi dingin lampi ong hoiyuvin; Laiyuvin, laiyuvin, lhang lamlen chu. Song ho chu paidoh-uvin lang Mipi chungvuma Ponlap khat domsang uvin.
Vetan, Pakaiyin leiset kolkimvela aphongdoh tan, Zion chanu jah a seipeh-uvin lang. “Vetan, nahuhhingna ahung lhung tai; Ven, kipaman ahin choiyin, a-angsunga kipaman akoiye,” tin.
Chutengleh amaho chu Mithengte Pakai lhatdamsa te kiti diu ahi; Chule nangma jong ‘Holdohsa, Dalhah thipsa hilou khopi’ nakiti ding ahi.

Edoma kona hungpa, Bozrah a kona ponsandup kisila hungpa Ponsil loupi tah kisil pa. Ama thahat nasatah a hung kitolpa khu koi ham? “Hiche hi keima kahin, them channa kaphondoh a Huhhing hat tah kahi,” tin aseiye.
Ipi dinga naponsil hiti san hiya Chule napon jouse lengpithei chilna kichilsan tobang ham?

“Keiman lengpithei chilna a chun kachangseh-in kachil lhan, Mipi lah a konin koimachan eichil hu poi; Hiche ho chu kalunghan pet’a kachil chaisa ahin, Kalungsat pet’a kachotphasa ahiuve; Ahinnau thisan chu keima ponsil chung dunga akithe khumin, Kavon jouse kasunat gamtai.
Ijeh-inem itile kalungthima phulah ding nikho kana-gel jing, Chule kalhatdamna ding nikho ahung lhung tai.
Kavet vet vangin panpi ding koimacha aumpon, Eiki tijat sah bep’in koimacha eilhamon thei aumpoi; Hijeh chun kaban thahat ma man gal kajouvin, Chule kalungsat chun eiphong dinge.
Kalunghan hin mitin kapal jelin, Kalungsat chu twidon bangin kadon chimsah-e. Ahin nau thisan jeng jong chu Leiset’a kalhoh lha lha jenge.” ati.

Pakaiyin eithilpeh dungjuiyuvin Keiman Pakai lungset long lou chuleh Pakai vahchoina chengse chu Avel velin velsim kit’ing kate; Aphatna len tah Israel insung anapehsa Ahepina vanga amaho anapeh dungjui Alungset long lou Thalhing dungjuiyin.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin aseiyin, amaho hi keima mite mong mong ahiuvin, Jouva thilbol louhel ding chapate ahiuve; Hichea chun Pakai hi Ahuhhingpau vin ahung pang tai.

Amaho kibol gentheina chana Pakai jong kibol genthei ahin, Chule amasanga pang Vantil chun amaho ahuhhing tai; Alungset jeh le alainatpi jeh-in amaho alhatdam in, Amaho chu aphong dingin khang lui laiya pat ahinpui peh-in ahi.
Ahinla amahon adoumah aboluvin, Alhagao Theng chu analung himo sah-uvin ahi; Hijeh chun amatah amaho melma-in akiheidoh tan, Atahsa tah-in amaho dounan gal asat tai.

Chuphat’in aman khang luilai, Amite le Mose nikho lai chu ahin geldoh tai; Twikhanglena hinpui doh pa, Kelngoi ching ho toh hinpuidoh tha pa chu hoiba hitam? Alah-uva Alhagao Theng chensah pa Hoilama ba umah hi tam?
Aban thahat loupi tah Mose khut jetlam to kijot jingsapa, Amasang uva amin kihet jingna dinga Twipi hom khen hel jenga
Twito jot paiya Israelte pui galkaipa chu? Neldi lah a sakol che bangin amaho akibalhu pouve.
Phaicham thuh tah a gancha kumsuh bangin Pakai Lhagaovin amaho chu akicholdo sah tai. Hijeh chun nangma min thanna din Namite chu na nalamkaitan ahi.
Vana konin hung kunin lang Nachenna mun theng le loupi tah a konin hinven. Natom ngaina le nathahat hoiya umah hitam? Nalungthim ngaichat le navoujang natna keidin akituh tang tai.

Ajeh chu nangma keiho Pakai nahi. Abraham in eihet khah louvuva Chule Israel in eina het khah lou vanguvin; O Pakai, nangma ka Pau nahin Eilhatdampu-u nahiye, Khanglui laiya pat hiche hi nangma min ahi jinge.
O Pakai, ibola nangin nalampi ho neiho khel sah-uva Nangma kagin louna dinguva kalungthimu natahsah hitam? Nalhacha ho khohsah jal leh Nagoulo phung mite jalin hung kile kit tan.
Nangma mithengten namuntheng chu phat chomkhat alo’uvin, Kakidoupi teuvin muntheng chu keng chotphan aneitauve.
Keiho hi achunguva navaihom khah louhelna mite kabang uvin, Nangma mina kikou louhel mite kabang tauve.
O Pakai van hi nahin phet vanga Nahung kumlhah ding hijeng leh, Na-angsung a molsang jouse jong Kihot ling soh thei ahin
Meiyin phoinal lah akah bang leh twi ahulsat bang ding, Nangma douho henga namin kihetsah ding, Hita chu namtin vaipi hi Nangma angsunga kitihot hot ding ahiuve!
Keihon vet’a kanei louvu tijat umtah thil nabol chun Nangma nahung kumlhan ahileh Na-angsunga molsang jouse Akihot lingsoh helin ahiye.

Khang lui laiya pat koima chan ja jong ajakha pon, Nakhangin jong anaja kha hih hel e. Nangma tailou mihem mit hin pathen dang amukhapoi, Ama ngah jing ho dinga natoh pehji nangma tailou adang aumpoi.

Kipah tah a adih jeng bolpa, Nadanthua nang nageldoh jing ho chu Nangin nakimuto pi jin ahi. Vetan, nangma nalung hangin, keiho kachonseuve; Kachonset chenguva phat sottah umsa kahitauvin, Achutileh huhhinga kaum jou dingu hinam?
Kabonchauvin miboh bep bep kahitauvin Chule kathildih bol chengseu jong von kisuboh abang gamtai; Kabon chauvin nathel bangin kapul gamuvin, Kathemmona chengseuvin huilhoh-in eilhoh mang gamtauve.
Nangma mina taova khat chabeh aum tapon, Nangma kolchah dinga akitil khouva aumpoi; Ajeh chu nangin kakom uvah namai nasel mang tan, Chule kathemmona hou khut luma lou din neipedoh tauvin ahi.
Hijongleh O Pakai, nangma keiho Pa nahin, Keiho bellei bep kahiuvin, keiho beldena eidengpau nang nahi; Keiho kabon chauva Nangma khutsoh jeng kahiuve.
O Pakai, lunghang behseh hih helin, Chule tonsot geiyin themmona geldoh jing da tan; Vetemin lang ngaito temin Keiho kabonchauva nangma mite jeng kahiuve.
Nakhopi theng ho jong chu gammang asoh gam tan, Zion jong gammang asoh tan, Jerusalem jong dalhah thip’in aumtai.
Keiho dinga intheng le inhoi tah, Kapu kapateuvin nangma navahchoi nau in chu; Meiyin akavam soh-in, Keiho dia mun nom lai jouse jong khogem jeng ahitai.
O Pakai, thilsoh hichengpia hi nakitim nah laiya Thip beh a nauma keiho engse tah a neibol genthei nah lai diu ham?
Keima eidong louhel hon Eiholdoh dinguva kigosa kahin. Keima eihol louhel hon Eimudoh dinguva kiphaldohsa kahi; Keiman kamina eikou kha louhel nam mite jah a chun “Hikoma kaume, hikoma kaume,” kati.
Kakhut teni hi nilhum lhumin Doumah mah bol mite chunga kajah jingin, Lampi phalouva lam lha ho. Amaho lung gel gela chonte,
Kamaikoh a keima eiphin phin mite, Honsung dunga kilhaina bola cheh chung dunga gimnamtui lhut ho;
Lhankhuh dunga tou jinga, Mun thip lai laiya khovah vah ho; Vohsa neh a hat’a Amebel sung dunguva thet umtah tah satwi kitun ho.

Hita hi, “Kitum sah-in, Kahenga hung lut hih-in, Ijeh-inem itile keima nang dinga eikithenso ahitai,” ti ho; Hiche ho hi kanah hom sung tenia meikhu bang bep ahiuvin, Nilhum lhuma kong kongji Meikong tobang bep ahibouvui.
Vetan, ka-angsunga hiche hi akisunin “Kei umthim ponge, kasahdoh soh kei ding ahi, ‘Ahiye, a-op lhanguva kaluipeh Mong mong ding ahi.

Nangho themmona jouse leh Napu napateu themmona jouse pumin,’ tin Pakaiyin aseiye; Ipijeh-inem itile amahon molsang chung dunga Gimnamtui ahalnam uvin Thinglhang dunga keima eihouse seu vin ahi, Masanga athilbol chengseu jeh a Keiman tohman a-op lhang dimset’a Katedoh peh ding ahi,” ati.

Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Lengpitwi chu aga lom lah a akimeh doh banga, Amahon jong, ‘Hiche chu suse hih-o, Hichea chun phattheina aumbouve,’ ati banguva, Keiman jong kalhacha ho khohsah jeh a hita chu kabol ding, Abonchauva kasuh mang lou ding ahi.

Keiman Jacob’a konin son le pah tampi hinpuidoh ing ting; Judah a konin keima molsang dung lo ding puidoh inge; Kalhenchom ten molsang dung chu alo dingu, Chule hikoma chu keima lhacha ho cheng ding ahiuve.
Sharon chu kelngoi hon ho Lhatle na hamhing gam hung soh ding, Achor phaicham jong gancha ho kolle na a Hung pang ding ahi Keima eihol hol kamite dia Hitia chu hung soh ding ahi.
Amavang nangho Pakai dalha ho leh Keima lhangtheng sumil ho, Hamphatna phunsanna dinga dokhan kidoa Ajotna lhun theina dinga lengpitwi le khamna thei khona kihal ho;

Keiman nangho hi chemjama lou dia kakoiya, Nabonchauva mithat pa angsunga nakun cheh diu ahi; Ipijeh-inem itile kahin kou pet chun nanghon neidonbut pouvin, Thu kaseipet jong chun na-ngai pouve; Ahin keima mitmua agilou chubou naboluvin, Kadeimo mo joh nakilhen tauve,” ati.

Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Vetan, Kalhacha ho chun an nen tin, Nangho vang nagilkel dingu ahi; Vetan, kalhacha ho chun twi adon dingu ahin, Nangho vang nadang chah dingu ahiye; Vetan keima lhacha ho chu Kipah ding ahiuvin Nangho vang jachatna nachuh diu ahiye;
Vetan, keima lhacha ho chun lungthim kipana la asah diu ahin, Nangho vang lungthim hesoh a naka dingu ahi; Chujongleh nanghon lung gim hesoh thoh thoh a Na mao mao dingu ahi.
Nanghon kalhenchomte dinga gaosap theiset minse tah nadalhah diu ahi. Ajeh chu Pakai Pathenin natha dingu ahi; Ama lhacha ho vang chu Pakaiyin min chombeh khat’a akou ding ahi.

Hijeh a chu gamsunga Ama le ama phatthei kiboh pa chu Pathen a dih tah-a ama le ama Phatthei kiboh ding ahi. Chule gamsunga kihahselna bolpan jong Pathen a dih tah-a kihahselna abol ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile gimna masa jouse akisumil tan, Keima mit mun akisel mang soh tai.
Ijeh-inem itile neive temin, Keiman vanthah le leiset thah khat kaseme; Chule thil masa chengse chu kigeldoh kit lou ding Lunggila jong hung chukit lou ding ahi.
Hijongle keima thilsemsa chunga chun Thanomin lang kipah jingin; Ajeh chu neive temin, Keiman kipana dingin Jerusalem kasemin, Amite jong khu Thanopna dinga kasem ahiye.
Keima Jerusalem chung changa kipah ing ting, Kamite chung changa kathanop ding ahi; Asunga chu ka-gin kija kha kit louhel ding, Lunggima hesohna ogin jong kija kha louhel ding ahi.

Asunga chu chomkah louva thi jeng thei Naosen peng jong um lou ding ahin; Ateh thi lou ding upa jong um lou ding ahi. Ajeh chu naosen peng jong kum ja khat jouva thi cheh ding ahi; Amavang chonse ho kum ja khat hing thei chu Gaosap chang ding ahiye.
Kamiten in tampi akisah-uva asunga cheng diu, Lengpilei tampi akiboluva aga aneh dingu ahiye.

Amaho in sahsa chu midang cheng lou ding, Amahon hon aboluva midangin aga aneh lou ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile thing phung khat hinkho banga chu Kamite hinkho jong hung um ding ahi; Kalhen chomten akhut tah-uva Atohgau phat sotpi nom asah pi dingu ahi.

Amahon pannabeiya na atoh lou dingu ahin. Toset toh dinga jong chale nao ahinlou dingu ahi; Ijeh-inem itile amaho chu Pakai phattheiboh Sonle pah hidiu, achateu jong amaho toh umkhom jing ding ahiuve.
Amahon eihin kou masanguva keiman kakou ding, Thu seina laiyu jongleh kajah jeng ding ahi.

Kamkei le kelngoi jong hung lhakhom ding, Sakeiyin jong bongchal banga changpol aneh ding ahi; Gul jong leivuiya kivah ding ahi. Hiche ho chun keima lhang theng chung dunga chu Subset khoiset imacha aneilou dingu ahi Tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye, “Van hi keima laltouna ahin, Leiset hi kakengto ngapna ahiye; Nanghon itobang in neisahpeh dingu hiya, Chule kacholdona mun chu Hoiche ba ham?

Thil hichengpi hi keiman kakhut’a kasem cheh ahin, Hijeh a chu aboncha hi keiya ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye. Ahinla keiman kavet khoh ding mi chu Lhagaova lungnem a lungkhel pa Keima thusei ajah tengleh Kitihot hotpa chubou ahiye.

Bongchal that mi chu Mihem that tobang bang ahin, Kelngoiya kilhaina bolpa jong chu Uicha ngong heboh peh pa tobangma ahiye. Chang thilto hinchoipa jong chu Vohcha thisan thiltoa tohpa bepma ahi; Gimnamtui melchihna thilto bolpa jong Milim kisemthu phatthei boh boh jengpa tobang ahi. Hiche ho hin ama ama lampi cheh akilhenu ahitan, Thil thet umtah ho abolnauva jong hin alungthimu akipahjoi;

Ken jong amaho dinga bolgentheina kalhenpeh ding, Chule achunguva kichatna kalhun khumding ahi; Ijeh-inem itile Keiman kakoupet chun Koima chan eihin donbut pouvin, Keiman thu kaseipet chun Amahon thu angai pouve; Ahin keima mitmun agilou bou aboluvin, Chule keima kipana louhel chu akilhen tauvin ahi,” ati.

Pakai thusei ngaiyuvin, Nangho athuseiya kitihot hot ho: “Nasopi houvin nahot boluva Keima min jala napaidoh-uva. ‘Pakai chu choian tangem, Keihon jong nakipana chu vetah tangu,’ tia seiho; Ahinla amaho chubou hijah ahi Akijumso ding ho chu.
Ngai temun, khopi sunga kona ogin pikhu! Houina kona ogin pi khu! Pakai ogin ahin, Amelmate chunga phulahna ogin ki thong ahiye!
Anaoso nat masangin, cha ahingdoh tan, Asonat’in ahinphah masangin Numeichun Chapa khat ahingtai.

Koiham hitobang thil jakha a? Koiham hitobang thil mukha a chu? Gam leiset khat chu nikhat sunga naosoa soh jeng theiya, Mihem namkhat chu phat chom khat kah seh a kisodoh thei ham? Ajeh chu Zion hi asonat nat leh Achapa jouse ahingdoh jengin ahi.
Keiman cha hing dinga kagon mai maiya So lhah sah louva kaumsah ding ham? tin Pakaiyin aseiye; Kei naoso lhah sah pan Naobu kasin beh ding ham? tin na-Pathenin aseiye.
Jerusalem toh kipah khomuvin, ama dingin thanom uvin Angailua nangho nabonchau vin; Ama hi kipah-in thanop piuvin Achung changa lunghempi nanghon;
Hita chu aman amilhep lung mongna Anoi teni nachep’uva nachim theina dinguvin; Chule aloupina thalhingset’a kona Dangvot jin jena nadon chimsohna dinguvin,” ati.

Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, Neive temin, ken Jerusalem kahao sah-a hao twi lona kalonsah ding, Chule namtin vaipi haona chu Vadung kamlet jeng jung banga kadip ding ahi; Chutengle nanghon noichep’a nachep’uva Min akong janga nao apoh banga napoh diu, Chule aphei chunga Nakichop chop dingu ahiye.
Minun achapa alhep lung mong banga Keiman jong kalhep lung mong ding nahiuve; Jerusalema Nangho lhep lung monga nachen diu ahi.

Nanghon namu tei tei dingu, Chule nalungthimu kipah ding ahi; Nagu nachangu jong Lou nou banga nou ding ahi; Chutengle Pakai khut alhacha ho toh Akilhon jing jenge, ti kihedoh ding ahin, Chule alung himona chu amelmate chunga Ahat jinge, ti kihedoh ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile vetan, Pakai chu meikonga hung ding, Chule akangtalai ho chu huile go kitho bang ding; Alungsatna ehjeng junga hung kisena Chule amiphona chu meisi pah lah lah hung bang ding ahi.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin meikonga thu atana Chule chemjam apat’a tahsa a hing jouse chunga thu atan ding ahi; Chule Pakai thagam mihem chu Atama tam ding ahiuve.
“Amaho acham chama kisuthenguva, hon lei dunga chea, alai lunga mi khat nung juilea, thet umtah vohsa nea, jucha sa neho chu abonchauva hung mahthah khom cheh ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Ijeh-inem itile keiman anatoh jouse leh alunggel jouseu kahen, namtin vaipi jouse leh pao tin pao tanga mi khom khomsoh dingin kahunge; chule amaho jong hunguvin tin aloupina ahung mu diu ahi,

chutengleh keiman alah-uva melchihna khat kakoi ding ahi. Chule alah-uva ahingdoh amoh chengse chu namtin vaipi lah a kasol ding, Tarshish lang ahin, Put lam ahin, thalpi kamsa koi jing Lud lam ahin, Tubal lam ahin, Javan lam ahin, kamin kithang jakha lou laihel leh kaloupina mukha loulai hel, gamla tah a um twikhanglen pang dung geiya kasol ding ahiuve; amahon namtin vaipi ho lah a keima loupina aga phonjal dingu ahi.

Namtin vaipiho chun nasopiteu chu namtin vaipi ho lah lah a kona ahin toluva, Pakai henga thilto ding banga, sakol ho chunga jong, kangtalai ho chunga jong, talai ho chunga jong, sakolpol ho chunga jong, sangongsao ho chunga jong, Israel miten bel theng sunga Pakai insunga chang thilto ding ahin choi bang banguva, keima molsang theng Jerusalem a cheng dia ahin tol lut dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Chule amaho abang bang chu keiman thempu dia kalhendoh-a, a bang bang Levi kahisah ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Ijeh-inem itile keiman kasemdoh ding Van thah le leiset thah chu Ka-angsunga umden jing jeng ding ahi. Tin Pakaiyin aseiye. Hitobanga chu nason napah-u jong Umden jing jeng ding ahiuve.
Lhathah sim lhathah seh ahin, Cholngah nikho sim cholngah nikho seh hileh Tahsa a hing jouse keima angsunga Chibai boh dinga hung ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Chutengleh amaho kijotdoh-uvin tin keima doumah mah bolji mihem thisa thilong ho chu avet dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile a than ho jong thi louhel ding ahiuvin, ameikongu jong chu kisumit louhel ding, tahsa a hing jouse dinga lohso umtah hi ding ahiuve,” ati.
